Moreover, construction will be done by our own Construction Company Multi-Construction Pvt. Ltd; this will remove the remaining legal doubts of aspiring investors.

4 Marla Commercial Plot in H-Block Rudn Enclave

Residential and Commercial plots are two distinct types of land investments, each serving different purposes and offering unique advantages.

Commercial plots are designated for business activities, such as offices, retail stores, restaurants, and industrial facilities. They are often located in busy commercial areas with high foot traffic, making them ideal for generating income and profit. Typically have higher property values due to their potential for business development and rental income.

On the other hand, residential plots are intended for housing and are situated in neighborhoods or residential zones. Henceforth, they are designed for building homes and offer a peaceful and comfortable living environment for families and individuals.

Investing in a commercial comes up with advantages including the potential for higher returns on investment, and stable rental income. Further, commercial properties can also appreciate in value over time, making them a lucrative long-term investment.

pages.title: 5 Marla Commercial Plaza Construction Cost
pages.content:
5 Marla Commercial Plaza Construction Cost in Pakistan (2025)

The real estate market will recover in 2025, so investing in a commercial building will be a secure and rewarding investment decision. Whether you are a seasoned developer or a new builder, estimating the construction cost of a commercial building is crucial for a successful return on investment (ROI).I will share the 5 Marla Commercial Plaza Construction Cost in Pakistan (2025). Read the blog for the complete details.

A Detailed Overview of 5 Marla Commercial Plaza Construction Cost

The construction cost of a commercial building depends on various factors. Here is the detailed breakdown of this cost:

Cost of Land

The price of a 5-Marla commercial plot in Pakistan varies depending on the location and society. However, the average cost of a 5-Marla commercial plot will be 3-4 Crore.

Size of the Commercial Plot

In Pakistan, a 5-Marla commercial plot usually comes in 1200 sq ft size with 30 x 40 dimensions.

Structure of the Plaza Building

We will estimate the construction cost of a G+3 commercial building. It will have a lower ground floor, a ground floor, and three floors. The size of each floor will be 1200 sq ft.

What is the Per Sq Ft Construction Cost?

The per sq ft construction cost of a commercial building in 2025 is 6430 Pakistani rupees.

Detailed 5 Marla Commercial Plaza Construction Cost

The construction cost of each floor of a 05 Marla commercial plaza is divided as:

Cost of Elevator Lift

Having stairs in the building/elevator is an optional expense. It depends on the builder’s preference. If you want to install an elevator lift in your 05 Marla commercial plaza, it will cost you an additional 50-60 lac rupees.

Total 5 Marla Commercial Plaza Construction Cost

The total cost of a 05 Marla commercial plaza will be:

Cost of a 5 Marla commercial plot: 3-4 Crore

Construction cost of total covered area: 391,80,000/-

Cost of elevator building: 50,00,000/-

Total Cost of a 05 Marla Commercial Plaza = 692,30,000/-

Tips to Reduce 5 Marla Commercial Plaza Construction Cost

Construction cost depends on various factors. However, you can reduce it significantly by following these practical tips:

Bulk Buying: Always buy construction materials in bulk. It will significantly reduce your construction cost.

Using Cost-Effective Material: Use cost-effective material to reduce your overall cost. For example, you can use a 2-foot tile instead of 04 feet to lower overall construction cost.

Getting the Best Construction Quote: Get construction costs from multiple contractors and work with those who offer the lowest rates but superior quality.

Optimizing Plaza Structure: Optimizing building design and structure can reduce the cost. For instance, an open hall floor will cost less than a floor with separate shops.

Timely Construction: Do construction on time. The more you delay the construction, the higher the inflation and construction costs.

Conclusion

The correct estimation of the construction cost of a 05 Marla commercial plaza will increase the chances of success for your building venture. You can make this process more easy by consulting an established developer like Property Naama Group. Access our real estate and construction consultants today!

pages.title: Advantages and Disadvantages of Apartment Living
pages.content:
Advantages and Disadvantages of Apartment Living

This blog post serves as a compass for those navigating the urban jungle. Offering a comprehensive exploration of the advantages and disadvantages of apartment living.

In the bustling urban landscapes, an increasing number of individuals find themselves contemplating the pros and cons of apartment living. The allure of city life, with its accessibility, social opportunities, and low-maintenance appeal, is undeniable.

Within these lines, we will dissect different aspects of the topic. The appeal of prime locations, delve into the social fabric of communal living, and scrutinize the cost considerations.

Join us on this insightful journey as we guide you through the nuances of apartment life. Unraveling the intricate tapestry that defines the urban residential experience.

Advantages of Apartment living

In the dynamic urban landscape, apartment living presents a range of compelling advantages that attract individuals of a society.

These advantages epitomize the urban allure of apartment living. They are providing not just a dwelling but a lifestyle tailored for those navigating the bustling cityscape.

Disadvantages of Apartment living

As we unravel the intricacies of apartment living, it’s crucial to acknowledge its potential drawbacks.

Exploring these disadvantages provides a comprehensive understanding of the potential challenges inherent in apartment living. The subsequent sections will delve into strategies for mitigating these drawbacks.

Strategies for a Fulfilling Apartment Living Experience

Navigating the landscape of apartment living involves acknowledging the advantages and disadvantages. It also involves the embracing strategies to enhance the overall experience.

By implementing these strategies, residents can mitigate the challenges posed by apartment living. They can also transform their space into a haven that aligns seamlessly with their lifestyle and aspirations.

The subsequent sections will further guide individuals offering insights into making informed decisions in the dynamic urban environment.

Concluding Remarks

In the intricate tapestry of urban living, the decision to choose apartment living becomes a defining moment for a person.

As we unravel the advantages, disadvantages, and strategies inherent in this lifestyle, a holistic perspective emerges for the urban jungle.

The advantages of prime location, social connectivity, and a low-maintenance lifestyle paint an appealing picture. The challenges of limited space, potential noise, and the transitory nature of tenancy demand careful consideration.

Yet, armed with strategies for rationalization, efficient space utilization, and budgetary foresight, residents can transform their apartments into fulfilling sanctuaries.

Ultimately, making an informed decision involves a nuanced analysis of personal priorities, budgetary goals, and a comparative assessment of housing options.

As we conclude this exploration, the journey through the urban housing landscape serves as a guide. A guide to offer insights into finding harmony within the dynamic ebb and flow of city living.

May your choices be informed, and your urban dwelling experience be as vibrant as the cityscape itself.

Contact with Property Naama Group

pages.content:
Best Areas for Commercial Investment in Islamabad

In the dynamic landscape of Islamabad’s real estate, commercial investments stand as promising opportunities for diversification and growth. This blog post aims to unravel the intricacies of best areas for commercial investment in Islamabad offering insights into optimal investment potential.

As the capital city experiences economic expansion and government-driven initiatives, the commercial sector mirrors this upward trajectory. Through meticulous analysis, we’ll delve into key factors influencing commercial real estate, and highlight the top-performing areas of the capital city.

Join us on this exploration, where we decode the pulse of Islamabad’s commercial real estate, and empower futuristic investors.

Understanding the best areas for commercial investment in Islamabad

Navigating the intricate realm of Islamabad’s commercial real estate requires a comprehensive understanding of the city’s economic pulse. Among the paramount considerations are key factors shaping the commercial landscape, from governmental policies to ongoing infrastructure developments.

Islamabad’s Blue Area emerges as a stalwart, embodying stability and potential returns. F-6, boasting a vibrant Super Market area, beckons with its diverse business ecosystem.

In the realm of investments, F-10 Markaz stands tall as a testament to sustained growth and lucrative opportunities. G-8 Markaz, E-11 along Margalla Road, and the commercial avenues within DHA Islamabad each present unique prospects for discerning investors.

Factors Influencing Commercial Real Estate Investment

Delving deeper into the fabric of Islamabad’s commercial real estate, it’s imperative to discern the influential factors shaping investment viability. Economic indicators wield significant influence, impacting the value and sustainability of commercial properties. Simultaneously, the dynamic interplay of government policies and initiatives injects a crucial layer of predictability into the market. A closer examination of ongoing infrastructure projects provides additional context for potential investors.

While Blue Area’s historical significance and stability captivate attention, F-6’s Market area offers a thriving blend of commerce and culture. F-10 Markaz stands as a testament to sustained growth, while G-8 Markaz presents a strategic hub for commercial endeavors.

E-11 along Margalla Road unveils its potential, and within DHA Islamabad, a unique blend of residential and commercial offerings unfolds.

Enlisted best areas for commercial investment in Islamabad

Here is the list of best sites for commercial investment in Islamabad. This list has been prepared by a team of veteran real estate consultants at Property Naama Group.

Blue Area

The Blue Area in Islamabad serves as a dynamic and influential commercial center, fostering economic activities and business interactions. It is contributing significantly to the city’s overall commercial landscape.

F-9 Super Market

F-9 Super Market is a well-established retail and shopping hub in Islamabad. It houses a diverse range of shops, boutiques, and stores offering various products and services. This diversity creates a vibrant business ecosystem that caters to a wide range of consumer needs.

Due to its commercial significance, the real estate in and around F-9 Super Market holds value for businesses. Investors often view properties in this area as valuable assets with the potential for good returns.

DHA Islamabad

A supreme example of urban planning and development, DHA Islamabad, attributes devoted commercial sites to futuristic businesses. Moreover, the beautiful surroundings, purposeful layout, and potential of high ROI make DHA Islamabad, a winning commercial option.

It is a unique place where the opportunity of setting up your own business can also be a wise investment decision.

Gulberg Islamabad

Gulberg Islamabad is located in the Zone IV of Islamabad Capital Territory near the main Islamabad Expressway. There are two parts of the Gulberg Islamabad , the Gulberg Residencia and Gulberg Green.

Actually, there are different blocks for Gulberg residencia. Among these blocks, the D-Markaz is purely a commercial area. Therefore, it is one of the top areas for commercial investment in Islamabad.

River View Heights Bahria Town Rawalpindi

River View Heights is a high-rise, top-notch project in Bahria Town Rawalpindi, a mixed-used venture by Property Naama Group. Planned with spacious shops, impressively designed offices, luxurious apartments, and penthouses offering the best residential and commercial opportunities.

It is constructed according to the latest and international development standards as Enforced by Bahria Town Laws. Come and explore more to make a versatile living and unique business experience surrounded by convenience.

Umar Heights (Mall and Apartments)

Umar Hills Mall and Apartments is a versatile and dream Commercial cum residential HiRISE project. Being pliant, it is going to serve more than one purpose for potential investors and buyers. Umar Hills Mall and Apartments are located in B-Block Faisal Hills in front of Margalla Hills Islamabad.

Concluding remarks for best areas for commercial investment in Islamabad

In the final stretch of our exploration, the insights garnered practical guidance for investors entering Islamabad’s commercial opportunities.

The importance of a diversified portfolio, incorporating both established and developing commercial hubs, is underscored. With this comprehensive guide, investors embark on a journey equipped with knowledge, poised to make astute decisions.

pages.title: Blue World City File Status
pages.content:
Blue World City File Status

In this informative blog, we are going to discuss about Blue World City File Status in detail.It is a human instinct that we always deliberate and analyses before finalizing any investment decision. In order to do this daunting task with ease we have tried to help our reader. The expert opinion about file status in BWC in this blog will help you to take this investment decision easily.

This blog will help you to understand the profit timeline of an average plot file in Blue World City Islamabad. Read this blog till the last line to get the complete idea about blue world city file status.

Brief history of blue world city file status

Whenever anybody makes an investment in a residential plot; he or she has two purposes behind this investment.

Either he/she wants to make his house or profit out of it by holding that piece of land.

Let’s have a look at the track record of the investment leading to the profit situation in the Blue World City Islamabad. In the year 2018; the file rate for a 5 Marla plot in Blue World City (BWC) was 700,000 /-.

There was a PKR 70,000 /- down payment and PKR 7500 /- monthly installment. The file of all those investors is in profit that had paid all their dues. These dues include monthly installments and a down payment. Their file is now in the profit with a valid plot and street number from the society.

The plot file which was bought with just an investment of PKR 700,000 /- now costs around PKR 14,00,000 /-. And all those investors who have gone for possession timely, their ready plot costs around PKR 20,00,000 /-

Therefore; from the above analysis, it has proved that an average natural profit in real estate took around 5 years.

Henceforth; if you have invested in any block of BWC, you have to wait at least 3-4 years to get profit on your file. Indeed, any natural real estate investment works in that way.

On the contrary, there are several real estate societies on the chakri road; who create fake profit trajectories. The sole purpose of a fraudulent profit trajectory is to attract the potential customer to deceive them. All these fake housing societies are now in loss which heavily costs the investors in terms of monetary loss.

The way forward of blue world city file status

The blessing in disguise is the BWC market is a natural real estate market with an actual profit roadmap.

For that reason; if you have invested in the year 2023 your file installment plan will be ending in the year 2026. You have to pay installments and all other dues of the file on time. In this way, your file will get a valid plot number and will be processed for balloting timely. A balloted file turns into a ready-to-possession plot which ultimately gives profit.

The crux of all the above discussion is always opt for a long-term investment plan instead of a short-term investment option. The Blue World City Islamabad is a long-term investment option with a secured profit trajectory.

pages.title: Capital Smart City Islamabad File Cancelation Policy
pages.content:
Capital Smart City Islamabad File Cancelation Policy

Reasons behind the cancelation of the file

Following are some potential reasons behind cancellation of files and plots by the Capital Smart City Islamabad administration:

Failure to complete the registration

The other reason for file cancellation may be that the members have paid the owed amount in the bank account of CSCI but did not inform to society administration to upgrade their payment ledger.

Non- Payment of the dues

If the file/plot owner does not pay the settled dues, amount, or any other charges owed to Capital Smart City, the society will ultimately cancel the plot file.

Being Defaulter

If the file/plot owner took any kind of loan against the plot and gets defaulted on the payments, the lending institution might take possession of the plot, and the residential society might need to cancel the plot file as a result.

New Policy Guidelines for CSCI Members

All 2018, 2019, and 2020 files that canceled between 21 % and 35 % will reinstated upon payment of 50 % of the total plot amount by 15th of September, 2023.

The remaining 50% payment must be made by June 30, 2024.

Alternatively, the members can choose to restore the same files by agreeing to pay 50% of the payment by 15th September 2023 and the remaining amount over the next two years at current rates.

In this case, the members will pay 50 % as per the existing plan, and the remaining amount will be distributed over a 2-year payment plan.

In both cases, members are required to submit an affidavit for the plot’s inclusion in the next balloting.

The revised payment Chart

pages.title: Commercial Investment Opportunity in Rawalpindi
pages.content:
Top Commercial Investment Opportunity in Rawalpindi: Faisal Town Phase 2

If you are searching for a secure and rewarding place to invest your money, Faisal Town Phase 2 stands out as one of the top commercial investment opportunity in Islamabad, as one of the strongest options in Islamabad’s real estate market. Investors from across Pakistan are showing great interest in its commercial sector, and for good reason. Property prices are climbing steadily, offering impressive profit potential.

If long-term growth is your goal, this project deserves your attention. Let’s take a closer look at what makes Faisal Town Phase 2 a top commercial investment hotspot. Read the blog for details.

Why Faisal Town Phase 2 Is Ideal for Commercial Investment?

Faisal Town Phase 2 is developing at a rapid pace. The developers have introduced commercial plots at competitive prices, making it easier for both new and experienced investors to enter the market. Whether you prefer a compact plot or a larger commercial space, there are multiple options available.

With convenient installment plans, investing here becomes even more accessible. The steady rise in demand indicates that investors can expect excellent returns in the years to come.

Key Advantages of Investing in Commercial Plots in Faisal Town Phase 2

Investing in Faisal Town Phase 2 is a highly rewarding opportunity due to the following reasons:

Strong Profit Potential: Prices are increasing quickly, ensuring high returns.

Easy Installments: Flexible 4–6 year payment plans simplify the buying process.

Prime Location: Positioned close to major roads, business districts, and major facilities.

Multiple Plot Sizes: A range of small to large commercial plots to match different budgets.

Future Expansion: Upcoming developments will continue boosting demand and value.

Common Challenges for New Investors

Many first-time investors feel uncertain when choosing the right direction. Here are some typical concerns and practical solutions:

Residential vs. Commercial

Commercial plots usually offer stronger and more consistent returns over time.

Limited Budget

Start with a smaller plot on installments; even small units grow significantly in value.

Fear of market Fluctuations

Choose emerging, high-demand areas like Faisal Town Phase 2, where growth is already visible.

Even those starting with a modest investment can earn substantial profits if they invest wisely and early.

How to Begin Your Commercial Investment Journey?

You can start your commercial investment journey in Faisal Town Phase 2 by following these easy steps:

Even a 5-marla commercial plot can make a major asset within a few years. Larger investors can target prime commercial lanes for even higher returns.

Current Market Trends and Profit Examples

Past performance in nearby projects clearly shows how profitable early commercial investments can be:

A 333 sq. yard plot in Faisal Town Phase 1 was initially sold for Rs. 3.33 Crore.

Today, it’s priced between Rs. 25–28 Crore.

A commercial plot purchased in Faisal Hills for Rs. 6 Crore now ranges from Rs. 25–30 Crore.

Commercial Plot Vs Residential Plot: Which is the Best Investment Opportunity?

Investing in real estate is one of the most reliable ways to grow wealth, but choosing the right type of property can make all the difference. Among the most popular options are Commercial Plot Vs Residential Plots, each offering unique advantages and challenges.

But which one makes the better investment? In this blog, we’ll break down the key differences, benefits, and considerations of commercial versus residential plots to help you make an informed decision. Read the blog for details.

What is a Residential Plot?

A piece of land that is designed and has legal permission to construct a house or a residential building. It is best for residential purposes such as building a family home, a Villa, or a residential apartment.

Residential Plot Common Uses

Example of Residential Plots

Different socialites are offering these residential plots for cash and installment payments. Here are the most credible and sought-after housing societies in the country:

What is a Commercial Plot?

It is a piece of land that is legally allowed for commercial activities and businesses. You can use it for commercial activities such as constructing shops, business suites, warehouses, restaurants, and other commercial entities.

Common Uses of Commercial Plots

In Pakistan, there are different sizes of commercial plots, such as:

Example of Commercial Plots

Comparison Between Commercial and Residential Plots

A commercial plot versus a residential plot has its advantages and disadvantages. I have shared a summary about both plot categories:

Which Plot Category Should You Choose?

Choose a commercial plot if you have a high budget and want high returns on investment. On the other hand, select a residential plot if you have a lower budget and want to get lower rental income.

Developed by Habib Rafique Pvt. Ltd. in collaboration with the Army Welfare Trust and master-planned by Surbana Jurong, the project is NOC-approved and spans over 32,500 kanals.

It offers a 1 Kanal residential plot on pre-lunch rates of 7.5 Million only. I have shared the complete details of this investment opportunity in this blog post. Let’s read.

DHA Gandhara Islamabad Location

DHA Gandhara Islamabad Phase 9 is strategically located on the M-2 Motorway, near the Chakri Interchange and Rawalpindi Ring Road, just minutes from Islamabad International Airport.

Surrounded by DHA Phases 6 & 7, Capital Smart City, Faisal Town Phase 2, and Blue World City, it offers excellent connectivity via the GT Road, Srinagar Highway, and Expressway.

With easy access to major interchanges and top neighborhoods, DHA Gandhara is ideal for convenient living and high-value investment in Islamabad.

DHA Gandhara Islamabad Phase 9 enjoys excellent connectivity to major landmarks and roads across the capital region:

This prime location ensures residents enjoy seamless access to major roads, commercial hubs, and recreational spots. It makes DHA Gandhara Phase 9 a top choice for investment and modern living.

DHA Gandhara Islamabad Master Plan

The master plan of DHA Gandhara Islamabad Phase 9 is designed to deliver a modern and well-organized urban lifestyle.

Developed by Surbana Jurong, the project follows international planning standards across approximately 32,500 kanals of land. It is a balanced mix of residential and commercial zones.

The plot sizes range from 5 Marla to over 1 Kanal. It includes wide roads, green spaces, and essential infrastructure. The DHA Gandhara offers strong investment potential and a high-quality living experience.

DHA Gandhara Phase 9 Islamabad Developers

DHA Gandhara Phase 9, Islamabad, is a joint development project of the Army Welfare Trust (AWT) and Habib Rafique Private Limited (HRL). This partnership combines AWT’s strong legacy in DHA projects with HRL’s expertise in premium real estate development.

The project’s master planning is handled by the internationally renowned firm Surbana Jurong, ensuring world-class design and development standards.

DHA Gandhara Islamabad Payment Plan

Currently, the authorities have not announced the official payment plan for DHA Gandhara. However, bookings will open with a low initial down payment, followed by an easy and buyer-friendly installment schedule.

Currently, 1 Kanal plot files are available at the pre-launch rate, with an estimated price of around PKR 7.5 million for general members.

As DHA Phase 9 is in its early development phase, the complete payment plan will be available within the next 2 to 3 months after its official launch. Therefore, the investors should stay updated for upcoming announcements.

Expected Launch Date

The expected launch date of DHA Gandhara Islamabad is in April 2026.

Booking to Possession Process

pages.title: Difference between a Files and plot | Difference Explained | Profit
pages.content:
What’s the difference between a plot and a plot file?

Have you ever wondered what the difference between plot and plot files is? It’s possible that you have not, but if you’re a real estate business owner, then chances are that you’ve used both of these terms before when referring to the information given to individuals who will be getting land allotted to them or who are applying for government land lease. Here are some of the differences between plot and plot files in the real estate business so that you can better understand them and make sure that you use the right term in the right context each time.

In Real Estate, ‘Plot’ Means Land

A plot a piece of land that owned by someone. A plot file is an information about that land, such as its size, location, and other details. The term ‘plot’ often used interchangeably with ‘land,’ but there a distinction between the two. When you buy a plot of land, you are buying the physical property. When you buy a plot file, you are buying the information about the land.

In Real Estate, ‘Plot’ Refers to ‘Plot File’ as Well

The term ‘plot’ in the context of real estate business means that a person going to allotted a piece of land. ‘Plot file’ means that the person going to given information about his area of the plot. It important to know both terms because they often used interchangeably, but they do have different meanings. If you’re ever unsure about which term someone is using, just ask for clarification!

So, In General…

A plot a piece of land that allotted to someone, while a plot file contains information about a said piece of land. A plot file important because it helps an individual understand the parameters of the land they have given, and what they able to do with it. In short, a plot is a land itself, while the plot file is the documentation surrounding it.

And Now Let’s Talk About the Specific Differences Between These Terms

When you in the real estate business, the term plot refers to a piece of land that’s allotted to someone. In other words, it’s a physical space. Meanwhile, a plot file is simply a document that contains information about the person’s area of land.

Difference Between Files & Plot

‘Plot’ Vs. ‘Plot File’ – Definitions

In real estate, the term ‘plot’ refers to a piece of land that allotted to an individual. A ‘plot file’, on the other hand, is a document that contains information about the area of the plot. The main difference between the two terms is that ‘plot’ refers to the physical land, while ‘plot file’ refers to the document containing information about it.

pages.title: Different Types of Apartment Amenities and Their Importance
pages.content:
Different Types of Apartment Amenities and Their Importance

When you’re searching for apartments, you can usually find several that have the same basic features. However, when you start to look closely at the details, you’ll find that there are many different types of apartment amenities and each one serves a different purpose in making your life easier, more comfortable and pleasant, or even just more fun! Here’s our comprehensive guide to apartment amenities that will help you understand how they work and which ones are most important to you and your lifestyle.

Types of Apartment Amenities

1. Pet-friendly amenities

One type of amenity that has become increasingly popular in apartments is pet-friendly features. This can include anything from a designated pet play area to special waste stations. Pet-friendly amenities are important because they make it possible for renters to have pets, which can improve their quality of life. Additionally, these amenities can help to attract new tenants.

2. Smart home features

One type of amenity that is becoming increasingly popular in apartments is smart home features. These can include things like a Nest thermostat, Amazon Echo, or even automated lights. Smart home features can make your life more convenient and save you money on your utilities. Plus, they can increase the security of your home by allowing you to control things remotely.

3. Comprehensive fitness amenities

Amenities like a fitness center, yoga studio, and lap pool are important to many renters. They provide a space to stay active and relieve stress, which is especially important for those who live in urban areas. Plus, having on-site fitness amenities can save you money by eliminating the need for a gym membership.

4. Rooftop deck

A rooftop deck is the perfect place to relax after a long day or entertain guests. They offer stunning views of the cityscape and can make your apartment feel like a penthouse. Plus, they’re great for hosting parties or barbecues. However, they can be expensive to maintain and may not be available in all buildings.

5. Outdoor kitchens and dining areas

Outdoor kitchens and dining areas are a great way to enjoy the beautiful weather while still being able to cook and dine in your own space. They also provide a great place for entertaining guests. However, they can be expensive to install and maintain, so make sure you weigh the pros and cons before making a decision.

6. Game room and lounge

A game room is a perfect place to entertain guests or host events. It can also be a great way to get to know your neighbors. If your building doesn’t have a game room, consider creating one! A lounge is another great amenity for apartment buildings. It’s a place where residents can relax, socialize, and unwind. Lounges can also be used for events or as a co-working space.

7. Community garden

Community gardens are a great way to get to know your neighbors, grow your own food, and beautify your community. They can also help reduce your carbon footprint, save you money on groceries, and provide you with fresh air and exercise.

8. In-building retailers and services

In-building retailers and services are a great way to create a sense of community in your apartment complex. They also provide residents with convenient access to the things they need on a daily basis, which can save time and money. Plus, they can add to the overall value of your property.

9. Luxury in-unit features

From high-end finishes to in-unit laundry, luxury apartments offer a host of features that make life easier and more comfortable. But not all amenities are created equal. Here’s a look at some of the most popular luxury apartment amenities and why they’re important.

10. Eco-friendly amenities

Many people are looking for ways to be more eco-friendly, and one way to do that is to choose an apartment complex that has eco-friendly amenities. Some examples of eco-friendly amenities are solar panels, water filtration systems, and electric car charging stations. These amenities can help you save money on your utilities, reduce your carbon footprint, and live a more sustainable lifestyle.

Contact Us

Property Naama Consultant , Best Investment Company.

Head Office # 1st to 3rd Floor Plaza No 65, River View commercial, Bahria Town Phase 7 Rawalpindi

Terms and conditions for the Faisal Town Phase 2 Payment Plan

Here are the terms and conditions for the Commercial plots in Faisal Town Phase 2:

Location Overview of Faisal Town Phase 2 Commercial Plots

The location of Faisal Town Phase 2 Commercial Plot is at the brink of the M-2 (Lahore-Islamabad) Motorway adjacent to the Thalian interchange. It is at a close distance from the forthcoming Ring Road Rawalpindi.

The commercial plot site has phenomenal accessibility. It is reachable within 2-3 minutes from Airport Avenue, Main Chakri Road, Thalian Road, and M-2 Motorway. Likewise, the Girja Road and Srinagar Highway are 10 minutes away from this location.

Additionally, several famed places are in the surrounding of Rawalpindi- Islamabad. The Capital Smart City, Multi-Garden B-17, Al-Haram City, and Qurtba City are the names of a few.

Faisal Hills Islamabad Developers & Owners

Zedem International is the developer and owner of Faisal Town Phase 2Commercial Plots, a reliable and popular housing project located at an ideal location accessible from Taxila, Islamabad, and Rawalpindi.

Abdul Majeed is the chairman of the company. Zedem International, recognized for its high-standard housing projects, was founded by him.

It’s the development company’s view that people should be able to own and afford their dream commercial assets.

Master Plan of the Project

The commercial plot size mentioned in the payment plan is subject to the construction under the following master plan.

Commercial Shopping Center

The 30 X 40 Feet (133 Sq.Yds) and 50 X 40 Feet (222 Sq.Yds) commercial plot comes under the Commercial Shopping Center. Under this category, you can do B+ G+ 03 construction. It means you can build a 3-floor building in addition to the basement and ground floor.

Commercial Markaz

Similarly, the 50 x 60 Feet (333 Sq.Yds) falls in the Commercial Markaz category. This category allows the B+G+06 construction plan. So, You can construct a 6-floor building in addition to the basement and ground floor.

Commercial Boulevard

Likewise, 50 x 60 Feet (333 Sq.Yds) category plots are under the Commercial Boulevard category. You can also construct a 6-floor building in addition to the basement and ground floor.

NOC Status of Faisal Town Phase 2

The Faisal Town Phase 2 has an approved No Objection Certificate (NOC) for its commercial plots from the Rawalpindi Development Authority (RDA). Therefore, you can invest in this commercial plot with complete confidence and peace of mind.

Development work status

The browning and zoning of the commercial plot are underway. The site office is functional. The construction and engineering teams are active day and night. They are using their equipment and machinery to complete the project on time.

Payment through Bank Transfer

pages.title: Farmhouse Plots for Sale on Installments
pages.content:
Farmhouse Plots for Sale on Installments Near Ring Road Rawalpindi

Do you want to live in a serene environment free of city-life challenges with modern infrastructure? You can avail yourself of this opportunity by investing in the farmhouse plots for sale in installments near Ring Road Rawalpindi. I will share the location, accessibility, and payment plan of these plots. Moreover, you will also learn about the available facilities, reasons to invest, and booking procedures. You can explore the details in the blog.

Location and Accessibility Overview

These farmhouses are located in the Kuri Khuda Bakhsh area, 400-500 meters from the main Chakbeli Road in Rawalpindi. This place is 11 km from the Ring Road Rawalpindi and 43 km south of Islamabad.

The site of these farmhouse plots is 0.5 km from the Defense Housing Authority (DHA) Phase III, 6 km from Bahria Town Phase VIII, 13 minutes from GT Road, 11 km from T-Chowk Rawat, and 13 km from the Giga Mall.

The site is 26 km from the Gulberg Green and 31 km from the New Islamabad International Airport. Moreover, it is 36 km from the Zero Point Islamabad.

Price of Farmhouse Plots for Sale on Installments

You can book these 03 and 06 Kanal farmhouse plots on a 01-year easy installment plan under the following price:

Plot Price on Cash Payment

You can get these 03 and 06 Kanal Farmhouse plots at a decent discount for cash payment. To know about the cash price, you can contact the marketing team of the Property Naama Group or visit our office.

Availability of Farmhouse Plots

This was the gated community of a total of 90 plots. Only 03 farmhouse plots are left unsold. There are 02 plots of 03 kanal size and 01 plot of 06 kanal size in the inventory.

Why Should You Invest in These Farmhouse Plots?

Before making any investment decision, you should analyze the property in every aspect. Here are some convincing reasons to invest in these farmhouse plots:

1. Social Status

Owning a farmhouse will give you a social status representing an elite and exceptional class of society.

2. Private Space

Having a farmhouse plot will allow you to live in your private space. It will be away from pollution and the surging population of the city.

3. Entertainment and Leisure Time

You can enjoy your leisure moments in your farmhouse, such as BBQs on the weekend, family get-togethers, and more.

4. Capital Appreciation

The location of these farmhouses is 11 km away from the Ring Road Rawalpindi. You will get a good appreciation for your investment. Moreover, you can resell your plot through the Property Naama Group.

5. Cost-Effective Product

These farmhouse plots are available at affordable prices. For example, you can get a 03 kanal registry/Inteqal plot in 150,00,000/- PKR. On the other hand, at the same price, you can get only a 10-Marla plot in Bahria Town Rawalpindi and Top City-1 Islamabad.

6. Ownership of Plot

After complete payment, you will get the plot’s official ownership (Registry/Inteqal). It is a legitimate property.

7. Ready Community

pages.title: FGEHA to Build 12000 Apartments in Various Cities
pages.content:
FGEHA to Build 12000 Apartments in Various Cities

Federal Government Employees Housing Authority (FGEHA) has recently announced to build around 12000 apartments in the different cities of Pakistan. FGEHA has already acquired the requisite land for the construction of these residential apartments. Moreover, they also completed the design work for the apartments.

The registration for these apartments is now open for the employees of the federal government. Applicants will be entertained on first come first serve basis. The last date to get registered is the 14th of February 2020.

Development of FGEHA Apartments – All Details

The requisite land for the construction of these 12000 apartments is already acquired. Further, the construction work on these projects will begin in the next 2 to 3 months.

FGEHA has all finalized its plan and the further developmental details are:

Skyline Apartments (FGEHA), Main Boulevard Top City-1, Near New Islamabad Airport

Lifestyle Residency (FGEHA), Opposite to DHA Phase 9, 3 KM from DHA Phase 6, Bedian Road, Lahore

Indus Vista (FGEHA), Faisal Margalla City, B-17, Rawalpindi

Chaklala Heights (FGEHA), Chaklala Scheme 3, Rawalpindi

Membership and Quota Policy

The membership form is also available. You can easily download them from FGEHA website. Next, fill all the particular details and submit it at any branch of Bank of Punjab or Askari Bank along with Rs. 100,000/- membership fee by or before the given deadline.

The quota policy of FGEHA Apartments is:

RD Quota = 20% (Federal Government Servants Retired)

FG Quota = 56% (Federal Government Servants in Service)

DS Quota = 2% (Federal Government Servants having Major Disability)

WR Quota = 1% (Federal Government Servants Died after Retirement)

WS Quota = 3% (Federal Government Servants Died during Service)

AB Quota = 1% (Employees of Autonomous Bodies)

AW Quota = 1% (Widows of Employees of Autonomous Bodies)

AR Quota = 1% (Retired Employees of Autonomous Bodies)

Professional = 3.5% (In Service = 2.5%, Retired = 0.5%, Widow = 0.5%)

Constitutional = 3.5% (In Service = 2.5%, Retired = 0.5%, Widow = 0.5%)

HA Quota = 1% (Regular Employees of FGE Housing Authority)

HW Quota = 2% (Ministry of Housing & Works Employees)

However, more details about all of these quota categories is available in the membership form.

For any query and assistance, contact Property Naama Consultants!

pages.title: How to Buy a House with Zero Money?
pages.content:
How to Buy a House with Zero Money?

Like food, clothes, and other necessities of life, a house is also a basic necessity of every human being. However, due to high upfront costs, every individual can not afford to own a house. So, many people live in rental homes, which take a major part of their monthly income. Therefore, I will solve this and explain How to buy a house with zero money.

I have described a step-by-step guide to buying a house with limited resources without taking a bank loan. Please read through it!

What Does Mean by Zero Money?

“Zero Money” means you will build your house without an upfront cost, down payment, or a big amount of cash in advance. You will take the first step towards house building through available resources.

Cut Your Living Costs

You can reduce your living costs, such as food, clothes, outings, and utility bills. Through these little savings, you can collect a decent amount of cash in 2-3 years to start building your house.

Sale Your Unnecessary Asset

You can arrange an initial amount for house building by selling any of your assets that is currently not necessary for you. For example, sell your vehicle and use public transport for daily commuting. Moreover, you can sell an unused gold set of your wife or unnecessary house furniture to create house funds.

Take Advance Salary

You can also take an advance salary of 01 year or 06 months from your office to set out funds for house building. Using all the above methods, you can save a good amount of money in a 1-2 year time frame, which we will call “Zero Money” for house building. Now, use this money to take the first step towards your house building to buy a residential plot.

Step-by-Step Guide for How to Buy a House with Zero Money?

After saving a amount to build your house, you can make this happen by following these steps:

Step 1: Buy a Residential Plot

After arranging the good cash, now buy a residential plot. It is the first step towards building your house. Do not buy residential plots in a far-off location of your city or town where the price of land is significantly less compared to populated areas.

You can buy a small size 03, 04, or 05 Marla plot according to your family size and requirements.

Step 2: Start to Construct with DPC

After buying the plot for your house, the next step is to make a map of your home by yourself without giving any penny to a civil engineer. After that, lay down the Damp Proof Course (DPS) according to your map on the plot.

Step 3: Start Wall Construction

Now, after putting in DPC, wait for 06 months to 01 year for enough savings to start wall construction and other gray structures of your house. You can use old bricks or old steel from a broken house. It will reduce the cost of the basic structure of the house.

Step 4: Putting Lanter (Slab)

After the four walls and other basic structures, you have to put a lantern (Slab) on these walls. For this purpose, you should wait again for 6 months to 1 year and save money. During this period, buy slab ingredients such as steel, cement, and sand to make a PRC mixture. After putting the slab, your house Is 80 % completed.

Step 5: Finishing Work

In the last step, complete the plaster coating, water, gas, electricity wiring, and other such work. After that, do woodwork such as doors, windows, cubits, kitchen cabins, and other finishing work.

Now, your house is almost ready to live. With your resources and gradual savings, you can build your house in 3-4 years without taking a bank loan. So, using this approach, you can get rid of rental houses and build your assets.

pages.title: How You Can Become a Tax Filer in Pakistan?
pages.content:
How You Can Become a Tax Filer in Pakistan?

In this blog, we are going to answer the question, How You Can Become a Tax Filer in Pakistan?

According to media reports, Pakistan has one of the world’s lowest tax ratios. In the country, there were only a total of 39, 25,497 active taxpayers till January 2, 2023, as per the official website of the FBR.

Owing to these poor tax collections, Pakistan has always been in a state of economic crisis. Being a responsible citizen, it is our basic duty to regularly file our tax returns and pay our taxes.

Read this blog till the last line to become an educated citizen of the land of pure.

Who is a tax filer?

Any individual or organization is liable to submit a tax return to the government thereby declaring their income and subsequent taxes for the given year.In Pakistan, you have to comply with the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) for fulfillment of the tax duty.

How does it work?

The taxpayer provides all the information in his/her tax return which FBR uses to calculate tax upon him. Prior to filing a tax return, you have to register yourself as a taxpayer on the FBR portal.

Afterward, you will be awarded a registration ID popularly known as a National Tax Number (NTN).

How you can check the filer status?

Here is a list of steps to follow, to check your filer status on the official website of the FBR.

Step 1: Check your eligibility

First of all check, either your income bracket is eligible for a tax or not. For this purpose, you can consult a tax professional or can visit the official website of FBR.

Step 2: Put yourself on the FBR record

This involves filling out a registration form and submitting it with mandatory documents such as:

You can submit this application by hand or can apply online through the FBR website.

Step 3: Obtain an NTN

Upon successful registration as a filer, you will be issued a unique registration number called as NTN. The NTN will be used for all your future transactions with the FBR.

Step 4: File your tax return

Now you are all set to file your tax returns. Having registered with FBR as a taxpayer, now you have to regularly file your tax returns.The due date to file tax a return is usually, the end of June of every financial year.

pages.title: Last Chance for Files Activation in Lahore Smart City
pages.content:
Last Chance for Files Activation in Lahore Smart City

Today, we bring your attention to a matter of paramount importance; which is the last chance for files activation in Lahore Smart City. Reading this blog is a mandatory activity for you if you are an investor in Lahore Smart City.

Public notice amid Last Chance for Files Activation in Lahore Smart City

Files on 10 % till 30 June 2022 were canceled in the month of January 2024. However, many have not taken this announcement of cancellation seriously. They anticipated that it would be extended and they failed to deposit 10 % confirmation along with two installments.

In good faith, we have adopted a client-friendly attitude at the request of members and sales partners. We are again giving a last chance to all those members whose files have been canceled due to non-payment. All these members have failed to submit their confirmation amount along with two installments.

Now all these members are advised to submit their undischarged dues along with two installments by 4th March 2024 to activate their files.

Please consider this as a final chance to avoid any cancellation.

Potential Consequences to not avail Last Chance for Files Activation in Lahore Smart City

If a client fails to meet the last deadline to discharge his dues, he may face the following potential consequences.

Loss of investment

The customer may lose the money already paid towards the plot as part of the installments. This could include any initial down payment or previous installments made.

Forfeiture of Rights

The cancellation of plot allotment typically means that the customer forfeits their right to the specific plot they had chosen. The housing society may now be free to reassign or resell the plot to another buyer.

Financial Penalties

Depending on the terms and conditions of the purchase agreement, there may be financial penalties. Additionally, there may be extra charges associated with the cancellation of the plot File. These could further contribute to the financial loss for the customer.

Impact on Credit Scores

If the purchase involved any form of financing or credit, the cancellation and failure to meet payment obligations may negatively impact the individual’s credit score. This could have repercussions on their ability to secure loans or financial agreements in the future.

Legal Consequences

The housing society may have the right to take legal action to recover outstanding payments. Moreover, they can go for the enforcement of the terms of the agreement. This could result in additional legal costs for the individual.

Reassessment of Housing Options

The individual will need to reassess their housing options. This may involve looking for alternative residential plots or exploring other housing arrangements. It may turn into a more challenging situation depending on their financial situation.

pages.title: Low Cost Apartments for Sale in Rawalpindi
pages.content:
Low Cost Apartments for Sale in Rawalpindi

Do you want to buy an apartment but have a tight budget? Do not stress! I have a solution. The Property Naama Group is presenting low cost apartments for sale in Rawalpindi.

You can get apartments on cash and an easy installment plan. I will share the pricing, location, and other details of 01 and 02-bed apartments in Bahria Town Rawalpindi, Umar Mall and Apartment, and Umar District Tower. You can get the complete information in the blog.

What Should You Look for in an Apartment?

The lower cost of an apartment does not guarantee its profitability. Instead, you must look for these essential requirements before investing:

01 Rentable Property

Choose an apartment that you can easily rent out. Therefore, always buy an apartment in a populated area to attract more tenants. In this way, you can make your real estate investments worth it.

02 Resaleable Apartments

Buy an apartment that you can easily resell after 2-5 years. It will only happen if the apartment has a good location and is in the best condition.

03 Construction Quality of Apartment

Buy an apartment that has good construction quality. If there are cracks, seepage, or poor finishing of walls, do not buy this property. It shows that it has lower-quality construction.

Additionally, check the quality and installation of doors, windows, and kitchen cabinets. A better construction quality will ensure a longer life of a property and better returns.

04 Property Ownership and Legal Documentation

Make sure that the apartment you are buying is a legitimate property. It must have a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the relevant authorities.

Additionally, you can easily get its legal ownership transferred to your name. For example, if you buy an apartment in Bahria Town, you get its ownership rights through Bahria Transfer.

05 Provision of Basic Facilities

Ensure that the apartment has basic amenities, such as water, electricity, gas, and sewage. Additionally, the apartment must have its designated parking. Moreover, the building should have 24/7 security. Efficient provision of these basic facilities is an essential requirement for leasing your property on rent.

Do not get fooled by a cheap price tag. Instead, ensure that the property is legitimate, safe, and a good location. Proper due diligence will save you from big trouble in the future.

pages.content:
Most Famous Localities to Buy Plots in Islamabad

The real estate market of Islamabad has been on the boom since the past few years. The people are buying properties on renting and purchasing as well because they prefer to own their houses rather than staying in rented houses. The demand for plots in various localities of Islamabad is increasing day by day and the real estate agents have to come up with this situation so that they could keep their clients happy. So, here we are sharing some information about the most famous localities in Islamabad from where you can buy plots at good prices and reasonable prices as well.

Bahria Town Islamabad

Bahria Town is one of the most famous localities to buy plots in Islamabad. It is a gated community with its own security and amenities, and is located close to the airport and major highways. The prices of plots in Bahria Town have been steadily increasing, making it a good investment for the future. If you’re looking for a place to call home in Islamabad, Bahria Town should definitely be at the top of your list!

7 Wonders City Islamabad

Seven wonders city Islamabad is one of the contemporary yet unique housing societies in Islamabad. Moreover, this housing society is unique because it intends to develop seven replicas of the seven wonders of the world within a gated community. As a result, future residents and investors will be able to enjoy a great living experience. As a result, investing here will be a rewarding experience. This housing society is located near the CPEC-Ring Road Interchange and M2-Motorway (Lahore-Islamabad).

Kingdom Valley Islamabad

Kingdom Valley is one of the most famous localities to buy plots in Islamabad. It is a luxurious residential area with all the modern facilities that you can think of. The prices of plots here are quite high, but it is worth it if you can afford it. There are many different sizes and types of plots available, so you can find one that suits your needs. If you are looking for a place to call home, Kingdom Valley is the perfect choice.

Capital Smart City Islamabad

As a result of the growing housing demand in the twin cities, FDHL plans to build a quality housing project on M2 Motorway near New Islamabad International Airport along the eastern route of the CPEC project. Pakistan’s Capital Smart City wants to become the first smart city in the country and a model for sustainable urban development. It is one of the most famous localities to buy plots due to its central location and proximity to all major landmarks of the city.

Blue World City Islamabad

Blue World City is one of the most famous localities to buy plots due to its convenient location and affordable prices. The society offers a variety of amenities to its residents. Making it an ideal place to live for families and working professionals. With a number of schools, hospitals, and shopping malls in close proximity, Blue World City is surely the place to be!

Park View City Islamabad

If you’re looking for a place to buy a plot in Islamabad, Park View City is a great option. This locality is famous for its scenic views and proximity to major parks, making it a desirable location for buyers. Plus, with new development projects underway, Park View City is only getting more popular.

Rudn Enclave Islamabad

Rudn Enclave is one of the most famous and well-known localities of Islamabad. It is known for its beauty, serenity, and peaceful environment. The area is also popular for its excellent security and infrastructure. Moreover, Rudn Enclave is situated close to all the major amenities of the city which makes it an ideal place to live in.

pages.title: Difference between Plot and Apartment Investment in Real Estate
pages.content:
Difference between Plot and Apartment Investment in Real Estate

Embarking on a difference between Plot and Apartment Investment in real estate requires a thoughtful choice between the potential of a vacant plot and the allure of a ready-made apartment.

Both options come with their unique set of considerations, and understanding the nuances can make all the difference. A plot of land beckons with promises of long-term development opportunities, while apartments offer immediate entry into the market.

In this dynamic landscape, investors must weigh factors such as market trends, regulatory compliance, and income stability. Join us to explore the intricacies of choosing between a plot and an apartment in the real estate investment.

Detail of Difference between Plot and Apartment Investment in Real Estate

Following are the potential differences between plot and Apartment investment

Type of Property

Investing in a plot comes only as a piece of land without any existing structure. The value of this investment often depends upon location, potential for development, and housing regulations.

The apartment investment gives you a residential unit within a multi-unit building or complex. Moreover, the apartment investment gives amenities and shared spaces to its investors.

Income Generation

Generally, plots of land do not generate immediate income unless you develop or sell it later. Income potential will come from appreciation over time or by developing the land for residential, commercial, or agricultural purposes.

The apartment can generate rental income if you choose to lease it out. The rental yield depends upon factors such as location, amenities, and demand for rental properties in the area.

Maintenance and Upkeep

Land typically requires less maintenance compared to developed properties. However, you might need to incur the costs of securing the land, clearing vegetation, and complying with local regulators.

Apartments come with ongoing maintenance costs, such as property management fees, repairs, and possibly homeowners association (HOA) fees.

Appreciation Potential

The value of land can be appreciated over time, especially if the surrounding area experiences growth and development. However, it’s subject to market conditions and local factors.

Apartments also have the potential for appreciation, influenced by factors like location, neighborhood development, and market demand.

Development Opportunities

Investing in a plot provides you with the opportunity to develop the land based on your plans, subject to local zoning regulations.

While you may not have the same level of control over the entire building, you can make interior modifications to your apartment. However, major structural changes may be subject to society rules.

Market liquidity

Land can be less liquid than developed properties. Finding a buyer for a specific piece of land may take time, as it depends on market demand and the potential use of the land.

Apartments can be more liquid as there is an established market for buying and selling residential units. The demand for apartments is often influenced by factors such as location, amenities, and the overall real estate market.

Population Flux

Plots can be in both populated and non-populated areas. It depends on the level of investment and other factors.

Apartment usually comes in an area with a higher population due to its rental income considerations.

To make the long story short, the choice between investing in a plot of land and an apartment depends on various factors, including your investment goals, risk tolerance, and the specific characteristics of the property and market.

Both options have their advantages and challenges. A well-informed decision requires careful consideration of these factors in the context of your overall investment strategy.

pages.title: Plot Vs File: What is the Best Option for Investment?
pages.content:
Plot Vs File: What is the Best Option for Investment?

In the real estate market, there has always been a debate about the best option for investment, a plot or a file. Both options have their unique pros and cons. But, it largely depends on the choice and financial condition of the buyer to which one chooses. I will explain the key differences between a plot and a file to make it easy for you to decide on investment. Let’s read the blog.

What is a Plot?

A plot is an on-ground piece of land allocated by a legitimate owner and open for possession. It is a touchable asset with a specific boundary and location.

What is a File?

It is a claim document specifying a future land entitlement in a specific residential society. It does not have a well-defined location or boundary.

Difference Between a Plot and a File

I have outlined the major differences between a plot and a file. You can decide based on these points that either a plot is the best investment for you or a file.

A Tangible Asset

A plot is a tangible asset you can visit and touch. But a plot file is not a touchable asset. It is just a documented property that does not exist in reality.

Ease of Liquidity

You can easily convert a ready-to-possession plot with a good location into cash, but not a file. It will take more time and effort.

Stability

A plot is a stable property that has appreciated over the years. On the other hand, a file is a volatile commodity whose prices can easily decrease or increase with time.

Upfront Investment

A file needs a low upfront investment. For example, you can buy a plot file with a payment of just 10 % of the total value of a plot. The initial cost for a ready plot is always high. You may need to pay the full amount of the plot at the time of purchase.

Impact of Speculations

Market speculations have a higher impact on the file than the plot. Real estate marketing companies and societies sell files with big promises and less practical work. While the plot needs actual development work on the site for its sale.

Payment of Tax

You do not need to pay a tax on a file. However, a plot needs different kinds of property taxes on a plot.

Matter of Dependency

When you buy a plot, you become a legitimate owner of this property and do not depend on anyone. In the case of a file, you do not have ownership rights and become dependent on the developer for a return on your investment.

Difference of Profitability

A file gives more profits than a plot because you buy a file in the initial phases of a residential society. So, it appreciates with a huge capital gain after some time.

The extent of Risk Factors

It is easy to commit fraud in the file because the supply of files is abundant, and you can not check the locality and physical presence of property mentioned in the file.

On the other hand, due to the location and on-ground availability of the plot, there are fewer chances of scams. Therefore, investment in the file is risky compared to a plot.

Conclusion

Whether you opt for a plot or file. It depends on your future goals, financial condition, market understanding, and other factors. Please remember that a good or bad real estate investment can lead you financially up or down over the next years. Therefore, take the advice of a real estate consultant before investing.

Our Email address: Info@propertynaama.com

pages.title: Plots for Sale in DHA Peshawar
pages.content:
Plots for Sale in DHA Peshawar

Exploring the real estate market of Peshawar city through navigating the plots for sale in DHA Peshawar in detail. The official announcement year for Defense Housing Authority (DHA) Peshawar is year 2014. Likewise, the official launching year of the project is 2016 ; after legislative intervention from the Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KPK) constitutional Assembly. Actually, the law which gives legal cover to this project is the Defense Housing Authority Peshawar Act 2009.

pages.title: property tax on file | Complete Overview | How to Pay Tax
pages.content:
The conception of property tax on the file

Property tax is a steady and foreseeable source of revenue for the government since it is based on the value of the real estate, which tends to change bit-by-bit over time as, contrary to the sales and the income tax, which can swing more dramatically with economic conditions. This information blog (3 Minutes 14 seconds reads) is committed to educating readers about prevailing property tax policies and practices in the country.

Is property tax applied on the file?

Property tax is not applied on the file; instead, it is applied on possession or ownership. The property which has a good tax record is considered to be a legal property; otherwise, it will be considered an illegal/Black Asset.

How does a Property File become a Possession?

When you start paying Installments of the property after the balloting, then gradually ownership and possession of the property get transferred to your name.

Let’s understand these real estate terminologies.

What is a Plot File?

The documented assurance, to a particular property investor, about a piece of land which have a certain size and location, in the existing housing society in a specific area.

What is the Balloting?

The process of allocating the plot numbers in a specific real estate project to the upcoming buyers. It is a luck-based draw among several applicants for a particular plot.

Property Tax Policy; A brief overview

Following are the three generalized tax categories that fall under the property tax in Pakistan.

Capital value tax (CVT)

Any tax which is applied on the sale and transfer of any immovable (Plot, House, Commercial Buildings, etc.) Property is called capital Value Tax. The rate of the Capital value tax (CVT) is determined by the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR). It can be varied, depending on the type of property being sold or transferred and the declared value of the property. According to the Federal Act of 2006, the property tax on the sale and transfer of immovable property will be 2 % for the filer. It will be charged at the rate of 7 % to the Non-Filer.

Who decides the value of the taxable Immovable property?

The Capital value tax (CVT) is always applied only on the DC-Deputy Commissioner rate (of the specified District /area). Tax is not applied on the rate of the property, decided by the Housing Society.

Withholding tax (WHT)

The tax which is to be paid at the time of making a property deal (When you are scheduling the sales deeds) is called Withholding tax. It is paid by the purchaser of the property before the transfer of the possession/ownership rights. The revised Withholding tax rate after the federal Budget 2022-23 for the entire three segments of the real estate sector is applicable from July 1, 2022. The revised rate is as follows;

Capital gain tax (CGT)

The tax which is imposed on the profit earned by sales of a capital asset is called the Capital gain tax.

After the revision in the federal Budget 2022-23, the Capital gain tax for all three segments of the real estate sector is applicable as;

Who is exempted from the property tax?

According to the Federal Act of 2006, if your property falls in any of the below-mentioned categories, you are exempted from property tax.

About Rebates

Rebates are the incentives that government lays out to taxpayers as per their will.

For instance, the Punjab government used to rebate an amount equivalent to 5 % of the tax amount for paying the tax on time and in a lump sum. The purpose is to ensure well-timed and orderly tax collection.

Mandatory Disclaimer

The tax valuation rates used in this blog are just a precedent, taken from the government website. We do not guarantee their accuracy. The examples are only used to guide the readers, so please consult the relevant authorities for up-to-the –minute’s tax rates.
pages.summary: property tax on file . Complete Details On how To Pay the Tax on Property Files . Read this Blog for complete details about tax.

pages.title: Recent Developments in Umar Mall and Apartments
pages.content:
Recent Developments in Umar Mall and Apartments

The groundbreaking ceremony for Umar Mall and Apartments occurred on October 10, 2023. Fast forward to May 2, 2024, and the project has seen remarkable infrastructural progress. This blog will delve into the detailed development updates of Umar Mall & Apartments.

If you have invested in this project or are considering doing so, this article is a must-read.

Current Development Progress at Umar Mall and Apartments

The ground floor is ready with high-quality gray structure work.

The concrete framework for the roof and floor is complete.

The RCC roofing (Lanter) for the mezzanine floor is ready.

The third floor of the building is final in terms of grey structure.

The column concrete work is at the final stage on the fourth floor.

Features a 60-foot wide access road.

Opens onto a 240-foot wide road.

Construction Progress at Umar Mall and Apartments

Roof Pillars: Roof pillars measuring 2.5 x 2.5 feet are complete.

Retaining Wall: A shared retaining wall has been built from the lower ground floor basement to the top floor. This wall provides earthquake protection and minimizes potential damage.

Emergency Facilities: An emergency stairway, regular stairs, and an elevator will ensure residents’ safety during emergencies. The elevator space will accommodate a large number of people.

Ground Floor Space: The inner space between the rooftop and the floor on the ground floor will be approximately 11 feet after finishing.

Quality Assurance in Construction

Our field engineering team samples every material mixture before implementing RCC. These samples undergo rigorous testing in government-authorized laboratories. Only materials that meet satisfactory standards are part of the construction.

The Pounds Per Square Inch (PSI) for RCC roofing and flooring is 3000 across all floors. For the columns, the PSI ranges between 3500 and 4000.

The steel, sourced from PAK STEEL, is tested at the University of Engineering and Technology (UET) Taxila’s engineering laboratory. We are currently using 60-grade steel for our project.

Merging offer in Umar Mall and Apartment Faisal Hills

If you have a file of a residential or commercial plot or possession of a plot but are not satisfied with this property.

Here is the list of criterion heads, shortlisted by investment consultants at Property Naama Consultants. They are advised to consider before investing in commercial real estate.

Financial Ventures

Ideally, a top commercial area should be surrounded by an optimum level of economic activity. For Instance, in Karachi Pakistan, the area known as Clifton has noteworthy numbers of commercial sites such as retail shops, restaurants, and banks.

Easy Approachability as a Selection Criteria to invest in a commercial area

Approachability with ease is a top secret to making a site commercial hub. To give an example, the Gulberg area in Lahore is particularly known for its easy ingress from 360 locations.Its well-maintained roads and streamlined public transportation routes make it a win-win destination.

Divergence in Commercial Activity

A variety of businesses attracts multiple social class individuals, so, it should be the next notable feature of a commercial hub.To illustrate, the area of Liberty Market in Lahore is familiar with varied types of business places.

Elevated Prices of Commercial Property as a Selection Criteria to invest in a commercial area

Commercial property in demand is also another sign of an area with high commercial activity. As an illustration, the Blue area in the Capital City of Pakistan is a place of elevated rental and property values.

An area with high employment opportunity

As a rule of thumb, high business activity will ultimately create high employment opportunities. Similarly, this fact can be witnessed in the case of an area in Karachi.

Considering as an example, I.I. Chundrigar Road Karachi, which is a prime business district of the city of lights. A huge number of business offices and financial institutions are creating multiple jobs every year.

Infrastructural Development as a Selection Criteria to invest in a commercial area

Support of City District Government

Better market policies and local municipal plans play a key role in business generation and its expansion. Likewise, City District Government business policies can also play an important role in leading business activities.

Law and order condition as a Selection Criteria to invest in a commercial area

Better law and order condition plays a key role in shortlisting the booming commercial hub of a city. Talking, for instance, areas like F-7 Islamabad are known for comparatively better security conditions.

Client Demographics

Who Should Avail of this Offer?

It is an exit offer by the administration of society for all those people who are passing through one of these situations:

Want to Change Your Block

You may have invested in a backward block of New Metro City Gujar Khan, such as C Block or Awami Block. You are unsatisfied with your investment and want to shift your plot into a good block.

Adjustment of Different Files in a Single Plot

Another reason may be that you have booked more than one file. Now, you can not pay installments for all of them. Now, you want to adjust all these files against a single plot.

A New Buyer in New Metro City Gujar Khan

You may be a beginner and want to invest in residential or commercial plots in society. In any of these situations, parking your hard-earned investment in the Overseas Block of New Metro City Gujar Khan is the best option.

What is the Offer?

Under this offer, you can shift your previous investment (One or more files) from any block to an overseas block. You can get 07, 10, and 14 Marla-ready residential plots and 08 Marla Commercial plots in Overseas Block by giving paid files and balance payments in cash to New Metro City Gujar Khan.

For Commercial Plots in New Metro City Gujar Khan
