pages.title: Shop or Apartment
pages.content:
Shop or Apartment: What is the Best Option for Real Estate Investment?

In real estate investment, choosing between a shop or apartment is one of the most common confusion investors face. Both options have unique benefits and challenges, catering to different financial goals, risk appetites, and market conditions. Shops often promise higher rental yields and rapid growth in bustling commercial areas, while apartments offer steady income, lower risk, and broad tenant appeal.

But which is the right choice for you? In this blog post, we’ll explore the pros and cons of both investment types, analyze their potential returns, and help you make an informed decision based on your investment objectives.

What is a Shop Investment?

It involves buying commercial space in a HiRISE commercial building or market to generate rental income or long-term capital gain. These commercial spaces are for retail stores, offices, and service-related shops.

What is an Apartment Investment?

It is investing in a residential unit in a residential building to generate a rental yield or capital appreciation. This investment option has stable income potential and wider market demand.

Pros and Cons of Investing in a Shop

Investing in a shop is a lucrative opportunity, but like any real estate venture, it has unique advantages and challenges. Here’s a detailed breakdown:

Pros of Investing in a Shop

Higher Rental Income Potential

Shops typically offer higher rental yields than residential properties, especially in high-demand commercial areas. Businesses are willing to pay a premium for prime locations.

Long-Term Lease Agreements

Shops often attract long-term tenants, such as businesses or franchises, providing stable and predictable income.

Inflation Hedge

Commercial lease agreements often include provisions for periodic rent increases, protecting your income from inflation.

Rapid Value Appreciation in Growing Areas

Shops in emerging commercial hubs or high-footfall areas tend to appreciate faster due to increased demand.

Cons of Investing in a Shop

High Initial Investment

Shops often require a higher upfront cost than apartments, especially in prime commercial areas.

Economic Sensitivity

The success of a shop depends on the local economy. Economic downturns, reduced consumer spending, or changes in business trends can negatively impact rental demand.

Maintenance and Renovation Costs

Shops may require frequent upgrades or renovations to meet tenant needs or comply with business regulations.

Limited Liquidity

Selling a shop can take time, as the buyer pool for commercial properties is smaller than for residential properties.

Dependence on Location

The success of a shop investment is highly dependent on location. Poorly chosen locations can lead to low demand and reduced returns.

Is a Shop Investment Right for You?

Pros and Cons of Investing in an Apartment

Investing in an apartment is a popular choice for individuals seeking a relatively stable and low-risk real estate investment. However, like any investment, it comes with both advantages and challenges. Read a detailed breakdown here:

Pros of Investing in an Apartment

Steady Rental Income

Apartments provide consistent rental income due to the continuous demand for housing. The tenant base will have students, professionals, families, and retirees.

Lower Initial Costs

Apartments generally have lower purchase prices than commercial properties, making them more accessible to first-time investors.

High Liquidity

Apartments in urban or high-demand areas are easier to sell. They offer quicker liquidation compared to shops or other commercial properties.

Lower Risk of Vacancy

The demand for residential housing is less affected by economic fluctuations, reducing the risk of prolonged vacancies.

Personal Use Option

Investors can choose to live in the apartment or offer it to family members if needed.

Appreciation Potential in Growing Areas

Apartments in rapidly developing or urbanized areas often see steady capital appreciation over time.

Cons of Investing in an Apartment

Lower Rental Yields

Rental income from apartments is often lower compared to commercial properties like shops.

Slower Capital Growth

In some markets, the value of apartments appreciates slower than commercial properties.

Market Saturation

In areas with high apartment construction, rental prices, and occupancy rates may decrease due to oversupply.

Is an Apartment Investment Right for You?

Buy Shops and Apartments From Property Naama Group

Property Naama Group has reasonable options for Shops and Apartments in its various HiRISE residential and commercial projects in Pakistan and UAE.

Umar Mall and Apartment

It is a HiRISE project in Faisal Hills with 100 % gray structure ready. You can buy a shop and apartment in a 2-year installment plan.

Umar District Tower

It is an upcoming HiRISE commercial and residential project in the Business District of Bahria Town Rawalpindi. You can book your shop and apartment in this project on the 3-year easy installment plan.

Umar Riveria Bahria Town Rawalpindi

This is our state-of-the-art project in Bahria Town Rawalpindi in front of Property Naama Group Head Office. The shops and apartments are completely ready for possession. You can get the keys to the shop or apartment in a 01-year installment plan.

Umar Residencies Muree

It is our unique project in the lush green hills of Muree. You can book a hotel service apartment with an easy installment plan. Its development work is in progress.

Umar Tower 2 Ajman UAE

Do you want to buy a shop or apartment outside of Pakistan? Then Umar Tower 2 Ajman UAE is the best option. You can book a 1BHK or 2BHK apartment or shop on 02 years installment plan.

Note: These are ready or near-to-ready projects without the involvement of a property file. You will get possession of these shops and apartments on a pre-established deadline.

pages.title: Should You Choose a Studio or One Bed Apartment? | Appartment
pages.content:
Should You Choose a Studio or One Bed Apartment?

Studio or one bed apartment? It’s the classic question that comes up when you start looking around at different apartments and trying to decide which one will be best for you to live in. Both have their advantages and disadvantages, so it’s hard to say which one you should choose; however, there are some factors that can help you decide if you’re struggling with this decision. This article will discuss those factors and provide advice on how to make the best choice for your lifestyle, your needs, and your budget!

Difference between a Studio and One Bed Apartment

A studio is a single, large room that typically serves as both the living and sleeping area, while a one bedroom apartment has separate rooms for each. Studios are usually cheaper than one bedroom apartments, but they may also feel more cramped. One bedroom apartments may be a better choice if you need more space or privacy.

Advantages of studios

Advantages of one bed apartments

Price Comparison

When it comes to price, studios and one bedroom apartments can vary greatly. It all depends on the location, size, and amenities of the unit. In general, studios tend to be more affordable than one bedroom apartments. But this isn’t always the case, so it’s important to do your research before making a decision.

The choice is yours

pages.title: Things to Check Before Buying a Plot on Installments
pages.content:
Things to Check Before Buying a Plot on Installments

Buying a plot on installments is an affordable option. However, there have been several cases of fraud in property transactions. Therefore, I have listed things to consider before buying a plot on installments. Read the blog to learn more.

1. See the Location

Always buy a plot in a location with maximum infrastructural development and facilities. Ideally, it should have a settled population. It must have markets, schools, and hospitals nearby.

2. Verify Plot Ownership

Before booking a plot on installments, confirm the ownership of the land. Does the developer own the land? Ask for official ownership proof before paying the booking amount. You can verify the ownership from the land record office of the relevant tehsil/ district.

3. Conform NOC Status

It is always safer to invest in a registered housing society. Therefore, must check the NO-Objection Certificate (NOC) of the society you are going to invest in. The NOC approval from the government will ensure the provision of basic facilities: electricity, gas, water supply, and others.

4. Review the Developer History

Check the developer’s track record. If you are investing in a new residential society, A developer with a good history will always deliver the project on time. For example, Ch. Abudul Majeed is a credible developer. Therefore, Faisal Hills is safe to invest in.

5. Understanding the Hidden Cost

Do not focus only on the booking price. Instead, deeply understand the complete payment plan. Check the development charges and other hidden costs. After that, match this cost with your budget and then invest.

6. Price Comparison

Compare the plot price with other legitimate societies in the city. If they are offering a similar-sized plot at a low price, go for it.

Conclusion

Owning a plot through installment payment is a wise approach. It allows you to own land, leveraging the land developer’s finances. But you must verify the things to check before buying a plot on installments, like location, land ownership, and other details.

If you want to buy a legitimate plot on easy installments in any society of Pakistan, contact the marketing team of Property Naama Group.

pages.title: Umar Mall & Apartments Development Updates
pages.content:
Umar Mall & Apartments Development Updates

The earth-breaking ceremony of Umar Mall and Apartments was held on October 10, 2023, and now on May 2, 2024, the project has undergone a significant infrastructural development. In this follow-up blog, we will discuss the Umar Mall & Apartments Development Updates in detail.

Therefore, you should read this article, if you have invested in the project or are a potential investor.

Detail of Umar Mall & Apartments development updates

Here is the detailed description of up till now development activity in Umar Mall and Apartment.

The ground floor is 100% ready with quality gray structure work. Likewise, the concrete skeleton of the roof and floor of the lower ground floor is also completely ready. Moreover, the Reinforced Cement Concrete (RCC) roofing ( Lanter ) of the mezzanine floor is set to be completed shortly.

The lower ground floor of the Umar Mall and Apartments has a 60-foot wide opening road. There is a 240-foot wide road at the opening gates of the ground floor.

Distinctive aspects of construction

In the so far construction work, 2.5 x 2.5 feet roof pillars are constructed. Moreover, a shared retaining wall has been built from the lower ground floor basement.

This will continue to the last floor of the building. The core purpose of this wall is to provide earthquake protection to the building and minimize the potential damage.

There is an emergency stair in addition to regular stairs and an elevator to facilitate the residents in times of emergency. In the same way, there will be a wide space for the elevator to accommodate a large number of people. The ground floor inner space (Between the rooftop and floor ) will be approximately 11 feet after finishing.

This will provide a breathable living on the ground floor. Moreover, there is ample space left across the four walls of the building to allow a generous flow of air.

Description of construction quality in Umar Mall & Apartments development updates

If we talk about the quality of construction, our field engineering team took samples of every mixture of materials before RCC implementation.

This material is tested in government-authorized laboratories. After the receiver of satisfactory results, then the material is used for construction.

For instance, the Pounds Per Square Inch (PSI) for the RRC roofing and flooring is 3000 on every floor of Umar Mall and Apartments. Similarly, the PSI for columns in the building is around 3500 to 4000.

Likewise, the steel comes from PAK STEEL company and is tested in the engineering laboratory of the University of Engineering and Technology (UET) Taxila. Currently, 60-grade steel is being used in the construction work of our project.

Invest in Umar Mall and Apartments

In case you have not invested in the Umar Mall and Apartments and now want to invest. You can invest by paying just a 20 % down payment of the total value of the shop or apartment.

Moreover, you can go for a merging offer in our project. Under this offer, you can merge your least-performing property in our commercial project after settling the gap payment.

blogs.title: 07 Common Mistakes to Avoid Before Investing in Real Estate
blogs.excerpt: I have discussed here the 07 Common Mistakes to Avoid Before Investing in Real Estate. Read the blog to know the details.
blogs.content:
07 Common Mistakes to Avoid Before Investing in Real Estate

Real estate investment is a rewarding and common way to build wealth and assets, but it’s not without challenges. Many first-time property buyers lose their money and peace of mind due to some avoidable mistakes. To save you from these mistakes, I have listed 07 common mistakes to avoid before investing in real estate. Read the blog to know the details.

07 Common Mistakes to Avoid

You can reduce the risk of investing in real estate by following this simple advice and avoiding these common mistakes:

1. Title Verification

The first mistake people make when buying a property is not doing title verification. Always check the original ownership documents of property, such as registry and inteqal.

You can verify these documents from the housing society office and the official land record office. Always buy a property with legitimate ownership documents.

2. ConfirmingNOC

The second most common mistake property buyers make is not verifying the No Objection Certificate (NOC) of the society in which they are going to buy the plot. They only trust the seller’s words, which is not right. There are four kinds of NOC status:

3. Verifying Documents of a HiRISE Project

The third mistake property buyers make is that they do not check the documents of a HiRISE project they are investing in. Do not forget to verify the plot ownership, building layout plan, and construction approvals through the government departments. It will save you from potential fraud.

4. Market Research

The fourth mistake people make when investing in real estate is not doing market research. Instead, they invest based on the advice of people. There are two ways to do market research before investing in real estate:

Check property rates from multiple resources and consult the established real estate platform like Property Naama Group.

The second option is to do online research. Visit YouTube, Facebook, and other social media platforms and research the property rates in your desired areas.

5. Verifying the Credibility of the Developer

The fifth mistake is that people do not verify the credibility of the developer. Always check the credibility and track record of a developer before making a real estate investment with them. Asks these questions about the developer in the market:

6. Not Doing Due Diligence

The sixth most common mistake in real estate investments is skipping due diligence before investment in real estate. Always hire a professional lawyer to do due diligence on the property you are going to buy. It will save you from big trouble in the near future.

7. Investing with Friends and Family

The seventh most common mistake people make when investing in real estate is buying property based on the advice of friends and family.

It results in wrong investment decisions and fraud. Instead, they should buy a property through a credible real estate organization such as Property Naama Group.

These 07 common mistakes to avoid before investing in real estate will save your money, time, and peace of mind. Contact the marketing team of Property Naama Group to make safe property investments in Pakistan and the UAE.

blogs.title: 11 Reasons to Avoid Interest-Based Rental Income
blogs.excerpt: 11 Reasons to Avoid Interest-Based Rental Income may be beneficial for the owners but an unacceptable approach for the real estate market.
blogs.content:
11 Reasons to Avoid Interest-Based Rental Income

The current practice of interest-based rental income for HiRISE projects and other properties in the country may have some benefits for property owners during periods of low interest rates; it also comes with several disadvantages and difficulties. It leads to an unacceptable approach for the real estate market of the country.

In this informative blog, we will focus on the potential drawbacks of this practice. Read below the lines to get aware of this practice in detail.

The following are some disadvantages of interest-based rental income practice:

Unforeseeable Rental cost

The interest-based rental income in real estate projects can change with changing interest rates over time. These uncertainties make it difficult for tenants to bear the burden of unpredictable expenses.

Monetary load on tenants

In case of settled high-interest rates, the tenants would face higher payment liabilities for rent, posing stress on their sources. This would result in high tenant turnover as they seek more economical investment options.

The dependent market

The economic factors greatly influence interest rates which may change over time. So, the real estate project depending on the rental income becomes vulnerable to several changes in the market, which results in more difficult financial projects and trends.

High-risk factors for property owners

Increased interest rates result in abnormal increases in property value which in turn decrease the demand for rental property resulting in reduced or zero rental income. Hence, this situation can put greater risks for property owners.

Complicated lease agreements leading to legal disputes

Real estate interest-based rental income requires very strong legal and financial acumen to draw a lease agreement. This often leads to complicated rental agreements which a layman cannot understand. These results in a scenario; where the tenant and owner of the property face off to disputes and legal fights.

The tenant would not be satisfied

Usually after some time of agreement, the tenant feels that this interest-based rental income is not fair. They feel like; they are being charged high without any potential benefit in exchange, and this feeling leads to the termination of agreement before time and dispute between the parties.

Difficulty in attracting tenants

The higher interest rates make it very difficult for the landlord or the property manager to attract potential tenants. In consequence, the property remains without the rental income or settled on reduced rents.

Negative public perception

Interest-based rental income may be labeled in a negative sense in the general public and media eyes. This could lead to a loss of market traction for the specific real estate project, leading to monetary loss as well as a deteriorated brand reputation for the developers.

Default Probability

In cases where the tenants struggle to make rental payments due to variations in the interest rates, there may be an increased risk of potential defaults for the property owners and the developers.

Predetermined rental income and inflation

The Predetermined rental income for a fixed time frame, would not keep up with ever-increasing inflation. The growing cost of living would compel the tenants to search for interest-free properties to streamline their daily life expenditures.

Carrying-on cost

In established practice, the landlords are in charge of repairing and maintaining the property. The high-interest rates would decrease the rental income; therefore, it would be a real struggle for the owners to cover the maintenance cost.

Islamic perspective of rental income

As per the teachings of Islam, interest-based financial arrangements are rigidly forbade because they are assumed usury (Riba) which is damaging to the social fabric of society. These Islamic teachings also extend to interest-based rental income.

As a religion Islam offers solutions to every problem in the world; so is true in the case of real estate rental income. The practice of interest-free financing and rental arrangements is widespread in the Islamic financial system and is called Islamic or Sharia-compliant finance.

Here are two models to deal the real estate rental income in an Islamic way:

Musharakah

This is a kind of partnership in which the property owner and tenant mutually buy a property. The tenant has to pay the rent and step by step purchase the property ownership shares until they assume the charge of sole proprietor of the property.

Ijarah

Ijarah is a lease-based agreement in which the property owner has ownership of the property and proceeds with a rental arrangement for a defined period. The rental amount would be pre-defined and would not change during the lease period.

blogs.excerpt: n this blog, brief description of 7E Tax on property in Pakistan has been described for the awareness of a layman.
blogs.content:
Brief Description of 7E Tax on Property in Pakistan

In this blog, brief description of 7E Tax on property in Pakistan has been described for the awareness of a layman.

Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) has recently issued a circular on its website regarding property tax on immovable property. This property tax is known as the 7E Statement in general.

A statement of brief description of 7E tax on property in Pakistan

Any property that has a market value of above PKR 250, 00,000/- will fall under jurisdictions of section 7E Tax. Furthermore, the taxpayer has to pay the tax on the difference value of price above PKR 250, 00,000/-.

For example, a property has a market value of PKR 3000, 00,000/- with a difference of PKR 50, 00,000/- from the tax-able limit. So, the taxpayer has to pay the tax on this difference value of PKR 50, 00,000/-.

Non-Applicability Criterion of Section 7E

Likewise, the proclamation of circular number 3 of section 7 E 2023 by FBR has reduced many procedural bars.

Brief description of 7E tax on property in Pakistan for prerequisites

In such cases the property deal the seller has to fulfil the following government provisions to the transferring authority.

Mandatory Note:

You can also obtain exemption certificates for different cases from FBR with ease now.

It is beneficial to note that the above-mentioned circular is valid only for an interim period until the development of an automated system for the purpose.

Exempted Ownerships Category of the section 7E

The following category of immovable property ownership is exempted from the section 7E of the Income Tax Ordinance 2001.

A brief description of 7E tax on property in Pakistan and FBR disclaimer

Here is clarification from FBR regarding the arrangements of this circular. This circular will not apply to the cases falling in the jurisdiction of the Lahore High Court under the Judgment in WP NO.52559 0f 2022 dated 06-04-2023unless the said judgment is revered, suspended, or vacated in an intra-court Appeal or by the Supreme Court of Pakistan.

blogs.content:
Ajman Property Transfer Process: Easy Guide 2025

The Department of Land and Real Estate Regulation (AjmanRe) supervises the property ownership transfer process. You need your original property title deed, your UAE ID, site plan, and fee submission. I have shared the required documents, a complete process, and the fee details of the Ajman property transfer. You can explore the complete details in the blog.

Required Documents for Property Transfer in Ajman

Whether you are an individual property owner or a business, you need to provide the following documents to transfer property in Ajman, UAE:

For Individual Owner

Note: These certificate requirements are only for real estate units.

For Businesses

Ajman Property Ownership Transfer Procedure

Individuals and businesses must follow a procedure to transfer their property ownership.I have listed these steps here for your convenience:

Step 1: Submit the property ownership transfer application, along with all required documents, through the E-services portal.

Step 2: The AjmanRe department will review your application and the documents. It will approve or reject the application depending on the set criteria. After application approval, both parties (Seller and buyer) will visit the AjmanRe head office to sign the property transfer contract.

Step 3: After that, pay the property ownership transfer fee.

Step 4: Your property ownership transfer is complete. You can receive the title deed, initial registration certificate, or registration certificate from the office of the Ajman Real Estate Department. You can also get these certificates online at home by visiting the UAE Pass wallet.

Property Ownership Transfer Fee in Ajman

The property ownership transfer fees are quite affordable in Ajman, UAE. You need to pay the following costs:

Transfer Fee:

You need to pay 0.125% of the property value, with a minimum charge of AED 2500.

Issuance Fee:

There is a fee of AED 300 for issuing a title deed, site plan, or ownership certificate for a real estate unit.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

How much time does a property ownership transfer process typically take in Ajman?

The AjmanRe departmental system is very efficient. So, the whole property ownership transfer will typically take 05minutes to complete.

Can a non-resident transfer property ownership in Ajman?

Yes, a non-resident can transfer property ownership in Ajman using a valid passport.

Where can I apply for property ownership transfer in Ajman?

You can send a property ownership transfer request through the AjmanRe E-Services Portal.

Conclusion

Transferring property ownership in Ajman is a systematic process that ensures legitimate practices and transparency. Whether you are a resident or non-resident, you can transfer property ownership easily by submitting the required documents and fees.

For further information and guidance, you can contact the customer support team of Property Naama LLC.

How Will it be Beneficial for Investors?

The exceptional transactions of $560.8 million in March 2025 for the real estate sector of Ajman are not just headlines. It shows a powerful trend that property investors and buyers should not ignore. Here is its meaning:

A City with the Best Real Estate ROI

You can buy property at a lower cost in Ajman than in Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Therefore, this city offers good returns on investment (ROI) with less investment capital.So, Ajman is becoming an investment hub.

Best Place for Small to Mid-level Property Investors

Due to its low initial capital requirement, Ajman City has become a favorite destination for several real estate investors. If you are a beginner or a small to mid-level property investor, the city will be a land of opportunity for you.

Increasing Demand for Rental Properties

The strategic location of Ajman near Dubai and Sharjah makes it ideal for people seeking rental properties. It is easy to commute and budget-friendly. The increasing interest of renters is making Ajman a highly demanding place. So. It is the best opportunity to invest in its real estate sector and earn winning profits.

Whether you want to buy a property in Ajman for rental income or capital gain, the March 2025 performance proves the right time to invest here. This city will be the next big destination for property investments.

Tips for Real Estate Investments in Ajman

Ajman is gaining traction for real estate investments, but investing wisely will always be rewarding. Therefore, I have listed here some practical tips for your ease:

Invest in High-Demand Areas

Always invest in areas with a good location and high demand. Look for projects near daily-life facilities such as healthcare, education, shopping centers, parks, and public transport. For instance, the location of Umar Residencies Ajman is 0 km from Sheikh M Bin Zayed Road. It is near all the required facilities for daily life.

Target Rental-Friendly Projects

Invest in rental-friendly projects with lower upfront costs. Choose 1BHK and 2BHK apartments with Hi-Rise projects. For example, Umar Tower 1 Ajman and Umar Tower 2 Ajman are the best projects considering this criterion.

Invest with a Long-term Approach

Invest with a long-term approach. Choose projects and properties that will be in demand in the future. These projects require lower capital and offer higher profits.

Local Trends and Market Demands

Follow local trends and market demands and invest accordingly. Invest in new infrastructure such as roads, shopping malls, industrial zones, and other facilities. Ajman may not be glamorous like Dubai, but it is the next big destination for parking your investments. It is the best city in the UAE to diversify your portfolio.

For instance, the location of Umar Residencies Ajman is 0 km from Sheikh M Bin Zayed Road. It is near all the required facilities for daily life.

Invest in rental-friendly projects with lower upfront costs. Choose 1BHK and 2BHK apartments with Hi-Rise projects. For example, Umar Tower 1 Ajman and Umar Tower 2 Ajman are the best projects considering this criterion.

3. Invest with a Long-term Approach

Invest with a long-term approach. Choose projects and properties that will be in demand in the future. These projects require lower capital and offer higher profits.

4. Local Trends and Market Demands

Follow local trends and market demands and invest accordingly. Invest in new infrastructure such as roads, shopping malls, industrial zones, and other facilities.

About the developers of Al-Kabir Orchard

A flagship project of Al-Kabir Developers, Al-Kabir Orchard, shaping the standards of modern living in the country. Excitingly, the Developers started their real estate development journey in the year 2016 with the construction of a single-building project.

Now, they have reached the climax of their success by shaping the communities for modern living. A continuous incorporation of new development ideas along with advanced technologies is their Unique Sales Proposition.

About date of Al-Kabir Orchard Balloting of 5 Marla plots in Sector A

Actually, the extended deadline for submission of outsourcing dues for sector A ,5 Marla plot balloting was January 15, 2024. Now the balloting ceremony will be held in due course of time after verification of balloting applications.

How does the Balloting Process Work?

As you know, the balloting process for plots is a usual practice in the real estate market of Pakistan. This process is usually adopted when there is a huge number of applications and fewer number of plots. In a nutshell, the balloting process comprises of following stems.

Application to acquire plot possession

All members who have bought plot files of the concerned society and are interested in receiving plots will submit an application. Moreover, the application can only be submitted in due course of time after fulfilling the required monetary criteria.

Verification of members

Meanwhile, the society administration will verify the eligibility of the applicants according to the established criteria. Indeed, the purpose of this verification is to transfer plots among society members on a merit basis.

The Balloting

Balloting is a process to allot residential and commercial plots to buyers in a housing society or a development project. Indeed, the execution of this process concerns the random selection of plot numbers given on the plot files. After the selection of plot numbers, the plot ownership rights are transferred to the names of selected members.

Transparency and fairness in the allocation of plot numbers is a basic requirement of the balloting process. That is why, the balloting process is executed in an open ceremony in front of all concerned society members.

Allotment of plot numbers

Consequently, the plot numbers are then allotted to the members whose names are selected through the balloting process.

Communication of Balloting Results

The balloting is usually done in an open event where all the concerned members are invited to witness the process. All those members who miss out on the ceremony are informed through phone calls, messages, and e-mails about their balloting results.

This established practice of balloting supports transparency and meritocracy in property dealing. Moreover, it fosters equality and lawfulness in the inception of housing society and development projects.

blogs.title: FPCCI
blogs.excerpt: Chairman and CEO. M.Ismail has been appointed member of the FPCCI Standing Committee on Youth Empowerment & Recognition for 2025.
blogs.content:
Appointment of M.Ismail as Member of Standing Committee on Youth Empowerment & Recognition (FPCCI)

Property Naama Group is proud to announce that its esteemed Chairman and CEO. M.Ismail has been appointed member of the Federation of Pakistan Chambers of Commerce & Industry (FPCCI) Federal Capital (ICT) Standing Committee on Youth Empowerment & Recognition for 2025.

This prestigious appointment highlights the dynamic leadership of Property Naama Group. Moreover, it showcases its unwavering commitment to fostering youth development, innovation, and entrepreneurship in Pakistan.

As the company continues to shape the country’s real estate landscape, this new role opens exciting avenues to inspire, support, and empower the next generation of business leaders—creating a positive change across industries and communities.

What is FPCCI?

The Federation of Pakistan Chambers of Commerce & Industry (FPCCI) is the highest body representing the business and trade community.

Since its establishment, this organization has been advancing economic growth, business innovation, and business relations with other countries.

Moreover, the organization has recognized problems in trade, industry, services, and investments. It also protects the interests of the private sector through constructive dialogues with the government.

Membership Structure of the FPCCI

The FPCCI has 284 Trade Bodies under its control such as:

About the Secretariat of FPCCI

The FPCCI has a state-of-the-art public secretariat under the control of the Secretary-General. The purpose of this secretariat is to perform all the above-mentioned functions.

What is the FPCCI Federal Capital (ICT) Standing Committee on Youth Empowerment & Recognition?

The Federal Capital (ICT) Standing Committee on Youth Empowerment & Recognition is a designated platform for the youth. Its purpose is to promote entrepreneurship in youth to support the country’s economy.

The committee creates opportunities for young professionals to start businesses and attain financial security. Its agenda includes skills development, organization of business mentorship programs, and designing business-friendly policy inputs.

M.Ismail’s Vision for Youth Empowerment

Ismail ( Group Chairman and CEO of Property Naama Group ) is a self-made young entrepreneur. He has always encouraged the youth through his videos and messages on YouTube and other social media platforms to follow his entrepreneurial footprints and attain financial liberty.

He will do this public service efficiently after he is appointed Member of the FPCCI Federal Capital (ICT) Standing Committee on “YOUTH EMPOWERMENT & RECOGNITION” for the year 2025.

As a Committee member, he has the vision to empower youth in the following way :

“Empowering youth isn’t just about providing resources; it’s about instilling confidence, nurturing creativity, and opening doors that may have otherwise remained closed.”

By implementing this vision, the Property Naama Group will fulfill its social responsibility of making a meaningful difference in the lives of young Pakistanis.

Impact of the Appointment on Property Naama Group

The appointment of M.Ismail (Chairman and CEO of Property Naama Group) to the FPCCI Federal Capital (ICT) Standing Committee on Youth Empowerment & Recognition marks a significant milestone for the company and the larger real estate and business ecosystem in Pakistan.

This prestigious role elevates Property Naama Group as a socially responsible and forward-thinking organization, reinforcing its commitment to nurturing talent and contributing to national development.

The company is uniquely positioned to bridge the gap between business innovation and social progress by having a direct voice in shaping youth empowerment policies.

Conclusion

Ultimately, this appointment underscores Property Naama Group’s belief that true business success goes beyond profits—creating opportunities and shaping futures. Long-live Pakistan!

blogs.content:
Blue World City Awami Green Block Development Charges

The Blue World City administration has recently announced development charges for its Awami Block. Some members have bought their plots earlier without paying development charges. However, the society has applied these charges at 150,000 rupees per Marla to cover the development cost. I have discussed these development charges and their payment schedule in detail. Read the blog to get the information.

Advantages of Development Charges on Cash Payment

You can make the cash payment of your development charges at Awami Block, Blue World City, Islamabad. Paying development charges in cash can give you these two benefits:

Discount

You can get a 20% discount on the lump sum payment of your development charges. For example, for a 3.5 Marla plot, you will pay only 420,000 rupees (Original charges 525000) after deducting the discount amount of 105000/-.

Plot Reallocation

If you pay the full payment of development charges in a lump sum, you can get a reallocation of your plot from an underdeveloped block to a fully developed block.

Installment Payment of Development Charges

If you do not have the full payment to pay development charges, you can pay them in installments. The Blue World City administration offers a 3-year easy installment plan for paying development charges. Here is a detailed payment plan for these development charges:

What is an APR Payment Offer?

Under the APR payment offer, you can pay your development charges in installments over a 3-year payment plan. However, you can receive a discount of up to 50% on your payment by paying through the APR policy. For this purpose, you will take the APR form on every installment and avail a discount of 2000-3000 rupees on every payment.

What is the Justification for these development Charges?

Development charges are a standard and logical cost in any well-planned and developed society. These charges show the investment made by the developer for the provision of facilities.

In Awami Block Blue World City, the society administration has already completed the major development work. This work includes:

Therefore, these development charges are not a fee. Instead, they are an investment to make your plots in the Awami Block more valuable and in high demand.

blogs.content:
WHY BAHRIA TOWN PESHAWAR LAUNCHING IS LATE? | Overview

BAHRIA TOWN PESHAWAR LATE?

The Bahria Town Peshawar launching, It’s a private limited real estate company that owns, regulates, and develops properties all over Pakistan. BAHRIA TOWN had tremendous success in Islamabad/ Rawalpindi, Karachi, Nawab Shah & Lahore projects, and has finally planned to launch the second largest project in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa after Karachi because of the emerging population and demand in the market. For more info Click HERE or the official website of Bahria Town Peshawar.

They chose Peshawar for the KPK project, to provide a luxurious but affordable standard of living. The amenities such as hospitals, an education line, 24/7 security, food courts, and top-notch infrastructure. Different malls and markets, golf and horse riding clubs, and much more are worth waiting for BAHRIA TOWN Peshawar to launch.

This shows that the start or mid of 2021 will bring good news to KPK residents.

REASONS FOR LATE LAUNCHING OF BAHRIA TOWN PESHAWAR

Following are the different reasons that led to the late launching of the Bahria Town Peshawar project:

Under-process NOC

The NOC is a No Objection Certificate issued by local authorities that allows the company or a person to purchase or construct a particular property. BAHRIA TOWN Peshawar needs NOC from different departments of KPK such as the water department, electricity department, gas/ oil department, and many more. Without the permission of this particular department, this project can’t proceed to its completion. Various news has disclosed that NOC for BAHRIA TOWN Peshawar is under process which is causing a delay in launching this project.

According to official news, on August 19, 2020, the Peshawar High Court has stopped the Director-General of Peshawar Development Authority from the issuance of NOC for BAHRIA TOWN Peshawar till 8 September 2020, but it has not been issued yet.

On-going Land Occupation

The master plan for BAHRIA TOWN Peshawar remained undisclosed but according to the management, it covered a large area of approximately 100,000 Kanals. It locates at Charsadda Road near Northern Bypass and M2 Expressway. BAHRIA TOWN Peshawar provides residential and commercial plots, homes, and apartments. The prices are higher but it is because of the high management and development costs.

COVID-19

Because of the COVID pandemic, the real estate market of Pakistan has had a very difficult time managing its projects. Everyone supposed BAHRIA TOWN Peshawar to launch in January 2020 and start its development. But, unfortunately, the most awaiting project of Bahria Town is still a hanging garden because of COVID-19. Authorities were sure that the situation will get normal in September 2020, but it didn’t happen either.

The roads, plots, gardens, clubs, parks, malls, and many more sites will be completed by mid of 2021. So, that the most awaiting project of BAHRIA TOWN can start the show. COVID-19 had a tremendous effect on the whole world shutting down various projects all over the world. But the founder of BAHRIA TOWN Group, Malik Riaz Hussain is pretty confident to launch this project soon in 2021. He motivated the citizens of Peshawar to “get ready” for it.

Why the launch of this project is delayed Click for Details.

blogs.content:
Bahria Town Peshawar Fraud Alert

Since the breaking of Bahria Town Peshawar launching news, several fraudulent and misleading individuals and agencies have become active in deceiving potential buyers in the name of advance or pre-launch booking.

This declaimer blog has been dedicated to the awareness of the general public about fraudulent activities in practice in Bahria Town Peshawar.

Here are some potential fraudulent activities that deceitful property dealers and real estate companies likely to practice:

Sales Campaign without an official launch

Fake dealers may falsely claim that the housing society is about to launch and start accepting pre-launch bookings from undeclared buyers. They might proclaim high discounts or unprecedented benefits to attract potential buyers to invest before the official launch of Bahria Town Peshawar.

Forged Claims of Authorization

Some new faces in the industry might deceitfully claim themselves as the authorized sales partners of Bahria town Peshawar, even when they have not visited the Bahria town Office once. They likely show fake documental proof or going to use counterfeit branding to deceive aspiring buyers.

Misleading Claims

Crooked dealers and realtors are likely to make false claims about the facilities, infrastructural development, and master planning of Bahria Town Peshawar to create a planted emergency in the market to entice the buyers for unplanned investment decisions

Fraudulent Advertisement Campaigns

You may witness fraudulent publicity material such as brochures, advertisements, promotional materials, and social media campaigns without the official permission of Bahria Town Peshawar administration to deceive the buyers.

Ghost Plots

As usual practice in the real estate market of the country, forged property dealers may be found claiming to provide plots and other real estate products in non-existing or undeclared areas of Bahria Town Peshawar.

The sole purpose of this counterfeit activity would be to collect money from potential investors with a plan to not deliver the promised product.

Non-Refundable Payments

Scammers might demand non-refundable deposits, processing, and booking fees for plots that do not officially exist or are allowed by Bahria Town Peshawar administration.

It will be extremely difficult for potential buyers to recover the money if the project is not delivered according to the planned way.

Identity Theft Bahria Town Peshawar Fraud Alert

Fake realtors and property dealers may imitate genuine real estate companies or representatives of established realtors to gain the trust of aspiring customers to withdraw fake deal money.

Bahria Town Peshawar Registration Form Fraud Alert

Administration has opened registration of Bahria Town Peshawar officially on September 08, 2023. Our public showed a great response to this registration and trusted the brand of Bahria Town.

With the launch of this registration drive, we witness a fraudulent activity in the market related to registration forms.

This blog is written to inform the general public and potential investors about Bahria Town Peshawar Registration Form Fraud Alert.

Considerations for Bahria Town Peshawar Registration Form Fraud Alert

Identification of Bahria Town Peshawar Registration Form Fraud Alert

Identity Sticker

You can identify with the help of an identity sticker. That Registration Form will have a sticker on the top right side of the form above the green dotted line.

The glittering logo of Bahria Town will be imprinted in this sticker which will change its shade upon tilting upside down. In the absence of this glittering sticker, consider it a fake Registration form and do not buy it.

Ineffective Online Verification

Another sign of Bahria Town Peshawar Registration Form Fraud Alert is the inability to verify the form online. Cross-check the form by scanning the QR code given in the middle of the form on the left side.

Entering from registration number on the verification portal of Bahria Town’s official website can also save you from potential fraud.

Buying from Unauthorized property dealers

Unauthorized property dealers offering this service raise a red flag pertaining to the Bahria Town Peshawar Registration Form Fraud Alert. Always seek an established and professional real estate firm such as Property Naama Group to initiate the registration process.

Suspiciously low price and Bahria Town Peshawar Registration Form Fraud Alert

Owing to the famous proverb, All that glitter is not gold, suspiciously low-priced registration forms can be a sign of fraud. No matter what do your mandatory verification before investing in the forms.

blogs.title: Best Investment in Pakistan Right Now
blogs.excerpt: Best Investment in Pakistan Right Now: Gold, Stock, or Property? I have shared a complete analysis in the blog.
blogs.content:
Best Investment in Pakistan Right Now: Gold, Stock, or Property?

Investing in any country, especially Pakistan, is not a smooth journey; it comes with different challenges. Choosing the right investment option depends on your budget, financial goals, and ability to take risks. In our country, people usually invest in gold, stocks, and real estate.

I will discuss the pros and cons of these investment options to make the best decision. Read the blog to know the details.

What Makes the Gold a Good Investment?

Gold is a safer investment option to fight future inflation. It remains comparatively stable during economic slowdowns. I have listed here some advantages and disadvantages of investing in gold for your better understanding:

Pros of Investing in Gold

Investing in gold offers numerous benefits. Some of these I have listed here :

A Secure Asset

Gold proves a stable asset during economic crises, thereby offering you financial security.

Protection Against Inflation

Unlike paper currency, its value increases. So, it is the best protection against rising inflation.

High Liquidity

You can easily purchase or sell it in local or international markets without significant cut or price loss.

Zero Maintenance Need

The gold does not need any maintenance, unlike other physical assets such as real estate.

Cons of Gold Investment

Although gold investment gives several benefits. It also involves the following cons:

No Passive Income

You do not get a passive income after investing in gold, unlike real estate.

Need Storage Security

Gold investment requires secure storage such as a locker or an insured wallet. So, it requires a security cost.

No Productive Use

Investing in gold does not provide any productive use. You can earn money only when it involves a shortfall in supply or demand.

Should You Invest in Gold?

Gold is the best investment in Pakistan right now for those who prefer security over passive income. It is not a better investment option for a better return on investment.

Stock Investment

Advantages of Investing in Stocks

Stock investment comes with several benefits. Out of these, I have listed some here :

Over time, stocks provide better returns compared to other assets and investment options.

Disadvantages of Investing in Stocks

Like other investment options, stock investments also have some disadvantages. These are here:

Requires Knowledge and Research

Successful investing demands a good understanding of the market, financial reports, and economic trends.

Risk of Capital Loss

Poor investment choices or market downturns can result in significant losses.

Is the Stock Market the Best Investment in Pakistan?

For investors with a moderate to high risk tolerance and a long-term growth mindset, the stock market can be the best investment in Pakistan, offering one of the most rewarding options.

Property Investment

Advantages of Property Investment

Property investment has several benefits. Some of these benefits are discussed here:

Stable, Tangible Asset

A physical investment that holds intrinsic value and isn’t as easily affected by short-term market swings.

Rental Income Potential

Property can generate consistent passive income through monthly rents, especially in high-demand areas.

Hedge Against Inflation

Property values and rental rates typically rise along with the cost of living.

Flexible Use

Can be used for personal living, business purposes, or redevelopment to boost value.

Disadvantages of Property Investment

Property investment also has some disadvantages. Some of these drawbacks are here:

High Initial Capital Requirement

Purchasing property requires significant upfront funds compared to stocks or gold.

Low Liquidity

Selling real estate can take months to years, depending on market conditions.

Market Risks

Prices can stagnate during economic downturns or political instability.

Maintenance Costs

Properties may require ongoing repairs, renovations, and upkeep, which can reduce net returns.

Location Dependency

The value and profitability of property heavily depend on location, infrastructure, and demand trends.

Is Real Estate the Best Investment in Pakistan?

For investors with high capital, patience, and a long-term outlook, real estate offers security, rental income, and lasting value.

However, its high entry cost, low liquidity, and location dependency make it less suitable for quick gains.

Conclusion

The best investment in Pakistan right now ultimately depends on your financial goals.

Gold offers security and stability, making it ideal for preserving wealth during uncertain times.

Stocks provide the potential for high returns and passive income through dividends, but require market knowledge and come with higher risk.

Real estate is a dependable long-term option that can deliver both appreciation and rental income. But it demands substantial initial capital and patience.

Best Place to Visit in Murree

Murree is one of the most visited hill stations in Pakistan. At first sight, Murree’s clouds hugging the mountains, draped in layers of greenery make one’s heart filled with happiness. Indeed, these picturesque sites enhance in the winter when regular snowfalls and cover Murree’s mountains with a beautiful white look that adds more to its natural beauty. So if you are planning to visit any place near Islamabad, Murree should definitely be on your list. We have compiled the best places you must visit in Murree on your next trip to Pakistan’s capital city. Take a look!

Best Places in Murree:

Following are the best places to visit in Murree:

Ghora Gali:

This area of Murree in northeast Punjab has a unique name, Ghora Gali. There is a wide range of hotels, resorts, and shops nearby to meet the needs of visitors to Ghora Gali, a mountain resort at 1690 meters on an escarpment. Food is one of the main attractions for tourists in these cities. A person can enjoy tasty food items at reasonable prices while enjoying the spectacular scenery.

Upper Topa and Lower Topa:

The Upper and Lower Topa in the district of Punjab are extraordinary places to visit in Murree. Their altitude is 7000 ft. It is a pleasing entryway to Murree. When the snow covers them in winter, tourists flock to these elevated areas for comfort. In summer, they enjoy the cool breeze.

Bhurban:

Bhurban is one of the favorite destinations for tourists, since they tire of the congested central boulevard. Tourists are drawn to the picturesque, five-star hotels, luxurious restaurants, and charming foliage of Bhurban. This spot is around 13 km away from Murree; and it connects Murree with Azad Jammu Kashmir.

Patriata (New Murree):

Kashmir Point:

Pindi Point:

Mall Road:

The interesting thing to do in Murree:

Things to do Murree:

Apart from hiking and walking, you can also ride the cable car of Ayubia and the chairlift of Patriata in Murree. Explore Kashmir Point and enjoy the most delicious and traditional food. Also, you can relax among Mall Road’s lush greenery and pick up some handicrafts. As well as the above, you can play with snowballs. Make balls and throw them at your friends.

Conclusion

In conclusion, Murree is an all-encompassing leisure spot with splendid excursions and recreational opportunities that will replenish your body and mind. Hopefully, after reading this article, you will know where to visit in Murree, with Malka e Koshar being a truly amazing place for all seasons. In other words, not only does the government is taking these steps to attract tourists, but these are places that you should consider for your future trips.

blogs.title: Biggest Cricket Stadium in Rawalpindi Pakistan | Location
blogs.excerpt: Pakistan Biggest Cricket Stadium in Rawalpindi. Cricket is one of the under-rated sports and is highly encouraged in Pakistan.
blogs.content:
Pakistan Biggest Cricket Stadium in Rawalpindi

Cricket is one of the under-rated sports and is highly encouraged in Pakistan. Every child in Pakistan is fond of becoming a player and is eager to show his or her passion. The availability of grounds and stadium is very few and youngsters are deprived of showing their passion and love for cricket. Even the matches of cricket are played in a confined stadium and limited spectators are allowed to see the match. There is already one cricket stadium in Rawalpindi and people eagerly went there to see the matches. So, by seeing the motivation and love for cricket, the government has taken up the actions to give the NOC for the construction of Pakistan’s biggest cricket stadium.

Approval and Construction of Cricket Stadium

The approval has been given for the construction of Pakistan’s biggest stadium on an area of 1050 acres. It is going to be constructed on the State of art alongside the ring road that shows the matches with floodlights. It holds the capacity of around one hundred and fifty thousand spectators at a time. The construction of the port city project is being approved and the high-class stadium is constructed to carry forward this project. The top-class technology is launched and installed in the construction as it is the place for international matches. The location of this stadium is between Adyala and Chakri interchange and also lies 6 km away from the Islamabad new airport. The five-star hotels and clubs are also going to be launched and constructed in the new stadium as it provides leisure and comfort to the people who come to see the match.

Facilities of Cricket Stadium in Rawalpindi

The stadium also provides full proof of security to the international players and shows the best preview to the audiences. The sports city project not only consists of the stadium for the cricket but also shows approval on the construction of a badminton court, swimming pool for the sportsmen, basketball court, and boxing ring. Moreover, it also provides parking and a jogging track for the players to practice different exercises. This sports city mega-project is going to start soon in the second season of the year and displays the brilliant image of the stadium. As many as 10 new cricket grounds will also be raised in the capital considering the growing requirements from local clubs. The capital will have all these facilities shortly. Full support and cooperation will be extended to Islamabad to raise the standard of the game.

How to Check Blue World City 2025 Balloting Results Online

The Blue World City Islamabad has announced that the 2025 ballot results are now available online. This quick guide will walk you through the exact steps on how to check Blue World City 2025 balloting results online. Blue World City Islamabad has announced the balloting results for the Following block:

All those members who fulfilled the payment criteria were included in the balloting process and awarded plot numbers with an official map. You can check the balloting results by following this easy guide.

A Complete Guide to Check Blue World City Balloting Results Online (2025)

Wondering how to check your plot details and balloting results online? Just follow these simple steps to verify your file, plot number, and all related information:

Step 1: Visit the Official Website

Start by searching the official Blue World City Islamabad website. You can access it by clicking on the link provided.

Step 2: Locate the Balloting Results Tab

Once the homepage loads, look for the “Ballot Results 2025” option at the top section of the site. Click on it to proceed.

Step 3: Enter Your Details

You will now see a form asking for two pieces of information:

Your File Registration Number

(You will find this number on your file’s front/title page. It usually looks something like BWC12E23T45.)

Your CNIC Number

(Enter your national ID with dashes, e.g.,12345-6789012-3.)

Step 4: Search Your Record

After entering the required details, click the “Search Record” button.

Step 5: View Your Balloting Result

If your information is correct, your results will appear in a table with seven columns showing:

And that is it! You will now have a complete view of your balloting status and plot details.

Note:

Do you want to explore a living destination that is an indication of the devotion of the Blue World City administration to expand inclusivity and provide affordable housing options for low to middle-level income classes of the country? If yes, then this affordable real estate blog (2 Minutes 34 Seconds read) is absolutely for you.

The lively and all-in Blue World City Awami Block is a living station nestled within a Blue World City Islamabad. This Awami residential block has been carefully designed to cater specifically to the needs and aspirations of the low to middle-income class of our society.

Situated at the crossroads of the M-2 Motorway and Rawalpindi interchange, this strategically located community offers unprecedented convenience and outreach to its potential residents.

What sets this Awami residential block apart is its unbreakable commitment to world-class construction standards. Every aspect of its development, from the architectural design to the choice of materials, has been carefully outlined to ensure the highest quality and long life. The focalized aim of quality construction will create a safe and secure residential environment that will stand the test of time.

Whether you have started your professional career in a while, or are a middle-aged family man, you will embark on a journey of satisfaction through this unique Awami residential block.

You’ll feel yourself in a social fabric full of modernity, heritage, and community spirit. It is a place where dreams find a home, and where every resident can thrive and flourish according to the vision of Blue World Administration as “A home for every family “.

Blue World City Awami Block Map: Location overview

Blue World City Awami Block is going to be built right next to the Main gate of the M-2 (Lahore-Islamabad) Motorway. It is going to be situated parallel to Blue World City with streamlined access to Chakri Road. It is the most in-demand region in the Capital territory due to its easy access from Islamabad New International Airport and Main Qurtba Town Islamabad.

Blue World City Awami Block Map: Accessibility Insight

Blue World City Awami Block is approachable within 5-minute drive from Rawalpindi-Ring Road and M-2 (Lahore – Islamabad) Motorway. It is a 10 and 20 minutes drive from CPEC Route and New Islamabad International Airport respectively.

Blue World City Awami Block Map: A Collection of Monuments

A magnificent entrance with 712 feet 712-foot-long gate will be built with a resemblance to Atlantis Gate Dubai. Blue World City Administration has put forward the leap of faith to keep alive the Islamic Architectural Ideology by mapping out a replica of the renowned BABRI MOSQUE in the Awami Block. In the same locality, DIVISION SQUARE will also be constructed around which a huge market will be developed.

blogs.title: Blue World City Islamabad (BWC) First Balloting of the Year 2023
blogs.excerpt: Blue World City Islamabad (BWC) First Balloting of the Year 2023. Contact us for booking in blue world city Islamabad Now....
blogs.content:
Blue World City Islamabad (BWC) First Balloting of the Year 2023

The first-ever balloting of Blue World City Islamabad (BWC) for the year 2023 took place on June 11, 2023 (Sunday) at the site of Blue World City Islamabad in a gleaming event.

The cricket legend Shoaib Akhter aka “Rawalpindi Express “was the chief guest of the event as he is a brand ambassador of BWC’s sports valley block.

Before this Shoaib Akhter along with the top leadership of Blue World City Islamabad took an aerial visit to the Blue World City Islamabad. The experience of the helicopter visit of the project by cricket legend Shoaib Akhter can be expressed in a single sentence quoted by him in a video message “Blue World City Islamabad is a reality”.

The first year of the 2023 balloting of BWC involves the allotment of plot numbers in all blocks of Blue World City Islamabad except the general block. All those valued members who have submitted payments up to the settled criteria would be eligible for plot allotment.

Blue World City Islamabad (BWC) First Balloting of the Year 2023: News for left-over members

It is hereby announced that all those BSWC clients/investors who have submitted 40-50% of the settled amount for balloting will be entertained in 2nd balloting of the year 2023 in a two to three months’ time span.

They are advised to complete their remaining payment benchmark in an interim period so that they should be on the top priority list of balloting.

Blue World City Islamabad (BWC) First Balloting of the Year 2023: Takeaways from Chairman’s Speech

In the final speech on the eve of the balloting event, Mr.Saad Nazir, Chairman of Blue World City Islamabad, revealed that a final Non-Objection Certificate (NOC) has been issued to BWC administration for 12,700 Kanals of additional land by Punjab Housing and Town Planning Agency (PHATA), you can confirm it on the website of PHATA.

The second important announcement made by the Chairman BWC was that Blue World City Islamabad is going to construct 45 Km long Sheikh Zayed Avenue from Adyala Road Rawalpindi to Fateh Jhang Road Islamabad.

In his unusual speech at the Balloting event, he offered BWC platform to all big developers of the country i.e.; Defense Housing Authority (DHA), Bahria Town, etc. to collaborate for development for Pakistan. Moreover, he also made an offer (conditional to the cooperation of state institutions) to the Government of Pakistan on behalf of the real estate developer’s community to pay off the foreign debt of the nation.

Blue World City Islamabad (BWC) First Balloting of the Year 2023: Takeaways from Vice-Chairman’s Speech

Later on, Vice Chairman/ Partner of Blue World City Islamabad Mr.Nadem Ijaz also graced the event with his speech, in which he elaborated on the 100 % refund policy.

According to him, if any client of BWC is not satisfied with his/her investment decision, he/she can take full payment back without any deduction by submitting just one Refund Application to the society office.

Blue World City Islamabad (BWC) First Balloting of the Year 2023: How you can check the balloting results?

You can check the status of your balloting online with ease while sitting at your home.

Download the application of Blue World City Islamabad from the Google Play store or simply go to the official website of BWC, then go to the balloting section. In the balloting section, you will find two empty sections to be fulfilled by the client. In one section put your BWC 8-9 digits registration number (This registration number is written on the top left side of your plot file) and in the other section put your Computerized National Identity Card Number (CNIC) with dashes and click on the search record tab.

You will see 7 column block in which the following credentials of your allotted plot will be shown:

In case you would not see above mentioned details, it means that you were not qualified for balloting yet due to not depositing the required amount of plot value. You may be allotted with plot number in upcoming balloting as mentioned in this blog earlier.

Blue World City Islamabad (BWC) First Balloting of the Year 2023: Book your Plot with Property Naama Group

You can book your plot in any Block of Blue World City Islamabad on old available rates only through Property Naama Group without visiting the Society office in the flesh. It is feasible for both resident Pakistanis and overseas.

After paying, the Down Payment ( PKR 97000/- to 150000/- ) of the value of ready to possession plot in the official accounts of Property Naama Group, Send your ( or of your close relation) two Passport size Photographs along with NIC Copies and Payment Slip to Property Naama Group’s official WhatsApp Number.

You can verify your Booking in your online payment plan in a blink. We will dispatch the mandatory legal documents, invoices, and official files of the plot through courier.

Rush up to your phone to avail this amazing investment opportunity in Blue World City Islamabad.

Blue World City Merging Policy Announced

The society administration has recently announced the Blue World City Merging Policy for its General and Overseas blocks. Let’s discuss the details of this merging policy, deadline, and other related policies in this blog. Read the blog to the end to get insight on the topic.

What is merging policy?

A policy in which more than one plot file is merged into one file to reduce the burden of installments on the file owner.

Why do people adopt a merging policy?

There can be multiple reasons to adopt a merging policy in the real estate industry. Here are some of these reasons:

Buying multiple plot files due to discounts

Sometimes, a person buys more than one plot file due to attractive discounts. Later on, he cannot pay the installments of all these files. Therefore, now he wants to retain only one file.

Plot files in a family

Different family members buy multiple files in society but do not want to carry out these files. They want to retain only one file. So, they go for a plot file merging policy to remove the burden of other files.

About Blue World City Merging policy

A plot file merging policy is active in Blue World City for its General and Overseas Blocks. You can use this policy if you like. July 20, 2024, is the deadline for this merging policy.

Surrendering a plot file

Did you buy a plot file in the General or Overseas Block of Blue World City and want to surrender it? Waiting for 7 to 8 months to get your paid amount in the plot file after deducting the necessary fees and taxes is a routine process.

You can get this amount in 1 or 2 weeks if you do this through Property Naama Group. You can contact our marketing team at the contact given at the bottom of the blog.

APR discount on Installment payment

You have a plot in a block of Blue World City Islamabad and want to pay installments. Pay it through the Property Naama Group. We will help you to pay the installment through the Annual Percentage Rate (APR).

blogs.title: Buy Property in Pakistan
blogs.excerpt: We will discuss Why Overseas Pakistani Students should buy property in Pakistan. Read the blog to get detail.
blogs.content:
Why Overseas Pakistani Students Should Buy Property in Pakistan?

We will discuss Why Overseas Pakistani Students should buy property in Pakistan. Read the Complete Blog to get a complete insight into real estate investment. Overseas Pakistanis are completing their higher education in China, the UK, the USA, Canada, and other countries. During their study duration abroad, they get full-bright scholarships from the university and do odd jobs to bear their educational expenses.

After this struggle, they can also save a good amount of money. They should invest their savings in properties in Pakistan to make their long-term assets. Read the details in the article.

Benefits of Property Investment for Overseas Pakistani Students

Here are some of the unique benefits of property investment for overseas Pakistanis:

Long-Term Appreciation

Real estate in Pakistan has historically appreciated over time, making it a reliable long-term investment. Major cities are experiencing urbanization and development, driving up property values. By investing now, overseas Pakistani students can benefit from this appreciation in the coming years, resulting in substantial returns on investment.

Rental Income

Owning property will allow you to generate passive income through rentals. With a growing population and increasing demand for housing, renting out a property in a prime location can provide a steady cash flow. This rental income can help to save and reinvest it in the future.

Diversification of Investment Portfolio

For overseas Pakistani students, investing in property offers an excellent way to diversify their investment portfolio. A diversified portfolio can enhance overall economic security and stability.

Leverage Opportunities

Real estate allows for leverage, meaning you can purchase a property by investing your university scholarship amount. It means you can control a more valuable asset with less of your capital. If the property appreciates, the returns on your investment can be substantial, even if you’ve only invested a fraction of the total value.

Stability in Uncertain Times

Real estate is often considered a safer investment during economic downturns. While stock markets fluctuate wildly, property values remain more stable, providing security. For overseas Pakistani students concerned about their job placement and economic uncertainty after their degree abroad, investing in property can be a way to safeguard their future.

Future Use and Family Benefits

Investing in property also allows overseas Pakistani students to provide future benefits for their families. Property can serve multiple purposes, whether it’s a home for family visits, a residence for younger generations, or a safe investment for children. It adds both emotional and financial value to the investment.

Invest with Property Naama Group

blogs.title: Capital Gain Tax on Property in Pakistan
blogs.excerpt: In this informative blog, we will dissect The Capital Gain Tax on Property in Pakistan in detail. Read till the last.
blogs.content:
Capital Gain Tax on Property in Pakistan

Like other policy papers, tax policy has always been a complicated document in Pakistan. It has always been way more difficult to comprehend any new tax law in the land of pure. The Capital Gain Tax on Property in Pakistan is also one of them.

In this informative blog, we will dissect this law in detail to make it easy for a common taxpayer to understand.

What is the meaning of Capital Gain in real estate?

In the realm of real estate, capital gain means the profit margins earned after the sale of any real estate product such as a plot, plot file, constructed property, or a flat. It is the calculation of the difference amount between the price at the time of sale and purchase. This profit in reality is earned when the selling price surpasses the purchasing price.

What is the meaning of Capital Gain Tax on Property in Pakistan?

The tax applicable on the profit earned from the sale of a real estate product such as a plot, plot file, or constructed property after holding for a specific period is called Capital Gain Tax on Property. According to the Finance Act of 2017, the Capital Gain Tax is evaluated only when a real estate product is put for sale within three years of the purchase date.

The further application of this tax varies with the extended rules of the Capital Gain Tax gazette. The complete details can be checked in the Capital Gain Tax table by the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) given below.

Applicability Conditions of Capital Gain Tax on Property in Pakistan

The following are the conditions that must be considered before calculations of Capital Gain tax.

For example, if a seller has bought a plot worth 20,00,000/0 rupees and sold it at 25,00,000/-. Thereby, he made PKR 5,00,000/- profit out of it. So, the Capital Gain Tax will only be applicable on the 5,00,000/- rupees instead of 25,00,000 /- rupees.

Ways to assess Capital Gain Tax on Property in Pakistan?

As a taxpayer, you can calculate the Capital Gain tax (CGT) through the following three ways.

Calculating through quoting the actual value of property

Under this method, you have to quote the actual selling and buying value of the property and the profit earned. Ultimately, the CGT will also based on this actual value of the profit.

Assessment using a combination of the old DC rate and the New FBR Rate

Under this formula, you have to put in the Deputy Commissioner (DC) rate of the property while making a purchase. While at the time of sale, FBR’s New rate policy will be applicable.

Finally, the CGT will be calculated using the given tax calculation formula:

DC rate at the time of purchase – FBR value at the time of sale = Total Profit (5% CGT on profit )

Calculating through the latest FBR Value

Under this approach, you have to apply property value under the FBR new rate policy both at selling and buying. You can calculate under this formula:

FBR Value at the time of purchase – FBR value at the time of sale = Total Profit (CGT = 10%,7.5%,5% respectively for 1st , 2nd and 3rd year on profit )

The detailed calculations under this formula can be seen in the below table.

More than one year and less than two years

Falling between three to four years

Falling between five to six years

Where the holding period exceeds seven years

Exemption of Capital Gain Tax on Property in Pakistan?

Properties mentioned under the following list are exempted from the Capital Gain Tax (CGT) as per the Finance Act 2017.

Unlocking the door to Comparison of Capital Smart City and Faisal Town Phase 2 in detail. In the realm of real estate, choosing the ideal housing society is a pivotal decision. Among the options that captivate prospective homeowners in Pakistan are Capital Smart City and Faisal Town Phase 2.

At the initial stage of development

Additionally, a delegated interchange from the adjacent highway has been approved through Frontier Works Organization (FWO). You can access Islamabad International Airport within a few minutes time-frame while residing in CSCI.

Faisal Town Phase 2 Islamabad is situated on the main GT Road n-5 Highway Taxila Rawalpindi. It has outpaced all housing societies of the capital city in terms of strategic location. It is surrounded by Taxila, Rawalpindi, and Islamabad Capital City. Additionally, Faisal Town Phase 2 has out-of-the-way approachability from 360 angles.

Henceforth, It is 2 minutes away from Taxila and 30 minutes from the National University of Science and Technology (NUST). Moreover, you can reach the society in 5, 15, and 20 minutes from Wah Cantt, Rawalpindi, and Islamabad.

Similarly, Faisal Town Phase 2 is at 2-minute and 10-minute distances from Tarnol Mor and CDA Sector B-17. The Faisal Town Phase 2 Islamabad has direct access from CDA sector i16 due to interlinked 7th Avenue.

Infrastructural development comparison of Capital Smart City and Faisal Town Phase 2

Capital Smart City Islamabad being started in the year 2018 has undergone a considerable infrastructural development. The Faisal Town Phase 2 Islamabad is at its initial stage of development because it was started in the year 2023.

About the developers

Capital Smart City Islamabad is a joint venture of a real estate developer’s consortium. Future Development Holdings (FDH), Habib Rafique Pvt. Ltd. (HRL), and Surbana Jurong are joining hands to create a property masterpiece. SURBANA JURONG is one of the largest Asian-based urban and infrastructure Consulting firms. It has completed master planning in over 60 countries.

It has local and global footprints. In Pakistan, it has successfully designed the Lahore Smart City and the Capital Smart City. Furthermore, it has done Master Planning of Modern Singapore.

Faisal Town Phase 2 Islamabad is the emerging project of Zedem International (Pvt.) Ltd. The mission of Zedem International (Pvt.) Ltd. Is to develop international standards housing societies in Pakistan. They have delivered several successful projects so far. Among them, Faisal Town, Faisal Residencia, Faisal Tower, and SEA Square are well known.

Price Comparison

Both Capital Smart City and Faisal Town Phase 2 have ready-to-possess plots as well as plot files on installments. Capital Smart City is a costly project as compared to Faisal Town Phase 2 Islamabad due to the difference in development work. Other factors like brand image, business history, and location also Impact price allocation.

Facilities comparison of Capital Smart City and Faisal Town Phase 2
