blogs.title: Capital Smart City Interchange Inaugurated | update | Overview
blogs.excerpt: Capital Smart City Interchange Inaugurated Alhamdulillah Interchange is open for all customers to use on a daily basis.
blogs.content:
Capital Smart City Interchange Inaugurated

The society leadership has inaugurated the Capital Smart City Interchange in a recent development in the real estate industry of twin cities(Rawalpindi-Islamabad).

This approval has taken a prolonged time to become a reality. Moreover, the Frontier Works Organization (FWO) has issued a No-Objection Certificate (NOC) to start the construction work.

Why Capital Smart City Interchange was needed?

The residents and visitors of the Capital Smart City have to face several challenges due to the absence of a delegated interchange on the M-2 Motorway.

One of them is the only entry option from the M-2 Motorway without exiting it from the society. For instance, if you have entered Capital Smart City from the M-2 Motorway, you cannot come from the same route.

You have to opt for the Chakri interchange on Chakri Road Rawalpindi to exit from Capital Smart City. To tackle these challenges for the residents and visitors, the Chairman Habib Rafique Group and the leadership of Capital Smart City have taken a leap of faith.

They inaugurated the entry and exit points of Capital Smart City Interchange on the M-2 Motorway on May 14, 2024, to facilitate its valued members. Now, you can take a single entry token to access and exit from the same point of society.

Why this road project is crucial for the society?

The following reasons make this project crucial for society and its members.

After the interchange inauguration, the property values of Capital Smart City will witness a boom. Its residential and commercial plots will be the most premium real estate products.

After easy entry and exit in the society, there will be a sizeable increase in visitor footfall. This enhanced engagement with people will increase the chances of cashing out business opportunities within society. It will ultimately boost economic growth.

Escalated Infrastructural development

The inception of the motorway interchange will spearhead the infrastructural development in 18 Hole Golf Course Capital Smart City. There will be an increased number of schools, Shopping Malls, Food Courts and other commercial places.

The Capital Smart City uses the M-2 ( Lahore-Islamabad ) Motorway for its on-road communication; therefore, this project is crucial for society. Otherwise, it may face a downturn in the real estate market and financial losses.

Making Capital Smart City distinctive

The Capital Smart City has become the only society in the country with its designated motorway interchange.

To make an interchange on a functional motorway is not an easy task. It involves a lot of effort and monetary commitment. Therefore, this act of Capital Smart City management shows their willingness and commitment to deliver the project timely.

For booking and other details of the capital Smart City Islamabad, you can reach out to us via :

Capital Smart City Islamabad is a grand residential project that is ideally located in Islamabad. It is the very first Smart City project in Pakistan and 4th in Asia. Society has become the most popular one because of its 8th-grade development and self-sustaining eco-friendly features.

It is an ideal real estate project to invest as well as to live peacefully with your family. The society has many salient features for the convenience of its residents, making it an ideal investment and a perfect place to raise a family.

Finally, the Capital Smart City interchange is officially approved. Congratulations to all the members of this society who had confidently invested their investments in this top-class project. Capital Smart City Interchange on M2 Lahore – Islamabad Motorway is 100% legal and formerly approved by NHA. An official letter by the authorities is issued. Moreover, the work of this interchange will begin soon.

Capital Smart City Interchange Approve Officially

The NHA Executive Board approved the construction of an interchange at KM 332, 333, and M2, to Future Development Holdings for its housing project named Capital Smart City under regulation for access from the NHA-controlled network.

It’s Time to Gain 100% Profit

Capital Smart City interchange official approval will indeed act positively on this society. Interchange Officially Approved, It is undoubtedly, big news for all the buyers and investors of this project who had invested their capital in Capital Smart City properties.

With this final official approval of interchange in Capital Smart City, the rates of the plots, villas, and apartments will start increasing. The future of this project is already very bright. But this latest news holds significant importance. Many of the buyers had invested in this society but if you are still looking to invest in it, do contact Property Naama Consultants. On the other hand, if you wish to sell any of these properties, please don’t sell them at negative prices.

The rates are currently stable and will never go negative. So, be careful in making decisions and don’t sell your properties at the lowest prices. Capital Smart City is one of the most profitable investments in the twin cities. Your investment in this society is 100% secure, and the chances of growth are 200%. Even, it’s time to gain 100% profit on your money in this project.

Don’t waste your time thinking here and there and this is the right time to invest your money in Capital Smart City Islamabad.

Capital Smart City Location

The appealing housing society is located in the Rawalpindi Region of Islamabad, near the new Islamabad International Airport. Capital Smart City Islamabad has a distance of only a few kilometers from M-2 Toll Plaza near Thalian interchange, falling on the eastern route of CPEC. Moreover. it is located on the drive of only 5-6 minutes away from the New Islamabad International Airport. Some best housing project that lies in the proximity of Capital Smart City are Al Miraj housing scheme, Eighteen Islamabad, Qurtaba City, and Blue World City.

Smart City Islamabad Total Area & Access Points

Capital Smart Society covers a total land of 55,000 Kanal. It is a well-designed project that is further comprised of many blocks in it. This society is easily accessible through Main Chakri road from the

M-2 Motorway and via the ring road. Moreover, it is easily accessible from the surrounding areas as well as via the national highway, Lahore-Islamabad M-2 Motorway.

Smart City Islamabad Approval Status

The society holds valid approval from the relevant authorities. Yes, it is approved by RDA. This means that there are no legal issues with the properties available in Capital Smart City. Further, this approval is the best satisfaction for interested investors.

Capital Smart City Islamabad Blocks

Capital Smart City is the biggest housing project developing in the proximity of New International Airport Islamabad. It comprises many well-planned blocks in it. But the most attractive blocks of Capital Smart City are the Overseas Block, Executive Block, and General Block.

Capital Smart City Properties for Sale

This well-planned housing project in Islamabad offers different sizes of residential plots in it. These available plot categories are 5 Marla, 7 Marla, 10 Marla, 1 Kanal, and 2 Kanal. Moreover, the commercial plots of 2 Marla, 4 Marla, and 6 Marla are also available at affordable prices.

ndeed, Capital Smart City is a place with the perfect ready to live properties such as Villas and Apartments. Currently, all these built-in properties are available on installments.

Smart City Current Development Status

The development work in Capital Smart City is moving at the fastest speed. Indeed, many of the properties are on-ground and ready for possession. Moreover, heavy machinery is working day and night for the completion of work at a satisfactory pace.

Capital Smart City Islamabad Attractive Features

The society is beautifully designed to offer all the modern-day facilities. Here in Capital Smart City, you will be facilitated in every aspect of life. So, what are you waiting for?

Let’s have a look at some attractive features of this society!

Capital Smart City Districts

Districts are the new blocks in the capital smart city. We named these distracts below.

In addition, Capital Smart City Islamabad’s legal framework, means of production & efficient business opportunities make it a center of attraction for investors. Once being operational, this project will surely prove to be one of the main hubs for economic activities all around the region. Presently, it is believed to be the first commercial center in the area. The modern commercial centers in Capital Smart City will create more than 90,000 job opportunities.

Capital Smart City Islamabad Review:

Above all, it is introducing innovative ideas in the real estate sector to ensure a sustainable future. Utilizing bleeding edge technology along with unique infrastructure. Capital Smart City promises to provide a luxurious yet comfortable lifestyle for its residents. In short, it is going to be a grand success.

Capital Smart City is a well-planned community. It is going to be a city itself. The master plan of Capital Smart City is built on the Township Model.In other words, the team behind the planning did a marvelous job. Overall, it’s designed to become a chic and high-end community. Moreover, it will cater to all the needs of life within its perimeter. Capital Smart City map is well-distinguished into districts and sub-districts. Likewise, each district is supported by convenient public facilities. Moreover, the district-wise division include

Capital Smart City RESIDENTIAL UNITS

Capital Smart City is providing reasonable options for a residence that is particularly laced with the most advance & modern facilities. Capital Smart City Islamabad Commercial Units

The commercial sector is another center of attraction. It provides absolute outclass facilities for vendors. Presently, all Commercial plots are sold out but in the past have been available in the following categories:

Smart City Smart Villas

Capital Smart City is introducing the concept of a “Smart Home” in Pakistan. Taking full advantage of the latest technology, it is going to make life easy & comfortable through the construction of these Smart Villas. To be exact, these villas would be a hallmark of advanced & state-of-the-art development. The main elements of these Smart Villas include

Furthermore, it will come up with the phenomenal international standard roads & infrastructure. The main aspects of infrastructure are of high standard including a 16-Lane main Boulevard. A broad network of well-paved concrete carpeted roads, Speed Checkers, Automated light poles, and many more. Most importantly, HRL has already approved the BRT service. In addition, famous big names are establishing their signature franchise at Capital Smart City including

Moreover, separate aviation & overseas block will make the residents experience an edge lifestyle. Other than basic life facilities, it also comes with an international standard Golf Club and Adventure Tourism Zone. Also, it will have a Grand Jamiah Mosque as well.

Capital Smart City New Masterplan Details

The masterplan of Capital Smart City is the same, but also there are several changes such as:

The location of the Proposed Smart City Interchange is changed. Previously it was near the Forest Residence, but the new site is on M2 Motorway near NUTECH University.

Another significant change is the location of Executive Block 2 changes. Now, this block is located adjacent to Executive Block 1.

The location of the Health Care District is changed and place near NUTECH University.

This new master plan is more beneficial for Overseas 2, which is now named Overseas Central. Previously, its location was adjacent to Overseas 1 (now Overseas East). But its new location is close to University District. The reason to change its location is lack of development and to provide buyers with something better.

Furthermore, the changes of location of the interchange will now benefit more to the buyers and plot holders of Overseas Central. Possession of this block will be available till 2022.

Executive Block 1 location is the same; however, Executive Block 2 is adjacent to Block 1. The reason for these changes is more development in the proximity.

Sports District location changes because a new commercial project is coming on its previous location.

Harmony Park Block location was close to Overseas Prime Block, but there was no development. That’s why the files of this block with 40% clear payment have a location connected to Overseas 1. The remaining plots are moved near Silver Valley.

Moreover, the location of Overseas Prime Block on Chakri Road is the same. 18 Hole PGA Golf Course is also the same. The Lake view terrace location is the same.

Conclusion

While summing up all these details, we say that the blocks and amenities on M2 Main Chakri Road are the same. The significant changes are the location of the proposed interchange, Overseas Block 2 location, and adjacent Harmony Park Block files.

Amenities

Capital Smart City New Residential Payment Plan

Capital Smart City DEVELOPER

Habib Rafiq Limited has developed and built mega projects in Pakistan for the last 60 years. It is a very well-known brand in the building industry of the country. FDH comes up with the tech-savvy idea of Pakistan’s 1st smart city. At the moment, it is focusing on providing luxury living while introducing worthwhile economic contributions as well. Surbana Jurong (SJ) is a consultancy firm originally based in Singapore. It is Master Planner for the Capital Smart City Islamabad.

Capital Smart City has announced the balloting for the plots of Overseas Central Block, previously known as Overseas Sector 2. Property Naama has already delivered acknowledgment slips to them. It’s part of our after-sales services. Capital Smart City balloting for Overseas Central Block will take place on 12th March 2022.

In a notice issued on 12th February 2022, Capital Smart City management has thanked all the Capital Smart City members and sales partners for believing and trusting in their services. Moreover, all the members for selections of plots are highly advised to meet the timeline for the plot’s selection as it will be not extended further. Further details of Capital Smart City Overseas Central Balloting are:

Capital Smart City Overseas Central Balloting Date and Procedure

The management of Capital Smart City has shared the following procedure and date:

CSC members who have purchased their plots in 2018 and 2019 and are eligible for the selection process as per the acknowledgment receipt are requested to visit CSC F-11 Head Office to select their own choice from Feb 14 to Feb 20, 2022. Here Sunday will also be a working day.

Moreover, CSC members who have purchased their plots in 2020 and 2021 and are eligible for the selection process as per the acknowledgment receipt, are requested to visit CSC F-11 Head Office to select their own choice from Feb 21 to Feb 27, 2022. Here Sunday will also be a working day.

Note: This notice by CSC Management is only for those who are eligible for the plot’s selection. This notice also reads that Overseas Pakistanis can select their plots through email. However, it’s a time taking process. That’s why Property Naama Consultants offers you a sound and safe selection process. You can confidently contact us on the given mediums. We will help you out by selecting your plot through the official map of Overseas Central Block.

So, here we congratulate all our customers who happily invest their hard-earned money in Capital Smart City Islamabad. It is good news for them. They will surely enjoy huge benefits in the coming times.

Capital Smart City Islamabad NOC

Capital Smart City NOC status as of 11/03/2019 RDA official website, has approved. More details are available: click here. Due to the constant purchasing of land, a society that once had a proper NOC granted by RDA has gone under process for new land acquisition addition in RDA records. Apart from this, there are quite confirm sources that have verified that Capital Smart City will be merging with DHA.

Development Status

40% to 45% developed currently.

Capital Smart City site is termed as one of the most challenging sites for carrying out developmental work. However, development work at the site is undergoing a fast pace. Presently, there is an agreement that has been signed between Harradine Golf & FDH for the 18 Put Hole Golf Course. Also, FDH has signed another agreement to build Move-n-Pick Hotel and Residency in Capital Smart City. Furthermore, 7 tube wells are currently operational on the site. Concrete carpeting of roads is in progress. Meanwhile, work on the construction 300 feet long main boulevard is already started. More than 400 heavy machines are working continuously. 25 Model Villas in golf courses are also being developed. IN a Recent Event, Executive Block is recently launched at Capital Smart City. It also announced its own educational institutes mainly universities. In other words, Capital Smart City is a complete housing option for all looking to invest in modern properties.

So, don’t wait and contact Property Naama Consultants for further details!

blogs.content:
Celebrity Premier League 2021

Celebrity Premier League 2021 is one of the biggest cricket events of the year in Pakistan. It is bringing you our country’s most extensive entertainment and drama industry together in a cricket league. Pakistan’s top stars will showcase their cricketing skills to entertain and won the heart of every visitor. This event Draft and Soft Launch Ceremony take place on 3rd August in Serena Hotel Islamabad. Cricket matches in CPL will start from 6th Oct 2021 and finale on 10th Oct 2021. All the matches will be broadcast live on PTV Sports.

About Celebrity Premium League

It is going to be the first time in Pakistan, that Pakistan’s entertainment industry stars and media is coming into cricket. This Celebrity Premium League is organized by the Media Sniffers, in cooperation with DE’ Concepts. More than 60 top stars are participating as players. Moreover, they are divide into five teams that will compete in knockout rounds. The basic purpose of this league is to entertain people and making cricket Pakistan’s favorite sports looks more exciting and suspenseful.

Teams in Celebrity Premium League

Celebrity Premium League gathers the best actors of Pakistan who will demonstrate their cricketing talents and provide spectators with memorable entertainment and enjoyment. This league will be fought by five teams comprising actors from the film and television industries. Four of these teams will represent different regional backgrounds while each team will have to play two knockout matches. Following are the teams’ details:

Islamabad Nova

The captain of the team is Moammar Rana. Moreover, the name of the team represents its sponsors Nova City Islamabad. It’s a new but mega real estate development in Islamabad.

Lahore Heroes

The captain of this team is Humayun Saeed. The word Heroes with Lahore represents the love and spirit of Lahoris.

Quetta Markhors

Fahad Mustafa is the captain of Quetta Markhors. This team represented the National Animal of Pakistan.

Karachi Royals

Ali Zafar is the captain of the Karachi Royals. The name of the team clears that Karachi is one of the most royal and major cities of Pakistan.

Peshawar Tigers

The name of the team represents that the inhabitants of Peshawar are not less than tigers. This team will play in the captaincy of Khalil Ur Rehman.

CPL Anthem

It is sung by the legend Shafqat Amanat Ali

CPL Venue and Stadium:

Rawalpindi Cricket Stadium will host the Celebrity Premium League. CPL Pakistan will run from October 7 through October 10, 2021.

Final Date

Its final will take place on 10 October 2021 at Rawalpindi Cricket stadium Pakistan.

Live Performances

It is not only a cricket event but different well-known singers will also perform live such as:

Celebrity Premium League is not only a cricket event but a full mastic, lots of music, and fun event, ready to make you happy and enjoy.

blogs.content:
CEO Property Naama Awarded with Excellency Award by President Arif Alvi

In recognition of his meritorious contributions to the field of real estate and construction, CEO of Property Naama Group Muhammad Ismail has been awarded Excellency Award by the President of Pakistan Dr. Arif Alvi. This award was especially meant for the Best Real Estate Projects Delivered in a Short Time. Ismail also happens to be Pakistan’s leading real estate YouTuber who is often the first one to introduce new projects and provide a detailed and honest review to assist people in their investment decisions.

The award ceremony was held at Aiwan-e-Sadar Islamabad. The President of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, Dr. Arif Alvi himself presented the award to the CEO Muhammad Ismail. On this occasion, a good number of bureaucrats, diplomats, politicians, and honored entrepreneurs were also present there.

This is one of the highest and most prestigious awards for the Property Naama Group. This award has increased the morale of the corporation and provided the reason to the company for keeping their consistent of hard work in the real estate sector.

Dr. Arif Alvi has said that people working in the real estate and construction sectors are playing a vital role in ensuring the growth and development of the country, besides improving the quality of life of the citizens.

Why Property Naama Group?

Property Naama is Pakistan’s leading real estate company, which is providing the most excellent and efficient facilities to its clients since 2017. We have revolutionized the real estate sector of Pakistan with our constant efforts and hard work. Moreover, Property Naama Group has been standing out in front of other real estate companies for their usage of advanced technology and for keeping up with international standards. We are the proud Platinum Sales Partners of different top-notch real estate projects due to our excellent commitment and performance in the real estate sector.

We stand high due to our work ethics and legitimacy. Clients are guaranteed that their investment in the real estate world is secure and beneficial with us. Apart from that, there are multiple reasons which make Property Naama stands out among others.

After this award, we are working with more dedication and motivation. We want to keep our performance status high. We want to remain consistent despite the economic and political instability of Pakistan. This award is the first step and we hope that many more has to come.

The Property Naama Group has been providing real estate services in all major cities of Pakistan including Rawalpindi (Head Office), Islamabad, Lahore, Peshawar, Mardan, Sialkot, Kharian, Murree, and Gujar Khan.

We are offering our professional services in buying, selling, developing, and constructing both residential and commercial properties. We have already successfully provided more than 50,000 domestic and international customers. Overseas Pakistanis find Property Naama a reliable name because of our expert reviews, experience, and timely services.

Commander Builder’s Social Welfare Wing is proudly presenting Commander City Karachi. It is an ideally located housing society that is spanning over a large area of land. Its Phase 1 is covering a land of 100 acres and featuring constructed houses, apartments, and as well as residential plots for sale.

All of these properties are currently available on convenient payment plans. In addition, 25% of the homes will be constructed free of cost as per the part of its welfare scheme. Commander City has also reserved a 5% quota for orphaned children, widows, and people with special needs.

This society is approved by the SDA and SBCA. This approval is further making Commander City a reliable choice to make the investment in the real estate of Karachi. More Details

Commander City –Location Details

Commander City is beautifully located on the M-9 Karachi-Hyderabad Motorway. This housing venture lies in the proximity of Bahria Town Karachi, DHA City, and the ASF Housing Scheme. Moreover, this society is also easily accessible from Jinnah International Airport.

In addition, if you think that living in Commander City will be a problem in terms of distance from the Main Karachi city, then think again! Yes, Commander City is also offering a 24/7 high-speed shuttle service from this housing project.

blogs.title: Developments Updates in New Metro City Gujjar Khan
blogs.excerpt: This real estate blog is designated to rundown about recent on-site developmental work in all blocks of New Metro City Gujjar Khan.
blogs.content:
Developments Updates in New Metro City Gujjar Khan

Virtual Tour of the Site

“Seeing is believing” is a phrase in English Literature, to practically implement this phrase, we at property Naama Group have arranged a virtual tour of New Metro City Gujjar Khan which is located on the main GT Road of tehsil Gujar Khan and Falls under the district jurisdictions of Rawalpindi City.

This real estate blog (4 minutes 34 seconds read), is designated to describe the rundown of this virtual tour. In this blog, you will be updated about recent on-site developmental work in all blocks of society.

Come and Start our Virtual Tour of the New Metro City of Gujjar Khan!

Entering from main gate 1

When you enter in New Metro City Gujar Khan from Main Gate Number 1 on Main GT Road which is made just like Metro City Kharian. You will find Main Boulevard, on the two sides of the boulevard there would be two service roads.

Alongside the service road, you will find 8 Marla front-back open commercial cuttings. In front of 8 Marla commercial cuttings, there are 8 Marla villa series being constructed in a burgeoning way.

After commercial cutting, there are several 1 kanal residential -to-possession plots that have all kinds of basic facilities I-e, Electricity, Gas lines, water provision, etc.

You can see heavy developmental machinery working in every block of society along with construction materials. This is a sign that society is going to be inhabited soon and your investment capital would be get enhanced with whooping amounts.

Witnessing the Glow Park and Central Security Control

When you move ahead on the main boulevard, next at a short distance you will find Glow Park which is an international standard theme park that has a construction and developmental budget of a whopping 1 Crore Pakistani rupees.

Then there is a Central Security control room just crossing distance of Glow Park. It is a place to centrally monitor and control the law and order and security matters of society. Next is the construction state-of-the-art head office of New Metro City Gujar Khan (Will be operational in the next 8-9 month’s time period) on the crossroad of travel square.

At a short distance from this place, the point of gravity of New Metro City Gujar Khan which is a central location of the society comes. This place has easy and equal access to all destinations and roots of the society including all the main gates on GT road and motorway interchange.

From this central location when you displace towards the location of main gate number 2 of the society, you will come across the central Jamiaya Mosque of the society which is currently under construction and going to be completed on a preference basis to accomplish the religious and spiritual needs of the residents and visitors.

Visiting the Natural Lake within Society

If you have deeply studied the Master plan of New Metro City Gujjar Khan, you have noticed that there is a lake in the society map; it is a natural rainfall stream that is now going to be designed with the help of experts to turn it into a beautiful artificial lake.

Throughout this lake, there are several bridges constructed by the society administration to ease the commuting of the residents on the one hand and to enhance the beauty of society on the other hand.

Beyond this beautiful lake, anybody can see a bunch of beautifully installed Modern Street lights that show the way towards the second main gate of the society constructed on the main GT road.

Access points to the New Metro City Gujjar Khan

There are in total three main access points or main gates designated for New Metro City Gujjar Khan. Out of these two main gates are situated on the main GT road while the third main gate is nestled on the motorway interchange.

In the close locality of main gate number 2, there are specifically allocated sites of Root School System and New Metro City Gujar Khan Hospital. On these two sites construction, horticultural and developmental work has already been started and would be completed in six to eight months.

The location of main gate number 2 falls under the premises of the Early-Bird Block. So, when you move south from the early bird block towards A, B, and C Blocks, their designated area starts from the elegantly constructed railway bridge.

Concluding remarks on the virtual tour

After holistically visiting the New Metro City Gujar Khan, anybody (who is visiting) will conclude that this society is the massive magnitude society on Rawat to Jhelum road belt. On this 46 km long road, there would be a potential demand of 250000 houses shortly according to a study. Out of this, New Metro City Gujar Khan would only cater to the need of 17000 houses. It shows the potential real estate market in this vicinity.

So, this is bang on time to invest in New Metro City Gujar Khan to become a stakeholder in future property-related wealth in the country.

Price Difference Between DHA Gandhara and Other Societies

You may be looking to buy a residential plot in Islamabad, but you may be confused about choosing a good residential society. I suggest you invest in DHA Gandhara. I have shared a comprehensive price difference between DHA Gandhara and other societies. Additionally, I have discussed some benefits of investing in this project. Explore the blog for details.

Brief Comparison of DHA Gandhara with Other Societies

The 01 Kanal plot option in DHA Gandhara is a much better opportunity than other nearby residential societies. I have shared here a brief comparison:

1. Capital Smart City Vs DHA Gandhara

The Capital Smart City Islamabad is Rs 2.5 million more expensive than the DHA Gandhara for a 01 kanal plot price. The higher price of the Capital Smart City Islamabad is due to better infrastructure and facilities.

However, in the future, the DHA Gandhara may give better facilities and infrastructural development. So, it will outperform the value of the Capital Smart City Islamabad.

2. Faisal Town Phase 2 Vs DHA Gandhara

Although the Faisal Town Phase 2 costs 01 crore rupees, it also includes development charges in this price. However, after the launch and possession of DHA Gandhara, its price is expected to increase significantly. It will give higher returns on investments than the Faisal Town Phase 2.

3. Top City 1 Vs DHA Gandhara

A 1 kanal plot in Top City -1 costs around 2.5 to 3 crore rupees. This price is 3 to 4 times higher than a 01 kanal plot in DHA Gandhara. So, this price is not worth it.

Compared to these societies, a 1 Kanal plot in DHA Gandhara is worth it in all aspects. It is less costly, available on pre-launch rates, has a bigger brand value, and is a more secure investment. Therefore, you should prefer the DHA Gandhara over other societies.

Price Comparison with Other Societies

I have listed here the Price Difference Between DHA Gandhara and Other Societies in a table form:

Benefits of Investing in DHA Gandhara

Residential Plots in DHA Gandhara are a unique investment opportunity. It will come with the following advantages:

1. Low investment Cost

You can get a 1 Kanal plot in DHA Gandhara for 75,00,000/- rupees. It offers a low entry point to buy a residential plot in a premium real estate society in Pakistan.

2. High Brand Value

The Defence Housing Authority (DHA) is a premium real estate brand in Pakistan. It is famous for its premium infrastructure, top-quality lifestyle, and high-end facilities. Its strong brand value gives high returns on investment.

3. Big Appreciation Potential

Since the DHA Gandhara is in its pre-launch stage, it is available at highly low rates. Therefore, you can get high returns on investment by buying a plot in this project.

4. Legal Security

DHA Gandhara is a project of the Defence Housing Authority (DHA), a semi-government entity. It does not need any No-Objection Certificate (NOC) from government departments. Therefore, investing in this project will ensure you a secure asset without any legal disputes.

blogs.content:
DHA Phase 5 Islamabad , Location , Map and Prices

DHA Islamabad is a largest housing project spread across a large area of Zone- 5 Islamabad. This project is comprises of six phases and further divided into many sectors. But today, we are going to discuss the details of DHA Phase 5 that is currently developing and offering numbers of investment opportunities in it.

DHA Phase 5 Islamabad is beautifully comprising total seven sectors namely Sector A, B, C, D, F, G and H. Sector A, B, C and D have been given possession. However, the development work is moving on in Sector F, G and H but waiting for possession.

DHA Phase 5 is located on Islamabad Expressway across DHA Phase 2. This phase neighbors with Naval Anchorage on the north side. Having Canyon Views on the south side, however, Zaraj Housing and River Garden, both societies are located in its west. In the east of DHA Phase 5, Rawat Industrial Estate and DhokeKaak are located.

Available Properties & Average Prices

Both the residential and commercial plots as well as constructed houses are available in DHA Phase 5 Islamabad. Here you can invest in the residential plots of 5 Marla, 10 Marla, & 20 Marla.

The starting price of 5 Marla residential plots is 40 lacs to 50 lacs

10 Marla residential plots are available at the price of 65 lacs to 1.10 crore

The average price of 20 Marla residential plots is ranges between 90 lacs to 1.60 crore.

Moreover, the commercial plots of 4 Marla and 8 Marla are also available. The prices of commercial property is ranges between 3 crore to 6 crore.

Why Invest in DHA Phase 5

DHA Phase 5 Islamabad is attractive investors by offering greater investment and growth opportunities in it. One of the most prominent reasons to invest in Phase 5 is the flyover located over signal free eight lanes Islamabad Expressway that is a flagship project. Located on the ideal location, this phase is considered best for both living and investment. The prices of plots are reasonable and it is expected to rise in a period of 3 to 4 years. So now we can say that this phase has immense potential for growth and investment.

Changed APR Discount Policy

Previously the 7 Wonders City Islamabad administrations were offering an Annual Percentage Rate (APR) of only 50% of the total payment, but now they extended this offer to 100 % of the value of the plot.

It means that, if your plot’s total value is 16, 00,000 /- rupees, previously you were availing APR discount on only 8, 00,000 /- rupees and the rest of 8, 00,000 /- rupees you have to pay in regular installments without discount but now you can avail APR discount on the total amount.

The discount breakdown has been described in the given chart.

APR Discount Chart

Let’s assume that you have paid 55,000 /- rupees through the APR discount policy.This amount will be considered as 75,000 /- rupees with 20,000 /- rupees as a discount.

Out of it, 55,000 /- rupees will be adjusted in your half yearly Installment and the discounted 20,000 /- rupees will be considered as a monthly installment of the current month.

blogs.title: Election 2024 Impact on Real Estate Market
blogs.excerpt: In this blog, we are going to discuss the election 2024 impact on real estate market in detail. Read this blog till end.
blogs.content:
Election 2024 Impact on Real Estate Market

In this blog, we are going to discuss the election 2024 impact on real estate market in detail. Read this blog till the last line, if you have invested or are a potential investor in the real estate market of the country.

Before Election 2024 Impact on Real Estate Market

Unpredictability

For the last 2 years, Pakistan has been facing political instability and so economic. Due to the uncertainty of election-2024 in the country, investors are not making long-term commitments. Therefore the real estate market in the country facing a potential downfall.

Policy shift amid election 2024 impact on real estate market

Since before elections, the interim government has been ruling the country, therefore, their great chances of policy shifting afterwards. Obviously, the interim government cannot make long-term policy decisions due to less functional jurisdictions.

So, the new government after the election of 2024 in Pakistan will announce its long-term policy plans for all the sectors. Potentially, the real estate market will also face a paradigm shift in the core policies.

The volatile situation of the Market

Likewise ,the in-between period for the elections may mark the volatile condition of the real estate market of the country. Similarly, the potential investors will wait for the outcomes of the election before parking their investments.

Economic Challenges

Banks and other finance lending institutions become reluctant to commit finances in uncertain conditions. Henceforth, the ultimate condition will be a tighter market situation unfavorable for real estate investment.

Wait-and-see philosophy

A lot of real estate investors usually choose a wait-and-see approach before making any financial commitment before the election. Additionally, the purpose of this philosophy is to observe the after-election market trends and trajectories. In this way, they deal with potential risks and opportunities wisely.

Panic Selling amid election 2024 impact on real estate market

Before election-2024, the majority of people are doing panic selling due to low market trends and low motivation. It may include several other reasons such as, they may be selling their property out of need of money. Therefore, all these developments lead to an overall poor real estate market situation.

Huge taxes on the Property

Actually, the interim government put huge taxes on the property to generate their development revenue. This aggressive financial approach results in an unprecedented surge in property values in the country. The ultimate result is the reduction of property prices in the land of pure.

After Election 2024 Impact on Real Estate Market

A Public Responsible Government

After election-2024 an elected government will come into power which will be responsible for its actions to the people of Pakistan. They will take positive steps for the recovery of the economy and the real estate market of Pakistan. This will restore the trust of the investors to park investment in the real estate market.

Amnesty Scheme amid election 2024 impact on real estate market

As a usual practice in the country, every elected government gives an amnesty scheme to boost the economy. The purpose of this scheme is to turn black money into white at the cost of a meager tax percentage. In usual practice, people park their black money in the real estate market due to its easy appreciation feature. Ultimately, it will boost the real estate market of the country easily.

Every elected government in the country gives construction amnesty to boost the construction in the country. This construction is usually given in the form of reduced construction taxes. This ultimately results in the better growth of the real estate market of the country.

Growth of Allied Industries

Moreover, the real estate market of any country indirectly supports forty-plus allied industries and their thousands of employees. For the sake of this fact, every elected government took special initiatives for the construction industry. These special initiatives will definitely promote the real estate sector in the future.

The sole purpose of this blog is to save you from any future difficulty while dealing with property. Keep in mind the above information and share it with your friends and family circle.

Facilities and Amenities in Faisal Town Phase 2

Faisal Town Phase 2 offers the exemplary combo of ultra-modern and classic features, mixed with modern day facilities. Every detail has been aligned to provide the clients unmatched comfort and to build your life more convenient and appropriate.

Mission of Faisal Town Phase-2

We strive to keep our commitment to excellence by offering spectacular lifestyles that meet modern needs and desires and creating a healthy and extravagant environment. We aspire to envision the future of housing for people thru economic progress and development.

Recent Announcement to provide facilities in Faisal Town Phase-2

As per the recent official notice of Faisal Town Phase 2 administration, the following facilities and amenities would be provided in the society.

Traffic problems and solutions

A serene life away from city traffic and all kinds of urban pollution would be provided. Every street and Main Boulevard would be at least 40 feet and 350 feet wide respectively. All the intersociety roads would be signal-free.

Underground amenities network

A network of underground electricity and gas lines would be installed through the latest communication technology.

Security and Safety

Security clearance gates along with four-wall coverage would be constructed to provide 24/7 security to all the residents.

Educational Opportunities

A bunch of International standard schools, colleges, and universities would be constructed to educate the upcoming generations without leaving the society premises.

Sporting and gaming

An International sports district comprising of tennis court, a gym along with a swimming pool, and football and cricket stadiums of international standards would be constructed to maintain the physical fitness of the residents.

Miscellaneous

Mosques to fulfill the spiritual needs, petrol stations to replenish the commuting needs, and police stations to establish the confidence of the citizens would be constructed in the society, Moreover; State–of–the–Art Hospital and medical college would also be constructed in the society premises.

Central Business District (CBD)

A trailblazing Commercial and shopping arena along with a food court would be erected in Faisal Town Phase-2. Central Business District (CBD) would be constructed over here.

Infotainment

To realize the entertainment necessities of the aspiring residents a 3D Cinema would be set up, where modern-day infotainment would be provided in the society.

Horticultural Arena

Lush green Parks along with horticultural spaces developed in side-lines of children’s play areas would be outlined with the help of a horticulture maestro.

Event-full Society

Clubs, marquees, and community centers would be constructed in the society to entail the forthcoming events of multi-nature origins to make sure that the residents do not need to leave the society premises.

Pure Drinking water

Plentiful underground drinkable water with optimum PH and TRS is available, now you should not have to arrange water supply from out of the society destination. An underground overhead water tank facility would be provided across the society area.

Ultra-Modern Waste Management System

Waste management has always been a fundamental challenge for residents and the society administration, to decode this dare, the Faisal Town Phase 2 administration would install the Latest waste management system with renowned experts of international caliber.

blogs.content:
Faisal Hills Eid Offer: Avail 7% Off on Installment Payment and Escalation Charges

The Faisal Hills administration is offering an Eid Gift through the Faisal Hills Eid Offer. In Faisal Hills and Faisal Town Phase 2, advance installment payments are 7% discounted. Similarly, due installment payments are 5% discounted, and full payment of plots is 15% discounted.

Additionally, you can get a waiver on Annual Escalation Charges in the Faisal Hills Eid Offer. Let’s read the blog to know these offers in detail.

Detailed Explanation of Faisal Hills Eid Offer

The Faisal Hills Eid Offer has two different discounts for its valued members. One is on advance installment payment, and the other is on annual escalation charges. I have described here both these offers in detail:

Get 7% Off on Advance Installment Payment

The 7% off on advance installment payment will work in the following way:

How Will it Work?

You will pay your Faisal Hills plot installment in advance next month. You will receive a 7% discount on the total installment amount as a reward.

What Does it Mean?

For example, you will pay 1 million in installments for your plot in the next month. If you pay it now, you will pay only 930,000/—rupees and save 70,000/—rupees.

Wavier in Annual Escalation Charges

What are Annual Escalation Charges?

The annual increase in residential and commercial plot prices due to overall inflation and infrastructural development charges is known as Annual Escalation Charges. These charges are different for each society or project. However, they range around 10-15%.

What is in the Faisal Hills Eid Offer?

According to this offer, if you clear all pending dues in Faisal Hills Islamabad, the society will waive all your escalation charges (You do not need to pay annual escalation charges).

What Amount Can You Save with this Offer?

For instance, you can save around PKR 500,000/- for a 10-Marla residential plot over 3 years.

What is the Last Date of This Offer?

The last day to get this offer is Wednesday, April 23, 2025. You can pay your unsettled dues before or on this date.

Exclusive Eid Discount Offer in Faisal Town Phase 2

The administration has announced an Exclusive Eid Discount Offer in Phase 2 of Faisal Town. Here is the detail of this offer:

7 % Off on Advance Installment Payment

You will get 7% off on the advance payment of your plot installment in Phase 2 of Faisal Town.

Get a 15% Discount on Full Payment

It is 15% off for the full payment of your residential or commercial plot in Phase 2 of Faisal Town.

Pay the Due Installment and get 5% Off

You can get 5% off on the payment of your due installment in Faisal Town Phase 2.

Last Date to Avail Eid Discount Offer in Faisal Town Phase 2

The Exclusive Eid Discount offer in Faisal Town Phase 2 will end on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. Inflation is increasing in Pakistan. These offers will help you save a good amount of money and fight this wave of inflation.

Faisal Hills Islamabad: 2025 Development Progress and 2026 Plans

With the closing of 2025, the Faisal Hills Islamabad has proved itself to be the most in-demand and rapidly developing project in Islamabad and Rawalpindi.

This review blog will highlight Faisal Hills’ development work in 2025 and its goals for progress in 2026. Let’s read to explore the details.

Details of Development Work in All the Blocks of Faisal Hills, Islamabad

All the blocks of Faisal Hills have seen development works in 2025. Let’s discuss these blocks one by one in this regard:

Executive Block

The Executive Block has witnessed considerable development work. For instance, the inter-block roads and the main boulevard are completely developed, offering a magnificent entrance experience.

Currently, it is the most populated block with a reasonable number of house developments. This block also includes several well-known landmarks, such as the Faisal Jewel and the Roots International School campus, making it the center of educational and business activities.

Block A

This block of Faisal Hills is undergoing development work in various places. Its 225-foot-wide main boulevard is ready to provide access to the residents of this block.

Additionally, construction of commercial areas, a central hospital, and a grand community mosque is in progress at full speed. This development work will make the block the central business district for the residents of Faisal Hills.

Block B

Block B, offering a scenic view of the Margalla Hills. It has witnessed considerable development work in 2025. For example, the road development work is complete. Similarly, the residential and commercial plots are ready. Moreover, the green work at parks is underway to provide a peaceful lifestyle to its future residents.

Block C

It is the most preferred residential block of the residents of Faisal Hills. This block has seen substantial development. For instance, the plot cutting is complete for making it ready for possession and construction work. The main boulevard, service roads, and inter-block streets are open for residents.

This infrastructural development and connectivity of this sector to the CPEC route through the M-1 Motorway has increased its prices, making it a valued investment for its investors.

Block D

The biggest achievement of 2025 for the members of Faisal Hills Islamabad was obtaining possession of Block D. This progress has transformed the block from a file investment to a physical project. After possession, the plot owners have started the construction activities on the site.

This block is ready to live with all the facilities of daily life, including carpeted roads, parks, and a functional site office. This development will now increase the prices of plots in this block.

Prime Block

This block is a new addition to the Faisal Hills project line. The society administration has done notable development work in this block. For example, the 100-foot-wide main boulevard is fully functional for providing smooth connectivity to its residents and visitors.

The sewage lines and underground electricity installations are functional. In this way, the block is completely ready for the next phase of development work.

Provision of Modern Facilities

The society administration has fulfilled several promises to provide world-class facilities to the residents of Faisal Hills in 2025. For example, Faisal Hills has entered into an official collaboration with Unicorn Electric to provide Electric Vehicle (EV) buses to the residents of Faisal Hills, Islamabad.

This initiative will provide an eco-friendly environment for society members to commute internally without creating carbon prints.

Similarly, the Faisal Hills is highly serious for the healthcare of its residents. For this purpose, a 200-bed modern hospital is near its completion and will be operational shortly.

Additionally, the society administration is making necessary arrangements for the education of the young generation of Faisal Hills, Islamabad. Therefore, the campuses of established schools, colleges, and universities are fully functional in society’s premises.

Development Plans for 2026

The Construction of Faisal Jewel

The Faisal Jewel, an architectural miracle, will be the top preference of society in 2026. It is a 26-story vertical building in the Executive Block. At the end of 2025, the society will have completed the lower ground and three basement parking levels, and the construction on the first floor is in progress.

The goal for 2026 is to streamline the upward construction work to ensure the completion of residential and commercial towers.

Provision of Educational and Recreational Facilities

The year ahead will see the progress towards the groundbreaking of 101-Kanal University in the society’s premises. Similarly, construction work will start on the 171-Kanal Sports Complex that will include cricket grounds, a football facility, and tennis courts.

Additionally, the 18-Kanal Natural Park, which includes a natural hilly terrain, is also part of the future development plans.

In Progress: Possession–Delivery and Habitation

Just like the Block D possession handover, 2026 will also see more blocks of Faisal Hills being ready for possession. It will ultimately boost construction activity in the society and population settlement, to increase the market value of plots.

Final Thought

The swift development work and delivery of plot possession have boosted the investor’s confidence in Faisal Hills in 2025.

Moving forward in 2026, the development of renowned projects, such as the Faisal Jewel, the grand sports complex, the majestic university building, and other facilities, will benefit investors through considerable return on investment (ROI).

Why Invest in Faisal Town Phase 2?

Some of the benefits are listed below:

What are the Benefits of Investment in Real Estate?

An excellent investment return potential makes real estate one of the most lucrative businesses you can do. A real estate investment is only profitable if it is done correctly. There are several benefits to be gained from real estate investing; a few are listed below:

Stable Income:

A large number of people purchase real estate to make a passive income. This can be a large motivating factor to start and buy your first rental property. Location will affect how much you can earn, how much it could make you, and how much you spend.

You can make a lot of money investing in real estate and seeing a return quickly. For example, you can buy a property, develop it, buy a property that is already developed, and rent it monthly or yearly.

Long-Term Financial Security:

Having a home is often a person’s most valuable asset. A house will increase in value over time, making it an attractive investment for those who can afford it. For those not able to purchase a home, the next best option may be rental property ownership. Rental properties can provide an income stream to subsidize the day-to-day costs of living while also increasing their value over time.

Low risk compared to other investments:

When you invest in rental properties, there is no risk of losing any capital because rents can cover the cost of your monthly mortgage payments. In addition, owners have the opportunity to build equity and recoup their initial purchase price by selling or refinancing to get out from under those monthly payments.

Manageable:

Investing your hard-earned money into the property market is a smart decision, especially if you’re not yet prepared to make a full commitment. By purchasing real estate assets such as shares and land, you can supplement your regular income and get on the road to financial freedom.

Tax advantages:

Investing your money into a rental property will let you build equity and grow wealth, while also diversifying your investments. Additionally, if you ever need to use the property as collateral for a loan at some point down the line, you’ll have something valuable to offer. Finally, with recent changes in tax legislation that allow individuals to fully deduct their losses on these types of investments, it’s an even more attractive option.

Long-term capital appreciation:

An investment in the right property, at the right time, can lead to a life-changing windfall. Many people feel safer investing their money in something tangible. Real estate is one asset that always provides you with a return and pays dividends when it goes up in value.

Non-depreciable Asset:

A house is a non-depreciable asset. Non-depreciable assets include items that you would never have to get rid of, like real estate, a car, clothes, personal belongings, and family heirlooms. Whereas depreciable assets are those that decrease in value with time or use – cars go from nice and shiny to old and broken down as they continue to get used; clothes go from new to tattered when you wear them repeatedly.

Passive Income:

Passive income is money that an individual receives from an asset or business over which they have little control. This often occurs when someone purchases the property, such as a rental unit, and pays rent to themselves (to be self-renting) for the rest of their life. It’s typically set up with each passing generation purchasing the property from the previous generation at a predetermined price to not cause an undue burden on any one person.

How To Check the Results For Faisal Town Phase 2 Balloting?

On Monday, July 15, 2024, the Faisal Town Phase 2 Balloting event took place to allot plot numbers. In this blog, you will read about how to check the results of Faisal Town Phase 2 balloting. Moreover, you will read about the important announcements at the event by the society administration.

How To Check Faisal Town Phase 2 Balloting Results?

You can check your balloting results in Faisal Town Phase 2 by sending your details in a text message to society. Here is a step-by-step process to check balloting results in Faisal Town Phase 2:

Step 1: Check your registration number:

Check your Faisal Town Phase 2 plot file registration number on the first page or the recipient of the installment payment.

Step 2: Type text on your phone SMS:

Now, open your SMS text section. Type “FT2389”(Example).FT stands for Faisal Town, and 2389 is your plot file registration number.

Step 3: Send this SMS to the Faisal Town support team:

Next, send this typed text to the Faisal Town Support Team on 99095 through SMS on your Mobile Phone.

Step 4: Receive and understand the information:

You will receive the balloting results for your plot file in SMS. The SMS text will be Such as (Example): “Congratulations, Dear Asif, your plot No. is 123 in sector H-1 having size 50 x 90 in 3rd category of Faisal Town Phase-II.”

Save this information for future correspondence with the Faisal Town Phase-II administration.

Announcements by Chairman Faisal Town Group

At the moment of the balloting event, the Chairman of Faisal Town Group, Chudhary Abdul Majeed, made some important announcements:

These balloted plots will get possession within the 02-year time frame.

The plot value will double in 2 years to give you a lofty capital gain.

A 5-Marla plot in Faisal Town Phase-II will cost 28,00,000/- PKR. On the other hand, a 5-Marla plot in the exact location in the forthcoming DHA 9 will cost around 50,00,0000/- PKR.

You have more than one plot file in Faisal Town Phase II and cannot pay installments for all the files. Then, you can merge all the plot files in one file by filling out a simple application to the society administration.

You complete your 07 installments in General Block and 3 Installments in Overseas Block by August 20, 2024. You can get immediate possession of your balloted plot.

So, the individuals, who will receive the plot under this random draw will be the ones who would qualify. Therefore, here, we will discuss the balloting criteria for Faisal Town Phase 2.

Members category in Faisal Town Phase 2 Balloting Notification 2024

The society administration has categorized the participating individuals into a priority list depending upon their discharged payments.

First Priority Members

All those esteemed members who have bought plots on lump sum payments will be part of this category. These members have availed 20 % discount on the payment of full dues of the plot. These members can choose the plots of their choice among the available lot of plots.

Second Priority Members

This category holds all those members who have paid their 9 quarterly installments before the due date. There is a 9 % discount for this category members. They can also choose their preferred plots from a given plot inventory

Third Priority Members

The regular installment-paying members will be part of this category. This includes all those members who will pay six quarterly installments before the due date of payment. There is no discount for this category members as they are paying installments on a regular schedule.

Mandatory Notes in Faisal Town Phase 2 Balloting Notification 2024

Status of Development Work in Faisal Town Phase 2

The society administration has started construction of Faisal Town Phase 2 to deliver the plots to its members. Faisal Town holds the record for the fastest delivery of residential and commercial projects. We will explore the unique features of development work in Faisal Town Phase 2. Happy reading!

Distinctive Features of Development Work in Faisal Town Phase 2

Here are some unique features of development work in Faisal Town Phase 2:

Who is Developing the Faisal Town Phase 2?

Three renowned construction companies are doing the development work in Faisal Town Phase 2. Among these firms, one is CAM Construction (Pvt) Ltd. This firm belongs to Ch. Abdul Majeed (Chairman of Faisal Town Group).

It carries a major portion of Faisal Town Group and its associated projects. In Faisal Town Phase 2, this firm is giving the services of Mechanical Engineering work.

Secondly, Meinhardt is a world-class engineering, planning, and project management company working in 55 continents with its 05 offices.

The firm holds expertise in building, technology, infrastructure, and environment. In Faisal Town Phase 2, this firm is covering the technical work.

Thirdly, the Program Contractors Ltd (PCL) is an expert in metalwork, fabrication, and building. It is a global company that will supervise the construction work and maintain the international standards in Faisal Town Phase 2.

Distinctive Location

One of the best features of Faisal Town Phase 2 is its exclusive location. This housing project is accessible from major highways and neighboring cities.

Its location is on the edge of the M-2 Motorway, making it approachable only 05 minutes from Islamabad International Airport.

Moreover, this site is adjacent to Ring Road Rawalpindi and has connection points such as Thalian and Chakri Interchange with a distance of only 9 km road. The Faisal Town Phase 2 will expand to sectors I-15 and I-16. It shows its relevancy in Islamabad city.

Superior Quality Road Network

Under the development plan, Faisal Town Phase 2 has three parallel roads. Each road leads to different societal destinations. The first road will go to Chakri Interchange, the Second Road will lead to Thalian Interchange, and the third road will move to the forest land near this project.

Each road will be 350 feet wide. The construction quality will be superior and save society from urban flooding and other natural disasters.

Preservation of Natural Environment

Another unique feature of development work in the Faisal Town Phase 2 is its consideration for the natural beauty maintenance and the environment of the society.

The Faisal Town Phase 2 site has two natural distinctions. One is Marglla Hills, and the other is 60,000 Kanal Forest land.

The construction team is working to build the Jogging tracks parallel to the forest area. It will provide recreational opportunities to the residents and a natural environment for society.

Water Supply from Chauhan Dam

The development work in Faisal Town Phase 2 will be full of natural resources. One prime example is the abundant supply of natural water from the Chauhan Dam near the location of this residential project.

First Possession of Sialkot Motorway City is Just around the Corner

A run-down of Sialkot Motorway City

First possession of Sialkot Motorway City

The moment you sow a seed in the bed of soil, you start waiting for the day to bear the fruit.

Similarly, all those individuals who had invested in the Sialkot Motorway City at the time of launching were eagerly waiting for the day to bear the possession of their plots.

We are very pleased to inform you that, the possession day has come. As per the promise of the developers, the first Possession of Sialkot Motorway City is going to happen on Thursday, August 24, 2023.

All those members, who have booked their plots on 100 % payment, will be eligible for the possession.

After the possession is awarded, you can resale or hold your plot. You can also move to start construction of your dream home.

Location Overview of Sialkot Motorway City

The Sialkot Motorway City (SMC) is located on the main Sialkot- Wazirabad Road near the M-11 (Sialkot- Lahore) Motorway Interchange. The said location makes the society smoothly accessible from 360 angles of the city.

Sialkot Motorway City is nestled at 15 and 18 minute’s drive from Daska Road and Defense Road respectively. Similarly, you can reach Sialkot City and Sialkot Cantt in a drive of 30 minutes and 31 minutes while residing in Sialkot Motorway City.

Likewise, the Sialkot International Airport is located just a 7-minute drive from the society.

Adding to the approachability hallmarks, the Sialkot Motorway City (SMC) is encircled by several important landmarks of the region.

The list includes M-11 (Sialkot- Lahore) Motorway, Sahowala, Daska, Sambrial, Jalal Town, Sialkot City, Dogranwala, Defense Road, Nasheman City, Marala Ravi Link Canal, and Canal City Housing Society is the name to few.

NOC Status of Sialkot Motorway City

The Sialkot Motorway City has a valid NO- Objection Certificate (NOC) under the registration number TC/SMB/ 21/217 from the city district government of Sialkot. All aspiring investors should rest assured of the legitimacy of the project

Master planning of Sialkot Motorway City

A well-designed master plan guarantees the long-term success of any real Estate project. It ensures financial feasibility and efficient use of resources. The Sialkot Motorway City has a unique master plan designed by SURBANA JURONG.

SURBANA JURONG is one of the largest Asian-based urban and infrastructure Consulting firms. It has completed master planning in over 60 countries.

It has local and global footprints. In Pakistan, it has successfully designed The Lahore Smart City and The Capital Smart City. Furthermore, it has done Master Planning of Modern Singapore.

Infrastructural Development in Sialkot Motorway City

The Sialkot Motorway City was officially launched in May 2022, now after passing a year and 03 month’s time-laps; let’s examine the infrastructural development of the society.

To manifest the ground reality of the development work done, the team Property Naama Group has arranged an examination tour; the written depiction of this virtual tour is described below:

Bordering the main entrance, there is the Main Boulevard of the society, which is embellished with Smart street Lights, and tempting Horticultural artwork.

Coming next is the appealingly designed the Round About of the society, surrounded by a number of commercial squares which are at their finishing stage, ready to lift the economic beat of Sialkot city.

Upfront to the Round About, there are residential Blocks, comprising thousands of 5, 10 Marla, and 1 Kanal size ready to deliver residential Plots.

Adjacent to the residential block, there are commercial spaces that were developed as a priority to start economic activity in the society and have been delivered to the respective owners a year before.

The residential blocks and the rest of the society have been lined with sewerage, water, gas, electricity, and underground optical fiber lines.

The inter-society and street roads are readily carpeted to welcome the aspiring residents of society.

The grand Jamia mosque has already been inaugurated on April 13, 2023, to realize the religious and spiritual needs of the residents and visitors.

Now, the sports complex, day-care center, community center, and society main and sectoral parks are at the developing stage.

blogs.title: Future of Housing in Pakistan
blogs.excerpt: Future of Housing in Pakistan is a serious matter for public and stakeholders. I have described this challenge in detail. Read the blog.
blogs.content:
Future of Housing in Pakistan: Demand Trends for the Next 10 Years

Pakistan is on the verge of a housing crisis due to increasing population, demographics, urban migration trends, and other socioeconomic factors. It is a time to understand the challenge, the Future of Housing in Pakistan, and find a long-term solution. In this blog,

I will discuss the current state of housing demand, impacting factors, and solutions. Give a reading to explore the details.

Challenge of National Housing Deficit

Pakistan has a housing shortage of 10 million (with half the shortage in urban areas). According to the World Bank Report, “Towards a More Nuanced Approach to Measuring Housing Affordability Evidence from Pakistan”,47% of Pakistan’s population resides in overcrowded Areas at informal residencies (Kachi Abadis).

According to research, this housing shortfall will reach 20 million by the end of 2025 (If not addressed properly).

Factors Impacting the Future of Housing in Pakistan

Pakistan is passing through several socioeconomic transitions that have created a demand for housing in the country due to the following factors:

1. Fastly Growing Population

According to the Nation, Pakistan’s population is growing at a rate of 2.55 %, the highest in the region and among the top 30 countries of the world. Our population will reach 500 million in 2050.

Our increasing population will create demand for more housing units every year. Therefore, our country will need more houses in the future.

2. Increasing Youthful Demographics

Pakistan has 62.58 million individuals between 15 and 29 years, making it a youthful country. The young generation prefers a nuclear family, a joint family system. This fact will increase the demand for housing in the country, especially in urban areas.

3. Rapidly Growing Urbanization

The gap between a quality lifestyle and the availability of basic facilities such as education, healthcare, employment, and others is increasing in urban and rural areas.

Urbanization is growing rapidly, and this migration trend is creating demand for new houses and family apartments.

4. Emergence of the Middle Class

Recent economic developments and the rise of the gig and freelance economy have improved people’s economic status.

Due to this financial shift, Pakistan is witnessing the emergence of a new middle class that wants a quality lifestyle and housing with modern facilities. It has also created a demand for housing in the homeland.

These factors have several challenges and opportunities for stakeholders. However, with the right approach, dedication, and creative decisions, we can fulfill the housing demand and accommodate this growing population.

Property Naama Group’s Projects to Fulfil Housing Demand in Pakistan

Property Naama Group is a leading real estate developer in the country. Therefore, to fulfill the housing demand in Pakistan, we have launched these residential projects:

1. Umar Mid-Town Homes Rawalpindi

Located on Main Adyala Road, just minutes from Rawalpindi Saddar, Umar Mid-Town Homes offers modern, ready-to-move-in 2.5, 3, 4, and 5 Marla homes with flexible 1.5-year installment plans.

What Defines This Project?

Executive Villas promises quality living with a high-end design and flexible customization options.

3. Umar Chalets Murree

Discover Umar Chalets Murree, an exclusive residential haven just 3-4 minutes from the Murree Expressway. Developed by the trusted Property Naama Group, this TMA-approved project offers registry & Intiqal ownership, ensuring secure, hassle-free investment.

Why Umar Chalets Murree?

4. Umar Mall & Apartments

Nestled in the heart of Faisal Hills (B Block), GT Road, Taxila, Umar Mall & Apartments is where luxury meets smart investment.

Offering modern apartments, prime shops, and exclusive business suites. This HiRISE project is for those who seek elegance, convenience, and high returns.

5. Umar Aqua Farms Chakbeli Road Rawalpindi

Escape the city chaos and embrace luxury countryside living at Umar Aqua Farms, in Green Lake City, Rawalpindi. Just 400-500 meters from Chakbeli Road, this serene retreat offers ready-to-possess farm plots (3 to 5.25 Kanals) with immediate ownership transfer.

Why Umar Aqua Farms?

These residential projects consist of various sizes of ready houses, residential plots, luxury apartments, and farmhouses. So, you can buy a residential unit according to your budget and family requirements.

Conclusion

The next decade will be a game changer for Pakistan’s housing sector due to emerging demand, challenges, and opportunities. Whether you are a businessman, a retired citizen, or a young professional, you will need a house to live in and raise your family.

So, invest your precious money in an established housing project after consulting a real estate expert. Contact the property consultants of Property Naama Group to buy a house of your choice.

blogs.title: Future of Real Estate in Pakistan in 2025
blogs.excerpt: Future of Real Estate in Pakistan in 2025 is bright. I have discussed this topic with sound logics. Read the blog for details.
blogs.content:
Future of Real Estate in Pakistan in 2025

The real estate industry in Pakistan has been facing a bad phase for the last two to three years. However, the few months of 2024 to the first quarter of 2025 have been a good period for the real estate industry of Pakistan. Factors such as reduced interest rates, relaxation in property taxes, favorable government policies, and increased remittances have positively impacted the country’s real estate sector. Let’s discuss how these factors are helping to shape the Future of Real Estate in Pakistan in 2025.

Outlook of Pakistan’s Real Estate in 2025

In 2024, the real estate market showed moderate progress. Due to unexpected taxation and unfavorable government policies, the plot and file sector suffered badly, while the construction and rental sectors showed upward performance.

Pakistan has witnessed better economic trends in 2024. For example, the stock market crossed 100,000 points. Similarly, the interest rate dropped from 22% to nearly 12%.

These indicators positively impacted Pakistan’s real estate sector by attracting local and overseas Pakistani investment in the industry. For instance, Bahria Town Peshawar was launched in 2024. All these factors created a better environment for the real estate industry in 2025.

How Real Estate is Going in 2025?

Several factors are positively impacting the real estate industry in the country. These factors are changing the real estate industry in the following ways:

1. Significant Decrease in Interest Rate

The interest rate has decreased in the past year. For example, it was 22% in 2024 and has now reduced to 12%. It will be a great sign of economic recovery in the country.

People now prefer to invest their money in the real estate market instead of keeping it in banks for a minimal interest rate. It will boost the real estate sector in the remaining 07 months of 2025.

2. Historic Increase of Bank Deposits

Pakistan has witnessed a historic increase in its bank deposits of 32.32 trillion in April 2025. This milestone is due to increased remittances from overseas Pakistanis and the betterment of digital banking in Pakistan. It shows the people’s interest in the economy.

These deposits will pave the way for enhanced investments in the real estate sector and the recovery of the property market.

3. Increased Demand for Legitimate Projects

Legitimate residential and commercial projects are in high demand compared to the plot file sale. Legitimate HiRise projects such as Umar Mall and Apartments, Umar Reveria Bahria Town, and Umar District Tower Bahria Town have won the public interest.

Therefore, these commercial projects and established housing societies, such as Blue World City, Bahria Town, and Faisal Hills, will be in high demand in 2025 and onward.

4. Real Estate-Friendly Government Policies

The Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz Sharif has launched the Apni Zameen Apna Ghar initiative. Under this program, deserving citizens will get free residential plots to construct their houses. These kinds of infrastructure will boost the real estate sector in the country. Therefore, the future of real estate is bright in 2025.

5. Relaxation in Taxes

The Federal Government of Pakistan has removed the Federal Excise Duty (FED) for property buyers in the country. Therefore, these tax relaxations are good indicators for the real estate market.

Conclusion

The demand for 10 million houses and a 12% annual growth rate is making the future of real estate in Pakistan bright in 2025.

Additionally, government initiatives such as the launch of the Apni Zameen Apna Ghar scheme and the removal of Federal Excise Duty (FED) are paving the way for the industry’s recovery.

Choosing the winning property is crucial for the maximum leverage of the real estate market recovery. Therefore, invest with an established real estate organization like Property Naama Group. Best of Luck!

blogs.title: General Block Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi
blogs.excerpt: All members with residential or commercial plots in the General Block of Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi have bad news.
blogs.content:
General Block Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi: Imposition of Section 4 and its Solution

All members with residential or commercial plots in the General Block of Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi have bad news. The Ring Road Rawalpindi (RRR) passes through the General Block of Ring Road Rawalpindi. To ensure smooth construction work on the RRR site, the Punjab Government has imposed Section 4 on all the sites through which construction will happen. Most of the General Block Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi comes under this area.

What is Section 4?

Under section 4, the Punjab Revenue Board will acquire the required land for Ring Road Rawalpindi (RRR) from the citizens at the market rate.

Moreover, Section 4 will remain applicable to the adjacent areas of RRR until the construction. So, any development work will not happen in these areas until further order.

What is the Future of General Block RRR?

After section 4, further development work will not happen in the General Block Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi. Therefore, the delivery of possession for residential and commercial plots in this block will be delayed until the Ring Road Rawalpindi is completed.

What is the Way Forward?

Property Naama Group always has a solution for its valued customers. You can get ready or semi-ready residential or commercial plots in the other blocks of Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi.

Solution for 07 Marla or Above Residential Plots

All members with a 07 Marla or above residential plot in the General Block will get the same size plot in the Executive Block of Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi.

Way Forward for Below 07 Marla Size Residential Plots

If you have a residential plot below 07 Marla in the Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi, you will be in the H block of the society with the same size plot.

Future of Commercial Plots in General Block

The valued members who have commercial plots in the General Block Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi will get the commercial plots in the Executive Block.

Important Notes

What Benefits Will You Get?

Shifting your residential and commercial plots in the Executive and H Blocks of the Rudn Enclave Rawalpindi will give you the following benefits:
