How to Do Safe Property Investment in Pakistan?

Property investment has always been a top priority for people in Pakistan to gain financial gains. However, working in the property market is not as simple as just buying or selling a plot at a higher price. Instead, it involves several best practices to make your investments secure and profitable. Therefore, I have answered the question, How to Do Safe Property Investment in Pakistan? With some important steps to invest in Pakistani real estate and reap maximum benefits.

Simple Guide For Property Investment In Pakistan

Here is a simple guide to make property investments and get maximum returns. Follow these simple steps:

1. Define your Property Investment Goals

Start by defining your investment goals and budget. Deciding on your investment budget will give you a clear idea of market research. Similarly, finalize the place of your investment.

You want to invest in urban or rural areas. Additionally, make it clear that you are investing in the property for rental income or long-term profit.

2. Property Research

Once you have decided on your requirements and investment goals, search for your ideal property. You can do this research in the following ways:

3. Buy the Property

Now you have narrowed down the property options to invest in. Next, select the property you want to buy. Do proper due diligence of the property through your lawyer. Always buy a legitimate property approved by government authorities.

4. Hold your Property or Find a Good Tenant

Now have two options. Hold it for a long period for the best Returns or find a good tenant to get a rental yield. In both cases, hire a realtor or a real estate consultation firm. They will help you to make better decisions.

5. Selling Your Property

The next step is to sell your property after holding it for a considerable time. This step is very crucial as it will define the success or failure of your investment. Therefore, you need to follow these mandatory steps to get the best returns on your investments:

Approach Multiple Resources

Do not rely on a single resource to determine the rate of your property. For example, do only stick to your nearest property dealer, friend, or family member. Instead, try multiple ways, such as online property portals like www.propertynaama.com, local newspaper classified ads, social media, and other such platforms.

Meet the Buyer Face-to-Face

Meet the buyer directly face-to-face instead of relying on a middleman. It will help you find the accurate rate and requirements of the buyer.

Take Token Money

Try to take the token money of your property as early as possible. It will help to confirm the property deal without possible delays and fraudulent activities. The token money will typically be between 50,000 and 100,000 rupees.

Avoid Dealing in Cash

Do not deal in cash; instead, make property dealings through checks and pay orders. This practice will help to keep a record of property dealings and avoid disputes or fraudulent activity.

Final Thought

Buying a property in Pakistan and making profits is not easy at all. But it is possible if you follow this guide, ” How to Do Safe Property Investment in Pakistan?”. blogs.title: IMF Grants Tax Relief to First-Time Homebuyers in Pakistan
blogs.excerpt: IMF Grants Tax Relief to First-Time Homebuyers in Pakistan. It is a great news. Read the details in the blog.
blogs.content:
IMF Grants Tax Relief to First-Time Homebuyers in Pakistan

The IMF grants tax relief to first-time homebuyers in Pakistan. It will help low-income individuals and the Pakistani economy through the revival of the real estate industry. I will share the details of this tax relief and its subsequent impact on the Pakistani economy and property market. Explore the details in the blog.

Details of the IMF Grants Tax Relief to First-Time Homebuyers in Pakistan

The IMF has allowed the Federal Government of Pakistan to relax taxes on property buyers in the following categories:

Exemption of Federal Excise Duty (FED) for First-Time Property Buyers

The Federal Excise Duty (FED) has been waived (Withdrawal) for first-time property buyers in Pakistan.

Note: Before that, it was for all kinds of property transactions.

Explanation

Buying a property worth 10,00,000/- PKR as a first-time buyer will save you PKR 200,000/- taxes (2% FED Rate).

Why is This Relaxation?

It is for middle-class individuals and young professionals to invest in real estate and boost economic activity in the country.

Payment of Complete Taxes on the Subsequent Payments

You will pay the complete Federal Excise Duty (FED) and withholding taxes on purchasing the second property.

What Will be the Impact on Investors?

Property investors selling residential and commercial properties or buying more properties will pay high taxes.

Existing Property Sales Taxes Will Remain the Same

Capital Gain Tax

The property sellers will have to pay 5-15% tax based on the period they hold the property.

Property Withholding Tax

You will pay a 3-7 % property withholding tax. It will remain the same.

How does the IMF Grant Tax Relief to First-Time Homebuyers in Pakistan Help Real Estate?

The changes in property taxes after IMF approval will help to revive the real estate sector in Pakistan due to these factors:

For First-Time House Buyers

5M house will cost 100,000/- rupees less (for first-time home buyers). Therefore, it will increase the buying power and improve the real estate industry in the country.

Long-term Real Estate Investments

The investor will now prefer long-term real estate investments. He will avoid frequent selling and buying of properties due to higher taxes.

Growth in the Rental Market

Property owners will now prefer to put their properties on taxes instead of selling to save on property taxes. So, the rental market will boost the overall economy.

Economic Implications

According to Statista, the real estate market will reach US$2.08 TN in 2025. Therefore, the demand for property will create several jobs directly and indirectly.

What will not Change After this Tax Relief?

Despite the different changes in property taxes, the following taxes and regulations will remain the same:

Property Withholding Taxes

The property withholding tax will remain the same. For example, it will be 3% for fillers, 7% for non-fillers

Source: The FBR Circular No.12/2024

The capital gain tax will remain the same for the designated property holding period.

Conclusion

This IMF-approved tax relief will be a stepping stone for the Pakistani real estate market recovery. Additionally, it will help several middle-class individuals to buy their first home.

Does the IMF grant tax relief to first-time homebuyers in Pakistan that applies to commercial properties?

No, this tax exemption is only for residential properties.

Are Overseas Pakistanis also eligible for this offer?

Yes, overseas Pakistanis who are first-time property buyers can avail of this offer.

Do these taxes apply to inherited properties?

No, these property taxes do not apply to inherited properties because they are not purchased.

blogs.title: Impact of FBR Raises Property Valuation
blogs.excerpt: What will be the Impact of FBR Raises Property Valuation is a matter of concern for customers and realtors. Read details in the blog.
blogs.content:
Impact of FBR Raises Property Valuation

The Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) has announced an increase in Property valuation rates in 56 cities in Pakistan. The new valuation will be effective from November 01, 2024. What will be the Impact of FBR Raises Property Valuation is a matter of concern for customers and realtors. It is an effort to balance the Official property rates (DC rate of property) with the actual rates in the market.

According to the new valuation notification by FBR Pakistan, the new property rates will apply to residential, commercial, and industrial properties.

Why has FBR increased Property Valuation Rates?

There was a significant gap between the official property value and market value for many years. It results in a lower collection of property taxes. FBR Pakistan has gradually increased its property valuation from 2018 to 2022. However, the enforcement of the revised property valuation has started now. It seems that property valuation has risen in various cities of Pakistan.

According to Chairman FBR Mr.Rashid Mahmood Langrial, the sole purpose of the property valuation increase is to reduce property tax underreporting, increase tax transparency, and enhance revenue collection.

Cities Under Impact of FBR Raises Property Valuation

This property valuation rate increase is for various cities across Pakistan, from metropolitan to lower cities. Here is the list of cities:

Despite that, other small cities are part of the list, totaling 56 cities.

Impact of this Policy on the Customer and Real Estate Market

The recent hike in official property valuations across 56 cities in Pakistan, aimed at increasing property tax revenue, is likely to have a notable impact on customers and the real estate sector.

Impact on Customers

It will affect the customers in the following ways:

Increased Transaction Costs

Higher property valuations will increase taxes such as Capital Gains Tax (CGT) and Stamp Duty. It could lead to increased costs for buyers and sellers, especially in urban areas where valuations are higher, discouraging some potential buyers.

Reduced Affordability

With increased transaction costs, home buyers, particularly middle-income and first-time buyers, may find it harder to afford properties. It could result in slower sales and reduced demand in the market, particularly for higher-end properties, where tax burdens are more substantial.

Shift to Informal Transactions

Higher taxes might encourage some customers to undervalue properties or engage in cash-based transactions to avoid full tax liabilities, increasing informal and potentially less transparent transactions.

Impact on the Real Estate Sector

It will influence the real estate market of Pakistan in the following ways:

Market Slowdown

Higher property taxes can cool down the real estate market as transaction volumes may drop. Reduced demand might particularly impact speculative investors who rely on quick turnover and profit, possibly leading to a short-term slowdown in activity.

Potential Price Adjustments

Real estate developers and sellers may lower asking prices or offer incentives to offset higher tax costs for buyers. It could stabilize or even reduce property prices in some areas.

Shift in Investment Focus

As profit margins reduce in urban centers due to higher taxes, investors may look toward secondary cities or emerging areas where valuations (and hence taxes) remain comparatively low, potentially promoting growth.

blogs.title: Impact of Market Situation on Different Types of Properties
blogs.excerpt: Since the last two years, the economy of Pakistan, and the real estate market of the country has been facing recession-like situation.
blogs.content:
Impact of Market Situation on Different Types of Properties

Since the last two years, the economy of Pakistan, and specifically the real estate market of the country has been facing recession-like situation.

The real-estate market has witnessed a record low trajectory of sales and investment along with a decline in property prices.

Expert advice is a much-needed thing for any potential real estate investor to tackle this grieved situation wisely.

In this important blog, a deep analysis and an insight into future market situation has been explored, read till the last line to get an expert opinion on the right time.

Impact on Residential Properties

Residential Plot File

Any residential plot file that is booked on a 2 to 3-year installment plan and would be ready in the year 2025 or 2026 is out of the danger zone.

This type of Property will mature after a 2 to 3-year time frame when this low-trend market phase passes away. So, you can get an adequate capital gain.

But, there are several prerequisites to get this capital gain.

Ready or Near to Possession Residential Plot

If you have bought a residential plot on cash and are ready to get possession or already have taken possession, it can have following future options.

For example, if you have a residential plot in Bahria Town worth 80,00,000 /-Rupees, it will be sold out at 70,00,000 /-Rupees with a net loss of 10,00,000 /-Rupees.

Impact on Commercial Properties

The same rule is applied for commercial properties; you will be in a safe zone if you can hold the commercial property for 2 to 3 years of the plan. If you want to sell it now, you may get a profit drop or even a loss statement in hand.

The rental situation for a commercial property is different in this downward market trajectory phase.

If you have a property in a high population density area, you will be in a safe zone because you will get a decent rental income but if you have a property in an abandoned place, then you will be in a danger zone with zero rental income and potential loss in property capital gain.

What is the Way Forward?

At Property Naama Group, a team of property consultants has designed a way forward for our clients and the people of Pakistan to come out of this phase of recession and the trembling state of the economy.

Here are some suggestions to consider

Prefer Established Brands

Always invest with established and registered real estate developers and investment groups.

Avoid Interest-Based Deals

Do not invest in real estate projects that are dealing in fiscal interest-based investments.

Invest with real estate developers who have on-ground stakes in the market in the form of Commercial HiRISE projects or proven residential investments.

Choose Ready to possession

In these circumstances, prefer to invest in ready to possession plot instead of an installment file. The ready plot will be affected by 15% as compared to residential plots which will be affected at the rate of 20 % in this property recession in Pakistan.

Silver Lining

Get a fair benefit of the silver lining in this disguise. It means prefer to buy Properties, particularly in this low market time at low rates. This substantial price gap along with future annual property appreciation of 15 to 20 % will prove a great deal of profit gain for wise investors.

Go With Long Term Deals

Always prefer to invest in long-term real estate investment plans instead of short-term profit gains.Choose to invest in a property that has high clientele demand instead of a preliminary stage property with zero customer intent.

blogs.title: Inauguration of Margalla Avenue | Complete details
blogs.excerpt: The Country’s premier has Inaugurated of Margalla Avenue Phase 1 of the project which comprises 5.5 Km out of 35 Km .
blogs.content:
Inauguration of Margalla Avenue and the way forward

Honorable Prime Minister of Pakistan Mian Muhammad Shehbaz Sharif inaugurated the long-awaited Margalla Avenue Project on Tuesday, June 20, 2023, in Islamabad. The avenue will connect new sectors of Islamabad with GT Road.

The Country’s premier has inaugurated Phase 1 of the project which comprises 5.5 Km out of 35 Km in total length of Margalla Avenue.

Connecting the dots with Margalla Avenue

Phase 1 of the avenue incorporates the construction of a road from the E-12 toll plaza to Grand Trunk Road. This six-lane commuting project is completed at a total cost of 4 billion rupees.

These six lanes of Margalla Avenue as an important segment of Rawalpindi Ring Road will link Sangjani on GT Road while BaharaKahu (Murree Expressway) and Islamabad City on the east and west side respectively.

The celebrated Margalla Avenue will provide an alternative route to the Srinagar Highway to provide hassle-free access to the N-5 National Highway.

Margalla Avenue will expand from Grand Trunk (GT) Road to D-12 to connect to Khayaban-I-Iqbal due to the completion of the construction of an interchange and the remaining section of 11th Avenue. All these particulars are meant to reduce the traffic load on Srinagar Highway.

As per the given information, the project has gone through a few mandatory changes. The road consisted of four lanes (two on each side) earlier; now, it has been upgraded to a six-lane road. The road’s built-in quality is according to motorway standards.

The reduced commuting time

The Margalla Avenue will limit the travel time to just 7 minutes from Sangjani to Islamabad City.

The distance from D-12 to GT Road takes 40 to 50 Minutes of travel time which will be reduced to 10 to 12 Minutes after the completion of the avenue.

Previously, you could travel from Islamabad to CDA Sector B-17 Islamabad (Multi Gardens) in an hour time which has now cut-down to 15 minutes.

Immediate Impact on the Surrounding Real Estate Market

Comparison: CDA Sector B-17 vs. Faisal Hills Islamabad

As discussed above, the distance from CDA Sector B-17 to Islamabad has been reduced to 15 minutes from an hour; this fact has increased the real estate location of B-17 and Faisal Hills in comparison to properties in D-12.

For Instance 1 Kanal Plot in CDA Sector D-12 as of today is 12 to 13 Crore Rupees while the same size plot at 15 minutes distance in Faisal hills Islamabad is of 2 to 2.25 Crore Rupees.

Facilities in D-12 and Fasil Hills Islamabad

The flip side of the argument is that CDA Sector D-12 does not have up to the par basic facilities such as 24/7 Security, a designated administrative system, carpeted roads, colleges, universities, a water filtration plant, a stadium, mosques, a regular maintenance system, gated community.

On the contrary, the Fasil Hills has 24/7 Security, a designated administrative system, newly constructed carpeted roads, Roots International School and College System, a university campus, Ride and Tide Park, Cricket and Football stadium, Main Boulevard, downtown commercial, water filtration plan, and gated community are the name to few.

Get benefited with Property Naama Group

The decreased distance between renowned destinations encircling Margalla Avenue will result in the proportionality of property rates. Due to this much-needed development, the price chart of the real estate market of twin cities will be revised.

Here at Property Naama Group, we have a huge real estate portfolio on Margalla Avenue to cater to your ever-changing housing and commercial needs.

From the platform of Property Naama Group, we can offer residential plots for PKR 50, 00,000 /- and Commercial Properties (Flat, Shop, etc.) for PKR 70, 00,000 /- in Faisal Hills Islamabad with an easy installment plan.

The commercial shop which is being offered in CDA Sector D-12 is 5 Crore rupees, we will give same sized shop in Umar Hills Mall And Apartment situated in Faisal Hills Islamabad in just 1.25 Crore Rupees which would be profitable with a capital gain of 2 Crore Rupees in recent future.

You can book your commercial flat or shop in Umar Hills Mall and Apartment today with 3 3-year easy Installment plan and 10 % Down Payment.

blogs.title: Iran vs America Conflict 2026
blogs.excerpt: In this blog post you will read about the Iran vs America Conflict 2026, its short description, impact on the world and way forward.
blogs.content:
Iran vs America Conflict 2026: What Happened and What It Means for the World

The Year 2026 has faced one of the most severe geopolitical crises in modern history. The growing Iran vs America Conflict 2026 has pushed the Middle East to the brink of destruction.

It has sent shock waves across the global economy, energy markets, and financial structures. In this piece of writing, you will read about the summary of this conflict, how it is impacting the world, and the status of the issue today.

A Brief Description of Conflict

The historic tensions between Iran, the US, and Israel turn into a full-fledged war on February 28, 2026.The United States and Israel jointly attack, targeting key leadership and the nuclear program.

In response, Iran fired missiles at the regional bases of the USA and Israel and closed the Strait of Hormuz. Ultimately, this regional conflict evolved into a global issue, garnering attention from world stakeholders.

What is the Economic Impact on the World?

Increase in Oil Prices

The instant economic effect was a heavy spike in global oil prices. Since Iran is one of the world’s largest oil producers and controls 20 % of the world’s oil supply through the Strait of Hormuz, any attack on it would put the global energy market under stress. During the conflict, crude oil prices increase, making fuel expensive in Europe, Asia, and other regions.

Inflation Hit-High Worldwide

The increase in fuel prices triggered chaos in the global economy. Eventually, transportation becomes expensive, manufacturing costs rise, and prices of every essential commodity increase.

Countries fighting the post-pandemic price hikes were under even higher economic pressure. Struggling economies even faced worse consequences because their currencies became weak against the dollar, resulting in rising import bills.

The Crisis of the Strait of Hormuz

The closure of the Strait of Hormuz by Iran becomes the peak point of this conflict. This waterway links the Persian Gulf to the open ocean. Additionally, it allows a routine oil supply to Europe and Asia.

The closure caused a global panic because it directly impacted global shipping, increased cargo vessel insurance costs, and resulted in a global fuel shortage.

Situation of Stock Markets

The financial markets around the globe were under stress due to investors’ safe choices. It caused stock indices to drop in Asia, Europe, and the Gulf regions. Additionally, the global real estate market experienced a slowdown.

A Two-Week Ceasefire through Pakistan’s Mediation

In a successful diplomatic move, Pakistan becomes a mediator between the US and Iran, leading to a two-week ceasefire. Under this agreement, the US and Israel agreed to stop attacks, and Iran opened the Strait of Hormuz for international shipping.

Then, peace talks were scheduled in Islamabad, allowing both countries to resolve the issue diplomatically. This ceasefire brings immediate relief to international markets. Now, the oil prices are decreasing, investors’ confidence is restoring, and global economies are recovering, especially in the Gulf region.

What Does the Future Look Like?

The future of this ceasefire remains uncertain. It depends on the outcome of negotiations in Islamabad between the two countries. If diplomacy wins a long-lasting agreement, then regional stability and the global market could recover. However, if talks become ineffective and war resumes, the world will see another phase of economic stress.

What this conflict teaches us is that geopolitics and economies are closely connected. The energy stability, trade routes, and market confidence can change overnight when the Middle East becomes unstable.

Closing Thought

The Iran vs America Conflict 2026 is a wake-up call about how fragile global peace and stability are. Pakistan’s diplomacy has given a much-needed relief and an opportunity for peace. The world is hoping that the dialogue moves forward positively and the global economy will stabilize.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Why is the US at war with Iran?

The US and Israel have been in a war with Iran since April 2026 to neutralize its nuclear program, destroy its missile capabilities, and do regime change.

Who started the Iran-Israel war in 2026?

The 2026 Iran war began on February 28, 2026, when the United States and Israel jointly attacked Iran to kill its top leadership, including Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

How long will the Iran-US War ceasefire last?

The Iran-US 2026 war is 2 weeks long and hopefully will end soon.

blogs.title: Is Real Estate a Good Investment? Reality & Facts 2O24
blogs.excerpt: Is Real Estate a Good Investment? rental properties can be a helping hand against inflation low tax than other industries.
blogs.content:
Is Real Estate a Good Investment?

Real estate is a wise investment option as rental properties can be a helping hand against inflation, and real estate costs less tax than investment in other industries.

However, it can be a liability in economic downturns, stressful tasks of real estate management, and frequent maintenance of rental properties can be very costly. I will explain all these aspects thoroughly in this blog.

What is Real Estate Investment?

Real estate investment involves purchasing, managing, selling, giving, or renting residential or commercial properties for profit.

What are the Types of Real Estate Investment?

Advantages of Real Estate Investment

These are some advantages associated with the real estate investment:

Rental Properties as a Safeguard Against Inflation

When inflation rises in a country, the property rents follow the same path. However, the mortgage and house loan interest remain the same.

In this way, your rental income will protect you against rising inflation. Moreover, you will also get financial benefits from the capital gain on your property.

History of Real Estate Price Hike

The real estate industry has seen ups and downs like other industries. However, the bouncing-back factor is prominent in this sector.

The Properties have always witnessed an increase in prices over time. Therefore, real estate is the best option for long-term investments.

Privilege of Tax-free Investment

Another privilege of investing in real estate is the exemption from taxes. In comparison, you will pay heavy taxes if you do other investments such as stocks, gold, bonds, etc. You can take home a sizeable chunk of your investment returns.

Stable Return on Investment (ROI)

The rental income is stable compared to the dividends from any other investment. For example, the returns from the stock market and bonds are highly unpredictable and unstable.

It has always been hard to meet the housing needs of around 8 billion people. Therefore, the supply-demand gap of residential units will boost their prices. So, it is safe to invest in real estate.

Drawbacks of Real Estate Investment

Here are some drawbacks of real estate investment:

The one drawback of real estate investment is the heavy maintenance costs. Due to rising inflation, labor and material costs continually increase. It makes it hard to maintain the property.

At the same time, other investments, such as stocks, do not have any maintenance cost.

Due to the low inventory of residential and commercial properties, their prices are increasing yearly.

Therefore, investing in real estate will not be easy for low-income classes of society. So, real estate investment will no longer be the common man’s investment option.

Rental Income is Not Easy Money

All the real estate investments do not turn into a passive income source. There can be several unpredictable issues if you are a first-time investor. For example, frequent shifting of tenants can be a hurdle in a permanent rental income.

Moreover, finding new tenants every time and giving heavy commissions to real estate agents may frustrate the new landlords, ending in their giving up on real estate investment.

The real estate market is always at risk of fluctuations. Economic decline, oscillating interest rates, and changing local market conditions can all impact property values and rental income.

Investing in real estate and making a profit is not an easy job. However, several advantages dominate its disadvantages. Your correct decision to do insurance for your rental money can save you from costly maintenance and the worst repercussions of inflation.

End of the day, investing in real estate or any other industry involves many factors, such as your interest, budget, previous investment experience, and more.

Consider all these factors, thoroughly navigate the advantages and disadvantages of real estate, and then make a wise decision about whether investment in real estate is good for you or not. Best of Luck!

Ismail’s inclusion in the Islamabad Estate Agents Association (IEAA)marks a positive step for the real estate industry in Islamabad. His membership reinforces professionalism, ethical practices, and transparency in property dealings, ensuring that buyers and investors receive reliable guidance.

With his extensive experience in residential and commercial properties, M. Ismail brings valuable market insights and investment opportunities, benefiting clients and fellow agents alike.

His presence within the IEAA strengthens buyer confidence, reduces the risk of fraud, and contributes to the city’s real estate growth.

By aligning with industry standards and collaborating with other professionals, he will play a key role in fostering trust, attracting new investments, and shaping a more secure property market in Islamabad.

Conclusion

Wrapping up the discussion. Islamabad’s property market is growing. Having trusted professionals like M. Ismail within the IEAA ensures safer transactions, better investment opportunities, and enhanced market credibility.

Whether you’re an investor, buyer, or fellow agent, working with IEAA-certified members like M. Ismail guarantees a more secure and rewarding real estate experience.

blogs.title: The Kharian-Rawalpindi Motorway | Overview | Planning | Progress
blogs.excerpt: The Kharian-Rawalpindi Motorway.The Kharian-Rawalpindi Motorway project, located in the Punjab province of Pakistan.
blogs.content:
The Kharian-Rawalpindi Motorway: A Road to Progress

The Kharian-Rawalpindi Motorway

The Kharian-Rawalpindi Motorway project, located in the Punjab province of Pakistan, will be built to serve over 40 million people who live along the route from Rawalpindi to Kharian, and will greatly improve the connectivity and economic activity of this historically important region. Once completed, the motorway will provide travelers with direct access to several major cities in the region, including Islamabad, Lahore, Faisalabad, Multan and Sialkot.

Project Details

As a new motorway facility, it will continue to operate along the currently operating Lahore-Sialkot Motorway and the under-construction Sialkot-Kharian Motorway. The project begins at the Sialkot-Kharian Motorway junction interchange near Kharian and ends near T-Chowk near Rawalpindi/Islamabad.

The proposed motorway travels along the same side of the N-5 as these populated places: Jhelum, Mangla, Dina, Sohawa, Gujar Khan, Mandra, and ends near Rawat near T-Chowk (the place where the Islamabad Expressway intersects with the N-5).

Taking into account traffic volumes, the project motorway designed as an access-controlled four-lane facility. Which will expanded to six lanes based on the Level of Service (LOS) requirements.

Intelligent Transport Systems (ITS) will included for safer and more efficient road operations. The design is based on NHA specifications. The alignment/route of the motorway facility chosen in consideration of future connectivity with other planned facilities.

ECNEC Approved

The Executive Committee of the National Economic Council (Ecnec) has approved the construction of the Kharian-Rawalpindi motorway. The cost of project is Rs 108.41 billion. The motorway will built on a Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT) basis under the Public-Private Partnership (PPP) mode. NHA will be responsible for maintenance and operations.

Project Completion Time Frame

The Kharian-Rawalpindi Motorway a project that will cost Rs 108.41 billion. And will executed on a Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT) basis under the Public-Private Partnership (PPP) mode. The project would completed in two years and the total length of the motorway is 117.2 kilometers. This project will mean progress for people in cities along the route by providing them with a modern, efficient transportation option.

Contact Us

Property Naama Consultant , Best Investment Company.

Head Office # 1st to 3rd Floor Plaza No 65, River View commercial, Bahria Town Phase 7 Rawalpindi

General Block: The largest block, offering affordable residential plots of various sizes.

It indicates that Kingdom Valley Islamabad is not only growing but also evolving into a full-fledged smart community.

Lahore Smart City 2nd Balloting and Discounted Policy

Lahore Smart City administration has come up with two important developments: A special discount policy and 2nd Balloting of the society.

In this blog post, the key detail of these two developments has been proclaimed for the awareness and investment decision of our esteemed readers and aspiring clients.

Read to the last line to get complete insights about the latest policy developments in Lahore Smart City.

Discount Policy in Lahore Smart City

Owing to the current economic condition and surging inflation in the country the Lahore Smart City leadership has decided to stand by its valued members to support them financially.

In this regard, the society administration has structured a special discount policy as per the following standard operating procedures (SOPs):

Note:

This discount Policy is applicable only from August 28, 2023, to September 16, 2023.

Priority Policy for Location Selection

The location-allocation of 2nd balloting will start on 18th September 2023 In Sha Allah.

All those members who have the 2nd balloting location selection acknowledgment slip(s) are directed to deposit their pending installment before 16 September 2023 by not only taking the advantage of new discount policy but also becoming eligible for the selection of plots.

In case, any member fails to deposit the due installment before 16th September 2023, their selection of their own choice will be forfeited. Also, do not wait for the last date as priority of selection will be given as per the following schedule.

1st Priority Selection

The 1st Priority of Selection will be given to the members who will deposit their outstanding installments between 21st August and 26th August 2023.

2nd Priority Selection

The 2nd Priority of Selection will be given to the members who will deposit their outstanding installments between 28 August and 2nd September 2023.

3rd Priority Selection

The 3rd Priority of Selection will be given to the members who will deposit their outstanding installments between 4th September and 9th September 2023.

4th Priority Selection

The 4th Priority of Selection will be given to the members who will deposit their outstanding installments between 11 September and 16 September 2023.

Further, all those members who have failed to get acknowledgment slips of 2nd Balloting and now wish to be part of it are requested to get the acknowledgment slips of 2nd balloting by depositing 75 % payment of the total plot price if they wish to choose the plot of their own choice and 60 % payment of total plot price if they opt of random location before 2nd September 2023.

Everyone is advised to make their online portal so that selection can be done online to avoid any hassle or inconvenience.

This policy is not applicable to installment payments through the merging of the properties.

blogs.content:
Lahore Smart City Market Update 2025: What You Need to Know

The Lahore Smart City is one of the premium residential societies in Lahore. With the start of 2025, the market dynamics of this residential project are evolving rapidly with positive outcomes. I have described an in-depth analysis of Lahore Smart City Market Update 2025.

You will read about the residential, balloted, non-balloted, and commercial balloted and non-balloted files and their profit situation. Moreover, you will learn about the future profit potentials of these plots. Let’s dive into the details of this real estate analysis.

Impact of Government Policies and Regulations

In the past few months, the Federal Government of Pakistan has taken several important initiatives to support the real estate sector. These reforms have impacted the market in the following ways:

Reduction in Interest Rates

In the past few months, the interest rate in Pakistan has significantly decreased. For Example, the State Bank of Pakistan decreased the Interest Rate reduction from 15% to 13% in December 2024. Due to interest rates, people will withdraw their deposits from banks and invest in different businesses.

They will park a major portion of this investment in the real estate sector to secure Return on Investment (ROI). In this way, the real estate will improve in the country.

Zero Tax on First Property

The Federal Government of Pakistan is taking a tax reform to not implement any kind of real estate tax on first-time property buyers. It will encourage people to invest in real estate. And the market will improve.

Reduction in Advance Property Tax

The Government will reduce the advance tax on real estate from 4% to 0.5%. It will attract investments in the real estate sector.

Cut in Overall Property Tax

The Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) is decreasing overall real estate tax from 14 % to 4 %. These initiatives have positively impacted bigger housing and commercial projects.

Detail of Lahore Smart City Market Update 2025

The residential and commercial plots in Lahore Smart City have been profitable since the first week of February 2025. The different types of plot files have different market situations. Here is the brief analysis:

Market Situation of Residential Non-Balloted Files

The residential non-balloted files of 05,07, and 10 Marla in Lahore Smart City were in loss of 1-2 lac rupees in January 2025. However, in the first week of February 2025, these files are in profit of 3-4 lac rupees.

Residential Non-Balloted Files Update

Similarly, the residential non-balloted files became positive in February 2025. For Example, a 5 Marla file of 2160,000/- rupees has a good profit potential shortly due to possession.

Market Analysis Commercial Non-Balloted Files

The Commercial plot files of 04 Marla,06 Marla, and 08 Marla were profitable at the lunching. For Example, they reached a maximum profit of 80,00,000/- rupees within a few months of launching.

In the last two years, with the downfall of the real estate market, their value witnessed a loss. However, at the start of February 2025, these files again in 1 Million profit.

Future Prediction

According to real estate consultants of Property Naama Group, these files will have a record profit of more than 5 Million in the next 1-2 years.

Commercial Balloted Files Market Situation

The profit margins of commercial balloted plot files of Lahore Smart City have increased from 12 lac rupees to 22 lac rupees in the last few weeks.

Profit Forecast

According to the analysis of our property experts, the profit margins of these files will increase up to 6-7 Million up to December 2025.

What Makes Lahore Smart City Unique?

Lahore Smart City is a well-known and credible project in Lahore. You should invest in this housing project for the following reasons:

Exceptional Location

The Lahore Smart City is located on the Lahore Bypass road and near Ring Road Lahore, GT Road, and CPEC route.

Moreover, it is close to M-2 ( Lahore-Islamabad ) Motorway. This unique location makes it an exceptional project in Lahore to invest in.

Public Transporation

The Government of Punjab is extending the Metro Bus Service Route to Kala Shah Kaku near Lahore Smart City. This development makes it the best housing project for the general public.

No Overselling of Plots

The administration of Lahore Smart City has never adopted negative marketing practices such as overselling of plots. Due to this reason, it is a legitimate and trusted project to invest in.

Legitimate Project

The Lahore Smart City has valid legal approval from the Lahore Development Authority (LDA). Therefore, it is a legitimate project with established market control of plot prices.

All these reasons make the Lahore Smart City a good project to park your precious investments.

Conclusion

If you have a good investment and want to invest in a Lahore Development Authority (LDA) approved project, choose the Lahore Smart City. Today, you can buy it at lower prices. But, after a few months, your purchasing power will reduce rapidly. So, contact the marketing team of Property Naama Group to secure your plot in Lahore Smart City now!

SO, this article will provide you with information about under-process NOC housing societies in Rawalpindi so that property owners and investors may apply to them without any delay.

1. Airport Residencia 2. Akbar Villas (French Housing Scheme) 3. Al- Jannat Garden 4. Al-Ameer City 5. Al-Harram City Phase-III (Sasti Basti) 6. Al-Harram City, Phase-I, Part-II 7. Al-Harram Phase-II, Gujar Khan (Al-Rahim) 8. Al-Khan Enclave 9. Al-Makkah City 10. Al-Miraj Garden 11. Army Welfare Trust(Real Estate Schemes), Taxila (Record received from District Council) 12. Aurora House of Wisdom and Residences 13. Bahria Enclave II, Partially Islamabad (case returned) 14. Bahria Enclave III 15. Bahria Golf City Extension Area 16. Bahria Town Phase-VIII 17. Bahria Town, Dhagal 18. Baroha Farm Houses 19. Bin Alam City 20.Blue Hills 21. Blue World City, 22. CBR Residencia 23. Chinar Valley 24. Elegant Town & City Homes (New Model Town) Gujar Khan 25. Elixir Resort 26. Federation of Employees Cooperate Housing Society 27. Gallop Green Farm House 28. Gallop Green Farm Houses 29. Gulraiz Housing Scheme 30. Hawk-Eye Residencia 31. High Gate Hills Commoners Sky Garden, 32. Imperial Garden Mouza Chahan Chakri Road 33. Iqbal City

What is NOC for Housing Society & Why it is Necessary?

How can you check if a housing society is approved or not?

RDA (Rawalpindi Development Authority) Website https://rda.gop.pk is the online platform where you can easily check whether your housing society is approved or not. Hence, all you need to do is to visit the website and enter the name of your housing society in the search bar. The website will show you the status of your housing society.

blogs.title: Impact of Lower Interest Rates on Real Estate in Pakistan
blogs.excerpt: The impact of lower interest rates on real estate in Pakistan is a concern of every Realtor and citizen nowadays. We will answer it in blog.
blogs.content:
Impact of Lower Interest Rates on Real Estate in Pakistan

The impact of lower interest rates on real estate in Pakistan is a concern of every Realtor and citizen nowadays. So, we will answer this question in this article. The State Bank of Pakistan has notably reduced the interest rate from 22 % in 2023 to 15%. This decrease will impact the Pakistani economy in multiple ways and the real estate sector will also have a positive impact. According to research, Pakistanis have 31 trillion Rupees in bank savings to receive monthly interest from the banks.

After the reduction in interest percentage, they will withdraw their bank savings to invest in real estate and other businesses. We will discuss the possible positive changes for the Pakistani real estate sector after the reduction of interest rates. Let’s read!

Detail of Impact of Lower Interest Rates on Real Estate in Pakistan

After the reduction in interest rates, the real estate sector will see the following changes and developments:

Lower Interest Rate Reduced Bank Saving Profits

Due to lower interest rates, people no longer deposit their money in their bank account to get fixed interest on savings. Instead, they will withdraw this money and invest in a business or real estate to earn higher profits. For Example, the State Bank of Pakistan has lowered the interest rate from 22% in 2023 to 15 % in 2024.

The significant reduction in interest rates will reduce the fixed profit on bank savings accounts. It will compel people to withdraw their bank savings and invest in a business or property to earn more profits.

Reduced Interest Rates Increased the Demand for Home Loans

With the lower interest rate, there will be an increase in demand for home loans. It will increase the investments in the real estate and construction industry.

This positive cash flow will increase the demand for houses in the country. As a result, the real estate market of Pakistan will recover from the ongoing recession.

The lower interest rate will increase real estate investment. The demand and price for existing properties will rise. So, it will cause real estate property appreciation.

You can invest with Property Naama Group in various real estate projects according to your budget and life goals. You can invest in commercial and residential properties. blogs.title: RCCI
blogs.excerpt: M. Ismail joins the Rawalpindi Chamber of Commerce & Industry (RCCI) as a member. Read the details in the blog.
blogs.content:
M. Ismail Joins RCCI as an Esteemed Member – A Proud Moment for Property Naama Group

It’s a proud moment for Property Naama Group as M. Ismail joins the Rawalpindi Chamber of Commerce & Industry (RCCI) as a member. This achievement highlights his remarkable contributions to the real estate industry.

Moreover, it strengthens the position of Property Naama Group as a trusted and influential name in the market. RCCI membership is a prestigious honor, offering unparalleled business networking, growth opportunities, and industry recognition.

In this blog, we’ll explore who M. Ismail is, the significance of RCCI, and how this milestone benefits real estate investors and business professionals alike.

Who is Muhammad Ismail?

Muhammad Ismail is the CEO & Group Chairman of Property Naama Group and Property Naama LLC UAE. He is a young entrepreneur, a pilot, and a famous Social Media Influencer. He pioneered real estate marketing on social media, leveraging his presence on YouTube in 2017. In 2019, he founded Property Naama Group and Property Naama LLC UAE in 2024.

He is an international real estate developer with 40,000 satisfied customers worldwide. Under the UMAR brand, The Property Naama Group is working on 20 mega residential and commercial projects in Pakistan and the UAE,

His outstanding contributions to commercial high-rise developments in Pakistan earned him the Excellency Shield, which was presented by Dr. Arif Alvi, the President of Pakistan.

Ismail’s joining the Rawalpindi Chamber of Commerce & Industry (RCCI) will mark a new beginning for business opportunities for Pakistan’s youth.

What is RCCI?

The Rawalpindi Chamber of Commerce and Industry (RCCI) is a business association in Rawalpindi, established in 1952 and recognized by the Government of Pakistan in 1959. Currently, it has a network of 8000 members that are involved in large and small-scale businesses.

The main goal of the RCCI is to develop and promote the Economic, Commercial, and industrial activities in the Rawalpindi region.

The association is affiliated with the Federation of Pakistan Chambers of Commerce and Industry (FPCCI). The FPCCI is a member of the International Chamber of Commerce and Industry.

Mission of RCCI

Vision of RCCI

“Commitment toward member’s business development through networking, policy advocacy, and innovation and to further the national economic growth process.”

How will RCCI Membership of M.Ismail Benefit the Real Estate Industry?

The membership of M.Ismail in the Rawalpindi Chamber of Commerce & Industry (RCCI) will benefit the real estate sector in the following ways:

Increased Trust and Credibility

Association with the RCCI will enhance the trustworthiness of Property Naama Group. The investors will see us as an ethical, professional, and reliable organization

Fair-Dealing and Transparency

The RCCI promotes fair dealing and transparency in financial transactions and business deals. So, it will help to promote good business practices in the real estate sector.

New Business Opportunities

The RCCI members in the relevant industries, such as construction, interior designing, wood business, and architecture engineering, can collaborate with Property Naama Group and secure business opportunities.

Skill Development and Training

The RCCI provides opportunities for business learning and skill development. It arranges various entrepreneurship seminars, workshops, and mentorship programs. The RCCI membership is not only an individual achievement. But, it is a collective success of Property Naama Group.

Conclusion

The real estate market of Pakistan is evolving rapidly. This association will foster innovation, transparency, and professionalism in the market. This milestone showcases Property Naama Group’s commitment to the betterment of the real estate industry and business community.

Mid City Islamabad: A pre-launch overview

MID-CITY Islamabad: A pre-launch overview

Vision

To offer not only high potential investment opportunities but also highly sought-after community–friendly housing facilities, to ensure client’s needs, both present and prospective.

Goal

To achieve equilibrium of practical and commercial implementation of mixed urban developments through the integrity of design, functionality, imperial life needs, and preference.

Our Vision and Goal leading our Ambitions

Where do we line up currently?

MIDCITY Islamabad is focalizing on pioneering a living concept that strives to rear community-building and helps to create a chromatic atmosphere in the most transparent way feasible to delineate urban living.

MID CITY Islamabad: Anticipated Master plane

Five –Minute community (Residential District)

The pioneering concept of the Five-Minute community in MIDCITY Islamabad depicts an insightfully designed Residential District would be offering an atmosphere of sumptuous living. It is designed to provide easy access from 36 degrees of the community through outlines pedestrian pathways and cycling tracks that would ensure that the most remote one in the community would reach their places in five minutes.

MIDCITY Islamabad would be different from other walkable societies in a way that each street and home will be developed on the concept of “Home follows the heart.”

Apartment District

MIDCITY Islamabad would provide both Mid-rise and HiRISE apartments under the pre-defined masterplan in the best way possible construction compliances regarding size, structure, material, and location.

This apartment district will be sketched out with a sizably wide main avenue to offer ease of access with a background of a central park, a true impression of the horticultural maestro.

These apartments will be serving the dual purposes of commercial and residential places through spacious bedrooms, drawing rooms, attached bath and kitchen, and a serene balcony.

Business district

Encircling the local and global brands at a single territory MIDCITY Islamabad’s business district has been planned with a “Customer is King” philosophy. The visionary business district would be the trade magnet in the Capital City of Pakistan.

The wide and spacious roads will be outlined for brands, banks, beanery, and retail showrooms.

MID CITY Islamabad’s business district aspires to be the “Main Street of Islamabad” which would attract the commercial capital as a future shopping hub.

MID CITY Islamabad: Redefining the City-Life

MID-CITY Islamabad is reorienting the City-Life through its following Unique Sales Prepositions (USP):

Responsible land use

(65% area will be under public use)

Quality Public Spaces

(Ensured outreach for all the residents without any discrimination)

Positive Climate

(Green Mobility-Connected Green and Social Spaces)

Uncompromising Life-Styles

(Vital to living designs for future generations)

Community-friendly Infrastructure

(Walking/Strolling/Access for wheelchair/ Cycling)

Designed for sustainable urbane ness

(Affordability and functionality work in harmony.)

MID CITY Islamabad: Location Insight

MIDCITY Islamabad is planned to ground break at an adjacent locality of Tahlian Interchange, M-2, (Lahore -Islamabad) Motorway.

The location of the upcoming society is 8 km away from the New Islamabad International Airport. The described locality falls under the jurisdiction of the Rawalpindi Development Authority (RDA).

The location of MIDCITY Islamabad is surrounded by several educational and health-care institutions namely: Roots Millennium School, The Knowledge School, Roots International Schools, Rawalpindi College of Commerce and Rawalpindi Cantt College on Peshawar Road are the nearest colleges, about a half-hour drive away from Thalian Interchange.

Moreover, NUST College of Electrical & Mechanical Engineering in Islamabad Capital Territory and Riphah International University near Hajj Complex are about a 15 to 30-minute drive away from Thalian Interchange.

If you talk about the healthcare facilities: Rizwan Hospital in G-13, Quaid-e-Azam International Hospital near Golra Morr, and Social Security Hospital in Islamabad Capital Territory are more or less 15 to 20 minutes away from MIDCITY Islamabad.

Details of payment plans, pricing, project’s other aspects will be shared soon with aspiring customers on social-Media handles MIDCITY Islamabad as well as Property Naama group.

Capital Smart City Vs Mivida Islamabad | Best One? | Complete Comparison

Capital Smart City Vs Mivida City Islamabad

Islamabad is the capital city of Pakistan. It is one of the most beautiful and the ninth-largest city of the country. The real estate of Islamabad is full of different commercial, residential and multi-purpose projects. Among all, the two most attractive and ideally located real estate developments are Mivida City Islamabad and Capital Smart City Islamabad.

Now days a new project is in its launching phase it will be launch very soon name as Bahria Town Peshawar for details visit here.

Both of these societies are featuring state of the art infrastructure and all the modern-day facilities, which make them more attractive. But which of these societies is best to invest? Is Capital Smart City is the right choice to buy residential property, or Mivida City Islamabad is offering more investment opportunities.

Let’s make an apple to apple comparison of Mivida City Islamabad and Capital Smart City Islamabad below:

Capital Smart City Islamabad is the first smart city in Pakistan. It is spanning over a land of 55,000 Kanal. However, Mivida City Islamabad is the first eco-sustainable city in Pakistan. It is covering an area of 7,000 Kanal.

Developers of Mivida City & Smart City Islamabad

Capital Smart City is the joint project of one of the well-reputed construction company Habib Rafiq Private Limited & Future Development Holdings Private Limited. Mivida City Islamabad is a project of Khanial Builder and developing in association with Mivida Developments Private Limited.

Mivida City & Smart City Location

Capital Smart City is located right next to Lahore- Islamabad Motorway. This society sandwich between M2- Motorway and Chakri Road. Also, Capital Smart City Islamabad is located close to New Islamabad International Airport.

Mivida City Islamabad is also located on Chakri Road in the proximity of Capital Smart City Islamabad.

Launching Dates of The Projects

Capital Smart City Islamabad was officially launched on 2nd May 2019 in a grand launching ceremony. However, Mivida City Islamabad is completely a new project and expected to be launch soon.

Development Status of Both Projects

The development work at Capital Smart City is progressing at a rapid pace. Its development work was started so far, and even most of the development work is near completion. The development of Mivida City is not started yet.

Properties in Mivida City & Smart City Islamabad

Capital Smart City is offering a wide range of residential and commercial properties in it. It offers a plot of 3.5 Marla, 5 Marla, 10 Marla, 1 Kanal, and 2 Kanal. Also, it is featuring the best villas for sale. These villas are available in different sizes. Those interested in apartments can also choose from the different available options. Moreover, the commercial plots of 4 Marla and 8 Marla are available for sale. All of these properties are currently available on easy installment plans.

Payment Plan of Capital Smart City

Payment Plan for Mivida City Islamabad

On the other hand, Mivida City Islamabad is offering residential and commercial plots and corporate and retail modern business areas. Also, this society is designed with the best chalets and resort living. Moreover, you will also find the best apartments and luxury villas in Mivida City, Islamabad.

The available sizes of residential plots are 5.5 Marla, 8 Marla, 10 Marla, 14 Marla, 20 Marla, and 40 Marla. All these residential plots are available on the easy installment plan of 3.5 years.

Conclusion

Capital Smart City is the most attractive housing venture to live a luxurious lifestyle comfortably in Islamabad. It is offering different, best properties both for investment and residential purposes. It is a joint venture of three well-known names of the real estate world.

So, it will be the best place to find all the facilities and features at your doorstep. Those who can afford the price (24 lacs minimum) of Capital Smart City then this is the best choice for them. 40% to 50% development of the Capital Smart City is done.

On the other hand, Mivida City Islamabad holds significant importance for its brilliantly designed master plan and unique features. It is the very first eco-sustainable city with so many attractions.

It is not just a housing project but also offering different business opportunities. Those people who cannot afford the price of Capital City then Mivida Islamabad is the best choice for them.

So, We have shared the information about both the projects. Both of these options are good and attractive. It all depends on you that which society suits you more for investment!

blogs.title: Much-Awaited Bhara Kahu bypass Opened to Traffic
blogs.excerpt: The much -awaited Bhara Kahu bypass road was opened to traffic on Thursday, 3rd August 2023 in an inauguration ceremony.
blogs.content:
Much-Awaited Bhara Kahu bypass Opened to Traffic

The much-needed Bhara Kahu bypass road was opened to public traffic on Thursday, 3rd August 2023 in an inauguration ceremony led by former Prime Minister Mian Shehbaz Sharif.

The Bhara Kahu bypass road was a project of the National Logistics Cell (NLC) with a worth of Rs.6.5 billion has been completed in a short time of almost 10 months.

This commuting project has beautiful horticultural work alongside the road with 74 000 trees encircling the project with a future goal of one Million tree sapling plantation.

The Bhara Kahu bypass road is a 5.2 km (3.2 Miles) four-lane highway connecting Islamabad with Bhara Kahu, Murree, Galyat, and Kashmir without passing through congested Bhara Kahu Town.

The bypass road took its start at Mirpur, Islamabad, and ended at Satra Meet on Murree Road. It comprises of two bridges, four underpasses, one interchange, and seven culverts.

Why Bhara Kahu Bypass was important?

Our Project at the cross-end of Bhara Kahu Bypass

Muhammad Ismail Visit To Comsats University Abbottabad

In this descriptive blog, we are going to get information about the event of Muhammad Ismail Visit to Comsats University Abbottabad.

CEO Property Naama Consultants Muhammad Ismail visited the COMSATS University Abbottabad Campus as a chief guest on October 18, 2023.Indeed, the inclusive purpose of this visit was to motivate and encourage the university students to start a business venture.

The “Skillful Minds Conference” was a full-day activity for the promotion of entrepreneurship among university students. Muhammad Ismail addressed the energetic audience on the topic “Importance of target achievement for Business Success. “

During his visit, Muhammad Ismail inspired the youth through an insightful speech featuring his life journey towards business success.

He motivated the university youth by sharing his life story. Therefore, the abstract of his speech in the conference hall of the COMSATS Abbottabad Campus can be described in the following lines.

He started his professional career as a data entry operator in a pharmacy in year 2015. After graduating in year 2017 he started his career in real estate from Bahria Town Rawalpindi on a motorbike.

In the year 2018 he registered his firm with the name of “Property Naama Consultants “and then never looked back. From there he made his way to the owner of a swiftly growing real estate organization of the country.

He is the trendsetter of marketing real estate products in the country through YouTube and other social media platforms.This is also a Unique Sales proposition (USP) for his unprecedented business success in real estate. Now in the year 2023, his real estate organization Property Naama Consultants is serving all major cities of Pakistan.

Concluding moment of the event amid Muhammad Ismail Visit to Comsats University Abbottabad

As a customary gesture, the conclusion of the conference happened formally. Excitingly, the honorable director of COMSATS University Islamabad Abbottabad Campus delivered remarks of gratitude to M.Isamail for paying a visit.

Why Invest in Multi Gardens Phase 2?

There are many benefits to investing in Multi Gardens Phase 2. One of the most common reasons is that it’s a great opportunity for investors of Multi Gardens who want a sure thing. Property values of Multi Gardens have been steadily increasing, and there is no indication that this trend will change anytime soon, so you can feel confident knowing your money will be safe with MPCHS. Some of the benefits are listed below:

What are the Benefits of Investment in Real Estate?

An excellent investment return potential makes real estate one of the most lucrative businesses you can do. A real estate investment is only profitable if it is done correctly. There are a number of benefits to be gained from real estate investing, a few are listed below:

Stable Income:

A large number of people purchase real estate to make a passive income. This can be a large motivating factor to start and buy your first rental property. Location will affect how much you can earn, how much it could make you, and how much you spend.

You can make a lot of money investing in real estate and seeing a return quickly. For example, you can buy a property, develop it, buy a property that is already developed, and rent it monthly or yearly.

Long-Term Financial Security:

Having a home is oftentimes a person’s most valuable asset. A house will increase in value over time, making it an attractive investment for those who can afford it. For those not able to purchase a home, the next best option may be rental property ownership. Rental properties can provide an income stream to subsidize the day-to-day costs of living while also increasing their value over time.

Low risk compared to other investments:

When you invest in rental properties, there is no risk of losing any capital because rents can cover the cost of your monthly mortgage payments. In addition, owners have the opportunity to build equity and recoup their initial purchase price by selling or refinancing to get out from under those monthly payments.

Manageable:

Investing your hard-earned money into the property market is a smart decision, especially if you’re not yet prepared to make a full commitment. By purchasing real estate assets such as shares and land, you can supplement your regular income and get on the road to financial freedom.

Tax advantages:

Investing your money into a rental property will let you build equity and grow wealth, while also diversifying your investments. Additionally, if you ever need to use the property as collateral for a loan at some point down the line, you’ll have something valuable to offer. Finally, with recent changes in tax legislation that allows individuals to fully deduct their losses on these types of investments, it’s an even more attractive option.

Long-term capital appreciation:

An investment into the right property, at the right time, can lead to a life-changing windfall. Many people feel safer investing their money in something tangible. Real estate is one asset that always provides you with a return and pays dividends when it goes up in value.

Non-depreciable Asset:

A house is a non-depreciable asset. Non-depreciable assets include items that you would never have to get rid of, like real estate, a car, clothes, personal belongings, and family heirlooms. Whereas depreciable assets are those that decrease in value with time or use – cars go from nice and shiny to old and broken down as they continue to get used; clothes go from new to tattered when you wear them repeatedly.

Passive Income:

Passive income is money that an individual receives from an asset or business over which they have little control. This often occurs when someone purchases the property, such as a rental unit, and pays rent to themselves (to be self-renting) for the rest of their life. It’s typically set up with each passing generation purchasing the property from the previous generation at a predetermined price so as to not cause undue burden on any one person.

blogs.content:
Naya Pakistan Housing Scheme Lahore | 35,000 New Apartments

Naya Pakistan Housing Scheme Lahore

Naya Pakistan Housing Scheme Lahore. CM Punjab Usman Buzdar has recently announced the development of 35,000 new housing units in Lahore. These apartments will be constructed under the Naya Pakistan Housing Scheme with convenient payment plans. Click for more INFO.

Naya Pakistan Apartments in Lahore

Following the scheme, LDA will develop these housing units at the ideal location of Lahore. Approximately 10,240 housing units of 650 sq. ft., 12,384 units of 800 sq. ft., 7800 residential apartments of 1,100 sq. ft., and 3,360 houses of 1,500 sq. ft., as well as 1200 units of 2,200 sq. ft. will be developed in Lahore. This is the official website of this project.

According to the updates, around 4,000 green housing units will be constructed in the first phase. These apartments will worth Rs. 10 billion where the Naya Pakistan Housing Program will provide a subsidy of Rs 0.3 million on each apartment.

Naya Pakistan Apartments Prices & Payment Plan

The prices of apartments under the Naya Pakistan Housing Scheme are reasonable. Apartment prices are kept low to make them easily affordable. The total cost of all sizes of apartments is not announced.

However, as per the documents available, the one-time payment of a 650 sq. ft. apartment is around 27 lacs. A plot can be acquired with a down payment of 2 lacs 70 thousand payable in monthly installments.

One-month installment of these apartments is Rs. 15,950, which will be payable up to twenty years.

Naya Pakistan Apartments Launching Date

CM Usman Buzdar has also revealed that PM Pakistan Imran Khan will carry out the groundbreaking of the Naya Pakistan Apartments project in Lahore. This ceremony is planned for 25th December. The construction work of the apartments will commence within a couple of months.

Naya Pakistan Apartments Lahore Location

The location of this project is quite impressive. This Naya Pakistan Apartments project is only 15 KM away from Lahore Airport. It is only 20 minutes from Lahore Motorway M-2. Have easy access from Ring Road, Ferozpur Road, and Defence Road. Also, have a short distance from DHA Lahore.

Contact Property Naama Consultants for further information!

Yes, after funding the construction of the Naya Pakistan Housing Project, the federal government of Pakistan has decided to expand the commercial area. New Blue Area Project in Islamabad – All Details

PM Imran Khan has recently approved the “New Blue Area” project. A meeting held at the prime minister’s office on Monday. The officials decide to establish a new commercial zone in the Capital City. Its establishment will encourage business activities and will also play its part in improving the economy. Moreover, this extension will also generate a number of employment opportunities. It is happening for the first time in Pakistan, that a commercial zone will be doubled.

For this purpose, a land of 170 Kanals would be allocated near Sector F-9 Park. All the related departments are ready to work on it.

The international standard of construction would be following for this new commercial zone. Overall, this project will generate up to Rs. 30 billion initially.

blogs.title: New Metro City Gujar Khan Development Charges
blogs.excerpt: In this informative blog, we are going to discuss the impact of New Metro City Gujar Khan development charges in detail.
blogs.content:
Impact of New Metro City Gujar Khan Development Charges

In this informative blog, we are going to discuss the impact of New Metro City Gujar Khan development charges in detail. Read this blog till last, if you are a member of the society or aspiring to be one.

Overview of Impact of New Metro City Gujar Khan Development Charges

What will be the impact of ongoing protests on social media as well as on society premises? The forthcoming impact will be largely in favor of the New Metro City Gujar Khan (NMCGK) administration.

Application of due development charges on the infrastructural development of the society premises is a legitimate act. Therefore, the investors and society members cannot challenge it in any court of law. Ultimately, the burden of this protest against newly imposed development charges will be on the shoulders of the investors.

If the price of a 5 Marla plot in NMCGK before the protest was PKR 19,00,000 /- now it would be PKR 10,00,000 /-. So, the owner of the plot file has lost PKR 9,00,000 /- in a couple of days.

Moreover, the owner has to pay imposed development charges in the same amount despite the protest. Therefore, the loss of this protest has to face only the end user, not the society.

Why are the development charges mandatory?

To understand it statistically, let’s assume, you are developing a 1000 kanal housing society. Out of this 1000 kanal half of the land will be lost in the name of amenities and facilities.

For instance, 30 % of the land will be consumed for green spaces in society I-e Parks, roadside belts, etc. Similarly, 15 % of land will be allocated for inter-society roads. Likewise, 5 % of the land will reserved for the graveyard.

Therefore, there is only 50 % of land left to develop as a saleable product in the form of residential and commercial plots. Ultimately, the cost of 50 % of lost land along with infrastructure development activities and materials will be equally divided among all the society members in the name of development charges.

Furthermore, these development charges are applied according to the society’s brand value. It is obvious, that an established housing society will have high development charges as to a newly launched brand.

Henceforth, it is legitimate and fair to equally implement these development charges among all the stakeholders of society.

Example from other housing societies

Let’s elaborate on this concept with the help of an example. Two years before, the administration of Capital Smart City Islamabad charged PKR 150,00,000 /- per Marla development charges.

But the society has not delivered the plots yet. It means the society will charge at least 2 lac more per marla to completely deliver the charges.

Therefore, the application of development charges is a norm and it is applied everywhere whether it is DHA or any other housing society.

Concluding remarks for Impact of New Metro City Gujar Khan Development Charges

Thereupon, the application of development charges is mandatory. Without the development charges a society can not deliver the project properly. So, every member must pay these development charges timely. It will ultimately help your file to be in profit in the long run.

New Metro City Gujar Khan Exit Strategy for Plot Files

Investing in New Metro City Gujar Khan seemed like a golden opportunity at first—a chance to secure high returns in a rapidly developing area. But what happens when your plot file feels more like a financial burden than a stepping stone to profit?

Many investors are facing delays, uncertain timelines, and market stagnation, leaving their investments tied up. If you are struggling to figure out how to move forward, do not worry—you are not alone.

This blog will guide you through practical exit strategies to free your plot file and reclaim control over your investment.

Whether you’re looking to sell, transfer, or trade, we’ve got actionable insights to help you make the best decision.

How Do Plot Files Get Stuck in New Metro City Gujar Khan?

People usually buy more than one plot file but do not pay installments and development charges. Their plot files and investments get stuck. In this situation, they cannot re-sale their plot file nor pay their dues to get possession of the plot. Therefore, they need a safe exit from this situation.

Detail of Exit Strategy for Stuck Files

Property Naama Group has an exit strategy offer for all the people whose residential or commercial plot files worth 45,00,000/- rupees getting held up in the New Metro City Gujar Khan.

What is the Offer?

In this deal, you will give your plot files(01 or more than 01 files) equal to 45,00,000 PKR value and 32,00,000/ rupees in cash. In exchange, you will get a ready possession of 10 Marla residential plots worth 77,00,000/- rupees in the Early Bird Block of New Metro City Gujar Khan.

Note: It is a ready plot. You will have possession and legal ownership (Registery / Inteqal) the next day of finalizing the payment.

Why Should You Accept this Exit Strategy Offer?

The 10 Marla residential plots are 77,00,000 PKR with a profit of 25,00,000/- rupees post real estate market recovery in a few months.

What Will You Lose By Not Taking This Deal?

Your plot files and investment will remain stuck for years. Later, you will get a non-balloted and non-possession plot in Awami Block of New Metro City Gujar Khan.

There is no plot in the A and B blocks of society. Moreover, the C block has a limited number of residential plots left. So, ultimately, you have to choose the Awami Block of New Metro City Gujar Khan.

About Early Bird Block New Metro City Gujar Khan?

The early bird block of New Metro City Gujar Khan is completely ready and has direct access from the GT Road Rawalpindi. You will get the following facilities and privileges in this block after accepting this offer:

How Can You Avail of This Offer?

You can avail of this offer by contacting our marketing team through the contact numbers at the end of this blog. Why to Invest in New Metro City Gujar Khan

No Objection Certificate, in short NOC is important for all projects because:

it’s defined that authorities approve the project

It is developing on legally acquired land

Is Nova City has Acquired NOC?

Nova City Islamabad has already acquired Planning Permission PP – 1 approval from TMA. Everything in this mall is designed brilliantly to give a perfect look. This project is full of options for those who want to set up their businesses in Lahore. Moreover, investors who desire to make profitable investment returns, are also investing their capital in it.

Orchard Mall now becomes a famous development that many of us know about its location very well. But still, there are many people who are still curious about the location of this impressive development. This mega mall by Q-Links is located in Bahria Orchard Phase 4. Its location is G2 Block but has direct access after the entrance in Phase 4 Bahria Orchard Lahore.

Those who want to visit the site can approach it from Thokar Niaz Baig Interchange towards Raiwind Road Lahore. This society is at a distance of 6 – 7 KM from the Adda Plot. Societies lying close to it are also popular such as Lake City Lahore and Kings Town Lahore.

Orchard Mall Bahria Orchard Floors and Projects

The floors are Orchard Mall Bahria Orchard Lahore are basement + ground + 4 floors. The project on these floors is of several types while all are important and attractive. The details of the projects are:

Basement

This basement is developing with Aslam Super Market. There are no shops for sale, but options available for guaranteed rental income.

Ground Floor

The ground floor has shops of different several sizes. These shops can be purchased to open your brand. Basically, many of the brands have already booked their shops on the ground floor that’s why the prices are high and availability is less.

First Floor

This floor is designed with a Wedding Arena. It’s a place where everyone can buy things related to weddings and other events. Moreover, this project offers shops of several sizes. You can buy them at a 40% booking price and a 1-year payment plan.

Second Floor

2nd floor of Orchard Mall has another good project that meets the shopping needs of mothers. What’s it is? It features Kids Arena. This project is completely reserved for the kids-related stuff including their clothes, footwear, school items, toys etc. Shops on the second floor are also available with 3 years of easy installment.

Third Floor

It features the most popular development IT Market. This market is completely offering shops for information technology. You can buy shops for opening a computer/laptop, mobile shop and services. It is like a Hafiz Center Lahore type where you will have access to everything of IT. Shops are available on installments in IT Market.

Fourth Floor

The fourth floor of Orchard Mall has hotel apartments. These apartments are also known as service apartments. You can buy them to generate rental income. Hotel apartments are also coming with a booking price and convenient payment plan.

Orchard Mall Bahria Orchard Development and Possession

Launched a couple of years ago, now this project is easily visible from a far distance. Its basement + ground + half of the first floor is ready. Q-Links is planning to announce the possession of the first two floors in a couple of months. Moreover, the development speed is satisfactory. Once the shops get operational, the remaining work also gets completed soon.

Investment Returns

Orchard Mall Bahria Orchard Phase 4 is a good venture for investors and buyers looking for huge returns. Yes, its prices are increased but still, the best investment opportunities are there. Both businessman and investor will find handsome returns on investment in Orchard Mall Bahria Orchard Lahore.
