blogs.title: Pakistan Gets $4.1 Billion in Remittances in March 2025
blogs.excerpt: Pakistan Gets $4.1 Billion in Remittances in March 2025. In this blog , we will witness what is its impact on property market.
blogs.content:
Pakistan Gets $4.1 Billion in Remittances in March 2025

Pakistan gets $4.1 billion in Remittances in March 2025, the highest-ever remittance inflow in history. It is a hope for the country’s economy and real estate sector. We will explore how this historic remittance is possible and its impact on the real estate sector.

Why Remittances in Pakistan Increased in March 2025

Pakistan received $ 4.1 billion in remittances in March 2025. These factors have played a key role in this record of foreign payments. The following factors have increased the remittances.

1. Incentives Through Banking Channels

The Government of Pakistan and the State Bank of Pakistan (SBP) have promoted formal remittance channels. For instance, the SBP has given incentives to overseas Pakistanis who send money through legal means.

2. Ramadan and Eid Remittances

Overseas Pakistanis send remittances in higher amounts than usual during Ramadan and Eid to support their family. In this way, the remittances surge in March 2025.

3. Economic Recovery on a Global Scale

The Middle East and Europe have seen significant economic recovery in the last months. Therefore, the Pakistanis working there have also witnessed increased earnings. Eventually, they sent more money to Pakistan, and remittances surged.

4. Stabilized Currency Rates

The State Bank of Pakistan (SBP) has stabilized the currency rate in Pakistan for exchange with other currencies. In this way, the SBP made the formal remittances channel people’s first preference instead of the informal channel “ Hawala.”

All of these factors increased the remittance received rate in March 2025. The increased remittances will help our economy and several industries.

How Boosted Remittances Will Improve the Real Estate Sector?

The impact of Pakistan getting $4.1 billion in Remittances in March 2025 on the market is short-term and long-term. It will impact the industry in the following ways:

1. Increase in Savings and Buying Power of Overseas Pakistanis

The raised inflow of remittances increases the cash and savings of Overseas Pakistanis. It often results in the following actions:

2. Boost in Real Estate-related Industries

An increase in the real estate market cash flow will improve the allied industries such as construction, home decor, and steel.

3. Recovery of the Real Estate Market

Increasing cash flow will recover the real estate market. It will increase the demand for properties. The prices of residential and commercial plots will also increase. The number of property buyers will also increase, and this vicious cycle will improve the overall property market.

4. Uplifted Rental Market

Increased remittances will enhance investment in rental properties such as luxury apartments, business units, shops, and rental homes. It will improve the rental market in the country and boost the overall real estate market. Increased remittances pump cash into the country and improve different industries like real estate.

Wrapping UP

The $4.1 billion remittance is not only a financial achievement. Instead, it is a lifeline for our country’s economy, its people, and the real estate sector.

If you are an overseas Pakistani and want to invest in real estate in Pakistan and the UAE, you can invest with Property Naama Group.

Pakistan Real Estate in 2025: Common issues and their solutions

Pakistan’s real estate market will recover and boom this year, creating bigger opportunities for investors and buyers. However, it will face some challenges, such as budgeting, fraudulent activities, lack of guidance, and trust issues. In this blog, I will describe the common issues and their solutions for Pakistan Real Estate in 2025. Let’s go through the blog to explore the details.

Detail of Common Real Estate Issues and Their Solutions

With the market recovery, it will also face some challenges that need a solution. I have listed some of the common challenges here:

1. Budgeting Issues for Pakistan Real Estate in 2025

Rising inflation in Pakistan has impacted every industry and its consumers. The same is the situation with the real estate market. Prices of residential and commercial properties are increasing every day.

It has become difficult for the middle, lower-middle, and salaried classes to buy plots or ready property in a reasonable society.

What is the solution?

Low-income individuals can buy residential plots and ready properties in easy installments from a credible real estate company such as Property Naama Group. In this way, they can beat the financial issues involved in property ownership.

2. Trusting the Wrong People to Buy Property

In the real estate market, the customers are subject to fraudulent activities. For example, buying properties through your close relatives who are not experts in real estate and selling you the wrong real estate products for their small commissions.

How Can You Avoid This Issue?

You should buy residential or commercial property from an established real estate company. For this purpose, you can contact Property Naama Group to invest in Pakistan and UAE real estate.

3. Lack of Guidance for Pakistan Real Estate in 2025

The different residential and commercial properties are balloted, non-balloted, ready to possess, registry (Inteqal), society transfer, builder transfer, and more. People do not know which property suits them best. So, they put their precious investments in long places and get losses.

How Can You Deal with this Issue?

You should consult an experienced real estate consultant before investing. He will guide you to the best investment opportunity suiting your budgeting goals.

4. Buying Property at the Wrong Time

Another issue in the real estate market is that people are unaware of the timing of real estate deals. They do not know when to sell and buy residential and commercial properties.

For example, they buy a property when the real estate market is at its peak. In this way, it costs them higher rates than the market downtime.

People should buy property during the downtimes of the real estate market. After that, they should hold it until the market fully recovers. This is how they can earn a good return on investment (ROI).

5. Not Knowing How to Exit a Real Estate Investment

Most people get stuck after booking a residential or commercial plot or buying a plot file. They do not know how to make this real estate investment profitable and winning.

What is the way out?

You should buy or book a property through an established real estate organization that offers after-sale services. For example, you can invest through the Property Naama Group to get services from plot booking to getting possession after the final installment payment.

6. Putting All Eggs in a Single Basket

People make multiple real estate investments in a single project. It can create some potential drawbacks. For example, if this project fails, you will lose all your money. Additionally, you will also face liquidity issues.

What is the best approach?

You should diversify your portfolio by investing in different projects in different locations. Moreover, you should choose different real estate investments such as commercial shops, business suits, High-rise buildings, luxury apartments, hotel services apartments, and more. By doing this, you can earn a handsome profit and financial security.

Conclusion

Dealing in the real estate market in 2025 can be challenging and rewarding at the same time. Adopting the right strategy and investing through a credible real estate organization can turn problems into opportunities. Pakistan Real Estate Market Situation in 2023

In this important blog, we are going to discuss the Pakistan Real Estate Market Situation in 2023 in depth.Read this blog to the end, to gain awareness about current trends, future predictions, and the way forward in the real estate market of the country.

Potential Reasons for Pakistan Real Estate Market Situation in 2023

According to the World Bank, the real estate sector is the largest employer in the country after agriculture. It is also predicted that the real estate market will expand by 2.3% in the year 2023. However, the claims would not be materialized as per the expectations.

There are several factors that have impacted the property market of the country in the past one and a half years.

Among them, Political instability, unprecedented inflation, poor law and order situation, and stock market fluctuations are prominent challenges. Moreover, the inclusion of Pakistan in the FATF Grey list, labeling of money laundering, and terrorism are some other key reasons.

Likewise, the challenged foreign relations in Pakistan and rampant corruption cases of businessmen, politicians, and bureaucrats worsen the situation. In tandem, unstable business policies of previous and interim governments called upon the economic catastrophe by themselves.

All these challenges collectively played a role in ending the trust of local and foreign investors in the country.Therefore, due to a lack of investment almost every business sector suffered and real estate is no exception.

Chances for recovery of Pakistan Real Estate Market Situation in 2023

How and when real estate market of Pakistan will recover from this recession? It is a million-dollar question in the mind of almost every realtor and aspiring investor. A consortium of real estate consultants at the Property Naama Consultants has tried to answer this question after an in-depth analysis.

As per their opinion, the estate market of the homeland will start to recover in the month of March and April of the year 2024.Excitingly, the general elections in the country are expected to be held in the last week of January 2024. After the elections, the winning party will make a legitimate government in the land of purity.

Usually, every incumbent government announces Tax amnesty to attract investment and businesses in the market. Consequently, this will prove as a turning point for the real estate industry of Pakistan.

The Silver Lining

In this disguise, there exists a silver lining for wise realtors and investors. Currently, people are selling their plot files and ready plots at extraordinarily low rates.

Furthermore, the profit margins of the real estate products have significantly reduced during this period of ongoing recession.For instance, before and after the recession, the price difference of some plots has been described below in the chart.

The Way Forward

Henceforth, if you are about to sell your property, hold it and try to acquire a new one if you can afford it. After a gap of 5 to 6 months, the current margins of real estate products will gain back their ultimate values. And you will definitely have a blooming picture of the Pakistan Real Estate Market Situation in 2023.

blogs.title: Pakistan’s Bank Deposits Reach Record High of 32 Trillion
blogs.excerpt: Pakistan’s Bank Deposits Reach Record High of 32 Trillion. I have shared the detail in the blog. You can read for complete information.
blogs.content:
Pakistan’s Bank Deposits Reach Record High of 32 Trillion

Pakistan’s Bank Deposits Reach Record High of 32 Trillion for the first time. According to the State Bank of Pakistan (SBP), our bank deposits are Rs32.32 trillion by the end of April 2025, which is 13.72% more than the bank deposits in April 2024.

How Does this Record Deposits Happen?

The 32 Trillion Bank Deposits are a new record for Pakistan. The county’s banking system has achieved this milestone due to the following reasons:

1. Reduction in Interest Rates

The primary reason is that the State Bank of Pakistan (SBP) has changed its monetary policy and has gradually decreased interest rates. Recently, the interest rate was cut by 100 basis points to 11%.

2. Digital Banking Adoption

The second important reason for this record deposit is the unprecedented adoption of digital banking and mobile payments. It increased banking reach and improved access to banking services.

3. Boosted Credit Activity

Bank advances increased from Rs 12.03 trillion to Rs 13.14 trillion by April 2025. It has also played a key role in achieving these deposits in SBP.

Implications for the Real Estate Sector

The record-breaking bank deposits will create several opportunities for different industries in Pakistan. Its potential advantages for the real estate sector are:

1. Increased Investment Capacity

Higher bank deposits will generate more funds for mortgage lending and real estate development, potentially boosting the housing market.

2. Shift Towards Formal Financing

The growth in formal banking may encourage real estate transactions to move from informal cash-based dealings to formal financing methods, enhancing transparency and regulatory compliance.

3. Need for Regulatory Oversight

Despite the potential benefits, the real estate sector in Pakistan faces challenges such as a lack of a dedicated regulator, project delays, and quality.

Addressing these concerns is crucial for increased financial resources to translate into sustainable growth in the sector.

3. Urban Development Opportunities

With more funds channeled through banks, there is an opportunity to invest in urban infrastructure and housing projects, addressing the housing shortage and supporting urbanization.

Conclusion

In summary, the rise in bank deposits presents opportunities for economic growth and development in Pakistan. However, realizing these benefits, particularly in the real estate sector, will require concerted efforts to improve regulatory frameworks, enhance transparency, and ensure effective utilization of financial resources.

Park View City Lahore | All Details, Complete Overview & Bookings

Park View City Lahore

Park View Villas Lahore is an exclusive housing society by Vision Group. This society is owned by Aleem Khan, who is a member of PTI and currently a member of the cabinet. Launched in 2012, Park View Housing Society is located on Multan Road Lahore. Sprawling over a land of 7000 Kanal and an already populated destination in Lahore. This society has already proven to be one of the booming housing societies in Lahore.

More than 45000 families are living in Park View Housing Society Lahore. These numbers are increasing every month. Moreover, the demand for property in Park View Villas Lahore is very high. Undoubtedly, it is the top housing society where investors invest for profitable returns.

Park View Villas Lahore – NOC Status

Lahore Development Authority ultimately approves this fabulous project by Vision Group. Park View Villas has successfully acquired the NOC from LDA. Simply, it is a legal society where this approval is a big reason behind investors’ trust. More Info about the NOC of the project.

Park View Villas Lahore – Overview

Park View Villas is a mega housing society spanning hundreds of acres of land. The entire area of society is divided into many blocks. All these blocks are brilliantly designed with the best facilities required for a high-standard lifestyle.

Park View Villas, as the name depicts, is full of beautiful parks and green spaces. This society has all the top-class facilities such as education, medical, and other commercial amenities. Park View Villas feature state-of-the-art infrastructure and have a network of wide roads.

This society offers many opportunities for residential and investment needs. Park View Villas Lahore plots in residential and commercial sizes. Also, it features beautifully constructed villas. These villas are available in several sizes and quite affordable in comparison to many other constructed properties.

Located perfectly in the proximity to many other well-known projects, this society is a great appeal for buyers as well as investors.

Park View Villas Lahore – Properties Available

This modern and well-developed housing society offers the residential plots of 3.5 Marla, 5 Marla, 10 Marla, 1 Kanal, and 2 Kanal. As described earlier, many blocks of this society are completely developed and populated. The properties in these ready blocks are available in full cash only. However, the residential plots of 3.5 Marla, 5 Marla, and 10 Marla are currently available with flexible payment plans. These plots on installments are the part of:

The block-wise plots and prices details are:

5 Marla Plots in Diamond Block

These 5 Marla residential plots in Diamond Block are available at the total cost of 45 lacs. Bookings start with a 25% advance. However, there are 30 months and 10 quarterly installments in the payment plan of 2.5 years.

10 Marla Plots in Diamond Block

These plots come at the launching prices of 75 lacs. Booking possible with 25% advance payment. Like the 5 Marla, these 10 Marla plots are available with a convenient payment plan of 2.5 years. It consists of 30 months and 10 quarterly installments. The membership fee is 26,000/- only.

3.5 Marla Residential Plots

The affordable 3 Marla residential plots are part of this beautiful society. The launching price of these plots is 30 lacs. Booking starts with only a 20% down payment. The payment plan also consists of 30 months and 10 quarterly installments.

5 Marla Plots in Platinum Block

This block offers the 5 Marla plots in the total cost of 40 lacs. Booking with a 25% down payment. Its installment plan has 18 monthly installments and 6 quarterly installments.

5 Marla, 10 Marla, and 1 Kanal Plots in Overseas Block

Moving ahead, Park View Villas has recently introduced a new Overseas Block in it. This block offers the residential plots in 5 Marla, 10 Marla, as well as 1 Kanal size. The prices for the plots are 42 lacs, 75 lacs, and 1.50 crores, respectively. Bookings start with a 10% amount only.

Overall, the prices of residential plots in Park View Villas are attractive and affordable. It is a housing project with many attractions, and one of the main among them is the installment option.

Here are some more details about the Overseas Block of Park View City Lahore.

Park View Villas Lahore – Located Ideally

These beautifully developed Park View Villas are located on Main Multan Road. Park View Villas lies opposite DHA EME. This project is easily accessible from Thokar Niaz Baig Interchange and Canal Road Lahore. Moreover, this society is surrounding by several attractive developments and facilities.

Park View Villas Lahore – Best Amenities

This society features the best amenities, which plays a major role in boosting its value. All the world-class facilities are part of this project. Park View Villas is a modern housing society where you will enjoy everything you can dream of.

Beautiful Parks

Park View Villas have beautiful parks where a big/central park is spanning over 22 Kanal. The size of other parks is between 10 Marla to 2 Kanal. These are the most beautiful parks ever in Lahore, featuring flowers, rare plants, and fresh green trees. Also, you will see kids play areas and swings in them. Almost all these parks have jogging tracks and pathways for people.

Standard Educational Facility

Park View Villas is offering the standard educational facilities in a higher education center. The society has reserved an area of 8.8 Kanal for the development of a state-of-the-art school. This school is under construction and planned with a nurse room and daycare room for its staff’s facility. Moreover, the latest technology is used to make this school more attractive and beneficial.

Health Facilities

Park View Villas features many hospitals and clinics that are meeting the healthcare needs of its residents. Many of these projects are under development that will be completed soon. However, the available facilities are enough to reside in Park View Villas Lahore today.

Commercial Markets

Park View Villas is developed with the best commercial markets. These markets are usually located on the main boulevards of every block. At the same time, there are sector shops that meet the residents’ shopping/grocery needs.

Best Security

Security is one of the most important facilities that everyone thinks of before investing in any society. Park View Villas security is simply the best. The staff there offers 24/7 high-security services. CCTV Cameras are installed on every street while there are also patrolling police.

No Load shedding

Park View Villas is a load shedding-free zone. It means the society is well-prepared with electricity backup. They have good maintenance of power backup generators. So, living there means no tension about electricity and load shedding.

Features Park View City Lahore

Best Security and Peaceful Environment

Parks, Zoo, like Entertainment Facilities

Boundary Wall and Beautiful Entrance

Spacious as well as State of the Art Mosques

Lush Green and Kids Play Areas

Entertainment Spots, Cinema, as well as Restaurants

Commercial Markets and Sector Shops

Electricity, Gas, and Clean Water

Marvelous Exterior of the Houses

So, all that was the details of Park View Villas feature location and plot prices. If you are looking for any of these properties in Park View City Lahore.

PM Imran Khan directs RDA to inaugurate for Ring Road. After approving the development plan, the federal government is all set for the soon inauguration of Rawalpindi Ring Road. Yes, PM Imran has recently directed Rawalpindi Development Authority (RDA) to make the arrangements for holding the inauguration ceremony of the Rawalpindi Ring Road (RRR). The inauguration of this most-awaited project is the plan after the monsoon season.

Chairman RDA Tariq Murtaza

Taria Murtaza also shares that several other infrastructural developments are also under-progress in Rawalpindi, which will be developed soon.

Also, RDA Chairman recently had a meeting with the Prime Minister. He briefs him on the different ongoing development projects in the twin cities. The premier directed him to ensure the timely completion of these projects, particularly the development of the ring road project.

Moreover, while answering a question on the latest development work and update of the project, RDA Chairman Murtaza confirms that the RDA expects the RRR’s drawing and designing work to complete in June. After which the project will move to the execution stage.

blogs.title: Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023
blogs.excerpt: Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023 comes with its own set of challenges and uncertainties.
blogs.content:
Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023

Investment in real estate is a judicious financial move which rewards stable returns and a tangible asset base. However, Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023 comes with its own set of challenges and uncertainties. In Pakistan, a country with a dynamic socio-economic and political landscape, these challenges take on a unique dimension in 2023.

This blog post delves into intricacies of real estate investment in the country. It will showcase a comprehensive analysis of the ten most significant risks that investors might face this year. You can examine in detail with help of facts and real world examples to provide the clear picture of investment landscape.

From Political Uncertainty and economic Unpredictability to regularity Issues and security concerns this exploration is aims to make investors to take informed decisions.

Following are some potential associated risks to consider before investing in real estate.

Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023 due to Political Uncertainty

Pakistan has a history of political instability with periodic changes in leadership and governance. This instability can lead to uncertain policies that impact real estate investments. Recently, the country has experienced political unrest leading to policy shifts, which resulted in downward strike in real estate industry.

Economic Unpredictability

The Pakistani economy is prone to inflation, currency devaluation, and fiscal deficits, which can affect the purchasing power of mass. Moreover, Pakistan has faced periods of economic instability, and the value of the Pakistani Rupee has fluctuated significantly against foreign currencies. All this fiscal volatility leads to slow pooling of investments in properties and cause

Regulatory Modifications

Changes in property laws, tax regulations, or land-use policies can impact property values and the ease of doing business. Government has made efforts to reform property laws and tax policies in recent years, which can create uncertainties for investments.

Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023 and Worries about Security

Security issues, including terrorism and crime in certain regions, can deter potential tenants and investors, leading to decreased property values. Our Country has faced security challenges in various areas, affecting the real estate market’s attractiveness in those regions.

Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023 with Legal Issues

Complex property laws over property ownership or titles can result in Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023. Property-related legal disputes are not uncommon in Pakistan, and resolving them can be time-consuming.

Infrastructural Challenges

Inadequate infrastructure, including water, electricity, and transportation, can hinder property development and negatively affect property value. Infrastructure challenges are prevalent in Pakistan, impacting the quality of life and real estate investments in many areas.

Supply and Demand Gap Results in Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023

An oversupply of properties in certain areas can lead to increased competition, lower rental yields, and difficulties in finding tenants. Some areas in Pakistan have witnessed a surge in real estate development, potentially leading to oversupply concerns. These fluctuations can result in Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023.

Problems with Foreign Exchange Reserves

For foreign investors, currency exchange rate fluctuations can impact the value of investments when repatriating funds. Our Rupee’s exchange rate has experienced fluctuations in the past, impacting the returns for foreign investors.

Potential Risks of Investing in Real Estate in 2023 due to Financing Hurdles

Limited access to financing options or high-interest rates can make it challenging to fund real estate investments. People of Pakistan has faced periods of high-interest rates, which can increase the cost of financing for real estate projects.

Fraudulent Activity in Real Estate

Real estate scams and fraudulent practices can result in financial losses for investors who do not conduct thorough due diligence. Property-related fraud cases have been reported in Pakistan, highlighting the importance of careful transaction and documentation verification.

To mitigate these risks, investors and potential clients in Pakistani real estate should consult with experienced experts. , They should conduct comprehensive due diligence, stay updated on regulatory changes, and consider diversifying their investments across different property types. Furthermore, they should be prepared for potential challenges associated with political and economic instability.

blogs.title: Reasons for Property Fraud with Overseas Pakistanis
blogs.excerpt: In this blog, we are going to discuss the potential reasons for property fraud with overseas Pakistanis in detail.
blogs.content:
Property Fraud with Overseas Pakistanis

In this blog, we are going to discuss the potential reasons for property fraud with overseas Pakistanis in detail. Read this blog till the last line, if you are an overseas Pakistani and potential investor in the real estate market.

It’s important to note that not all overseas Pakistanis experience issues in property and real estate dealings in Pakistan. However, like in any country, there can be cases where individuals face challenges or fraudulent activities.

Detail of Reasons for Property Fraud with Overseas Pakistanis

Some common reasons why overseas Pakistanis may face difficulties include:

Narrow Supervision due to absence on location

Overseas Pakistanis are physically distant from the property and real estate transactions in Pakistan. It results in a more challenging situation to oversee the process. This distance can potentially lead to a lack of direct involvement and oversight. Ultimately, it becomes easier for immoral individuals to take advantage.

Lack of Awareness one of the reasons for property fraud with overseas Pakistanis

Overseas Pakistanis may not always be fully aware of the local property laws, regulations, and market dynamics. Lack of information can make them vulnerable to misinformation or fraudulent practices.

Reliance on local contacts

Some overseas Pakistanis might rely heavily on local agents, brokers, or relatives for assistance in property transactions. Depending on the trustworthiness of these intermediaries, there is a risk of misinformation or fraudulent activities.

Legal Challenges and documentation problems

Complex legal procedures and documentation requirements in property transactions can lead to confusion, misunderstandings, or potential manipulation of documents. Especially, if the overseas Pakistani is not familiar with the legal processes in Pakistan.

Market Variation one of the reasons for property fraud among overseas Pakistanis

Real estate markets can be volatile, and overseas Pakistanis may face challenges in predicting and evaluating property values accurately. This uncertainty can be exploited by wrongful individuals.

Fake discount offers

There are several fake and fraudulent discount offers in the real estate market to deceive potential buyers. Real estate business owners with zero market credibility usually present these kinds of offers overseas particularly. After taking the initial booking amount through lucrative discount offers they would run away without delivering the real estate product.

Precautionary measures amid Reasons for Property Fraud with Overseas Pakistanis

To mitigate these risks, overseas Pakistanis are advised to take certain precautions:

Do a thorough research

Conduct thorough research on the local property market, legal procedures, and documentation requirements. Stay informed about market trends and property values.

Legal Assistance

Seek the assistance of a reliable lawyer or legal advisor who is familiar with local property laws and can guide you through the legal processes.

Verify Information amid reasons for property fraud with overseas Pakistanis

Independently verify all information related to the property, such as ownership, title deeds, and any outstanding dues.

Direct Involvement

Whenever possible, try to be directly involved in the process. If this is not feasible due to distance, maintain regular communication with trustworthy local contacts.

Use Reputable Agents

If using real estate agents or brokers, choose reputable and well-established professionals with positive reviews.

In a nutshell, a combination of proactive research, legal guidance, verification of information, and direct involvement or oversight can help overseas Pakistanis minimize the risks associated with property and real estate dealings in Pakistan. It’s crucial to stay informed, and vigilant, and seek assistance from reliable professionals throughout the entire process.

What is a Dead Property?

A dead Property is a residential or commercial plot or a built property that is only consuming your money but not giving rental or capital gain income in return. Additionally, any property you are not satisfied with comes under this category.

Step-By-Step Process to Merge Your Dead Property

Advantages of Merging Your Dead Property with Ready Apartments

Merging your poor property with high-end projects of Property Naama Group is the smallest move. You will get the following benefits with this decision:

1. Turn a Liability into an Asset

Merging your bad, empty plot with a ready shop or apartment in a high-rise project will help you turn your liability into an asset. You can earn passive income through renting these properties or through capital gain.

You do not need to deal with the construction challenges. Moreover, you will not have to deal with official paperwork to get the government NOC for construction. The Property Naama Group will give you a ready property with all the government approvals.

Your raw land or unsatisfactory property will have only a limited value. After merging it with our high-value ready projects, you will get the worth of your money doubled or tripled. You can get the best return on investment (ROI) for your investments.

4. Best Opportunity for Overseas Pakistanis

It is the best offer for overseas Pakistanis. You will get valuable property without any scams. There will be no hidden costs and shady deals. The entire process will be transparent with a guarantee from Property Naama Group. You need to send your file and documents on WhatsApp.Our team will handle it remotely.

You will get ready shops or apartments in our projects. Therefore, you will start getting returns within a short period. This means your passive income will start sooner.

blogs.title: Property Tax Relief | Budget 2025-26
blogs.excerpt: I will discuss the property tax relief in Pakistan post budget 2025-26.You can read the details in the blog.
blogs.content:
Property Tax Relief in Pakistan Post Budget 2025-26

The Federal Government of Pakistan has proposed several changes for the property tax relief in the budget 2025-26. In a nutshell, the cost of purchasing a property has decreased, while property purchasing costs have increased after these tax reforms.

In this budget, the Government has removed the Federal Excise Duty on property purchases and reduced stamp duty from 4% to 1%. Similarly, the withholding tax for buyers and sellers is revised. The capital gain tax has remained unchanged.

I have discussed the budget 2025-26 property taxes in depth. Read the blog for more details.

Details of Property Tax Relief Changes in Budget 2025-26

The government has announced several changes in the withholding tax, FED, and stamp duty.I have explained these changes in detail here:

1. Change in Withholding Tax Ratio

Whenever a property transaction occurs, both the buyer and the seller are required to pay a tax known as withholding tax. You have to pay this tax at the time of property ownership transfer. Two sections of the income tax law justify this tax, which are:

Withholding Tax Rates Before Budget 2025-26

Before budget 2025-26, you need to pay this tax in the following ratio for a property worth up to 50 million.

After Passing Budget 2025-26, Withholding Tax Ratio

Passing the budget 2025-26 will make you pay withholding tax for the properties up to 50 million in the following ratio:

For Buyers (236K):

For Sellers (236C):

Following this tax reform, the cost of property is expected to decrease, which will ultimately lead to increased demand. On the other hand, higher taxes on sellers will slow down the reselling of property. In this way, the investors will hold properties for longer periods and earn big capital gains.

2. Capital Gains Tax

According to the Federal Government budget 2025-26, there will be no change in the Capital Gain Tax. The existing tax rate of 15% will remain in effect for property sales among tax filers.

What is Capital Gains Tax?

It is a tax amount that is deducted from the actual gain from the property. You can calculate the tax with this formula:

Capital Gain = Sale Price – Purchase Price

You have to pay this tax to the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) at the time of property transfer. Moreover, you need to declare your source of funding.

4. Federal Excise Duty (FED)

In the Budget 2025-26, the Federal Government has removed the Federal Excise Duty (FED) on property transactions. The FED is only applicable to movable assets, while property is an immovable asset. As a result of this decision, there will be an increase in property transactions and property sales.

5. Stamp Duty

Stamp duty is a provisional tax that is charged in addition to the withholding tax. The Federal Government has reduced the Stamp Duty from 4% to 1% at the DC value of property. The government has announced this decision in the Federal Budget 2025-26.

This decision will reduce transaction costs for property buyers and will definitely boost property sales.

6. Tax Credit

In Budget 2025-26, the Federal Government has announced a 30% tax credit for people who buy a house up to 10 Marla or a flat up to 2000 square feet. Ft through bank financing. You can avail of this tax benefit only when you purchase property through a bank loan, not a cash payment.

It means that if you receive a home loan from the bank, and pay interest on it. The Government will reduce your income by 30 % of the total interest you have paid to the bank. This step will encourage more people to take home financing from banks. It will ultimately increase property sales.

Conclusion

The Federal Government of Pakistan has supported the real estate industry through Property tax relief in Budget 2025-26. The government has transferred the tax burden from property buyers to sellers.

The government has removed the FED, reduced stamp duty, and withholding tax. Additionally, it offered tax credits to support home financing. These tax reforms will increase property transactions and help to revive the real estate sector.

Quaid -e- Azam Business Park is a business destination. It is a project by the Government of Punjab and Punjab Industrial Estates Development & Management Company. The purpose of this project is to create employment and business opportunities across the province. On completion, this Quaid -e- Azam Business Park will generate more than 250,000 jobs for skilled and unskilled people. Also, the main purpose of this project is to empower women by providing useful opportunities. Spreading over 1,536 Kanal of land, this project is officially launched in July 2020 by PM Imran Khan. All About Quaid -e- Azam Business Park Sheikhupura

The core objective behind the establishment of Quaid -e- Azam Business Park. Is to bring Foreign Direct investment. This project will create amazing opportunities and work for the growth of several industries in Pakistan. Moreover Most importantly, it will open a large number of jobs in the province.

Additionally, 200 acres of land of this project is dedicated to a labor colony. It will provide accommodation to the workers of Quaid -e- Azam Business Park.

At first, the name of this project was Quaid-e-Azam Apparel Park, but later, it is changed to Quaid-e-Azam Business Park. This project will soon get approved as Special Economic Zone (SEZ).

The location of Quaid -e- Azam Business Park is ideal. It is located on Lahore-Islamabad M-2 Motorway as it passes by Sheikhupura. This project also has a dedicated interchange to get it connected with M-2 Motorway. Quaid -e- Azam Business Park also touches Lahore-Sargodha Road and on 25 minutes’ drive from Lahore Toll Plaza. NLC Dry Port, Lahore, is around 42 kilo meters away from this project. Moreover, the distance is 55 Kil meters from Allama Iqbal International Airport. Additionally, Sheikhupura Train Station is 6 kilo meters away from Quaid -e- Azam Business Park.

The best investment opportunities in Quaid -E-Azam Business Park are available in the form of plots. There is a total of 653 plots available for investment. Also, these plots are available in 5 sizes. The numbers and sizes details of the plots are:

Those who will buy plots on installments will pay a 30% down payment, and as well as the rest in 9 bi-monthly installments.

10% will be charged for corner + road facing plot while 5% extra for road facing plots.

Quaid – e – Azam Business Park is one of the important projects in Pakistan. It will provide numerous jobs plus business opportunities across the province. Moreover, people are also finding it suitable for investment and high ROI.

Also to Adyala Road, Chakri Road, and Mouza Murat at the back of New Islamabad Airport. Additional plans up to Sangjani and back up to Zero Point will be finalized soon.

It will cover the areas of Shah Allah Ditta, Siri Saral, Margalla Road, Kohsar, F-series sectors, Bhara Kahu, and Kallar Sayedan before looping back to the starting point at Rawat in Rawalpindi.

It will have commercial areas on both sides.

Moreover, this project will also include 6 to 7 flyovers, 3 interchanges and 10 Over Head Bridges as well.

blogs.title: RDA declare Al haram City Rawalpindi Extension Illegal
blogs.excerpt: RDA has informed that Al-Haram City Rawalpindi extension including its part Danial Town at Chakri Road Rawalpindi has not been approved by RDA.
blogs.content:
RDA declare Al Haram City Rawalpindi Extension illegal

RDA Declares Al-Haram City’s Extension illegal

Rawalpindi, February 15, 2020: Rawalpindi Development Authority (RDA) has declared a housing scheme on Chakri road namely Al-Haram City’s extension illegal. RDA spokesman said Director Metropolitan Planning and Traffic Engineering (MP&TE), RDA has informed that Al-Haram City Rawalpindi extension including its part Danial Town at Chakri Road Rawalpindi has not been approved by RDA. It is pertinent to mention here that Al-Haram City has illegally advertised its extension. RDA directly and through Pakistan Citizen Portal received number of complaints about Al-Haram City’s advertisements. A Legal action is being initiated against Al-Haram City’s extension under section Punjab Private Housing schemes and Land Subdivision Rules and directed to stop illegal advertisements. He said it is further informed that Al-Haram City Phase-I Mouza Kolian Par Chakri Road Rawalpindi containing 702 Kanal and 15 marlas were approved by Town Municipal Administration (Rawalpindi Municipal Corporation) in year 2008. RDA advises general public that they should not make any investment in any illegal / unauthorized Housing Scheme and Buildings Project which status declared illegal by RDA. Otherwise, they themselves will be responsible for their losses. RDA spokesman said Director General (DG) RDA has directed the MP&TE Directorate to take strict action against all illegal housing schemes, their advertisements, illegal / unauthorized commercial and residential construction activities and encroachments without any fear or favour.

For more details Call at :0331 9840145

RDA Issues Notices to Five Illegal Housing Societies | Blue World City | Rudn Enclave Islamabad and other NOC

RDA Issues Notices to Five Illegal Housing Societies

Rawalpindi Development Authority (RDA) has issued notices to the owners of five illegal housing societies. These notices issues to stop them from floating advertisements to plunder innocent citizens and development work.

Director MP & TE

Director MP&TE Jamshed Aftab, say RDA has also obtained demolition orders besides filing complaints with police for registration of cases against the owners of five illegal housing societies.

Five Illegal Housing Societies

The five illegal housing societies are Blue World City, Khanial Homes (Chakri Road), Rudn Enclave. Also, Engro Farm Houses (Adiala Road), and Broha Farm Houses in Murree are illegal.

The Director MP & TE have served the owners of five illegal housing societies with notices. These notices issues will stop them from floating advertisements to lure innocent people and from development work.

Basically, these are the warning letters. But if the societies do not stop the development and advertisement immediately, RDA would seal their site offices.

Moreover, RDA advises the general public that they should not make any investment in any illegal/unauthorized housing scheme. Otherwise, they themselves will be responsible for their losses.

As the status of these housing societies is illegal. So, RDA has also requested Islamabad Electric Supply Company (IESCO), Sui Northern Gas Pipelines Ltd (SNGPL), and PTCL not to extend their services.

Also, on the orders of Chairman RDA Tariq MehmoodMurtaza and Director General (DG) RDA Ammara Khan, directed the MP&TE Directorate without any fear or favor will take strict action against illegal/unauthorized commercial and residential construction activities.

RDA Issues a Checklist for Investment in New Housing Societies

RDA Issues a Checklist for Investment

RDA Issues a Checklist for Investment in New Housing Societies. Twin cities Rawalpindi and Islamabad, both have experienced several new real estate developments in the last few years. Different high-scale and attractive housing societies and commercial projects are still developing in their outskirts.

The development of New Islamabad International Airport has to boost up the value of nearby properties. That’s why both developers and contractors are focusing more on the development of new projects in its surroundings. These new developments are offering a number of attractive investment opportunities to buyers as well as investors. For More Interesting Projects.

But still, the risk factor is involved. So, investors must be aware of all the facts, and they need to cross-check all the property details. This proper investigation will assure the secure investment and will return you with a handsome profit. To ensure the safe and profitable investment of the buyers, RDA has recently issued a checklist for investment in new housing societies.

Here we are also sharing this list for your ease! Check Below:

Checklist for Investment in the Properties of Rawalpindi/Islamabad

A buyer should visit the housing scheme/society site physically. On visiting the site, do check the difference between the on-site developments and claimed in advertisement. Also, see the distance of society from the main city centers.

Check out the details of company registration with SECP. Also, get information that if the company is eligible to set up/ develop the society or not.

Also, verify that the administration of the housing society has acquired the land legally and have no issues with authority CDA/RDA.

You can also ask the society’s management for the registration number of the housing society along with an attested copy of the approved map.

For NOC attestation, contact TMA/RDA/CDA.

Also, make sure to check if there is any case registered against this housing society in NAB or any other institute/court.

Most of the time, developers do not include development charges in advertisement/payment plan and deliberately hide it so, before investment gets all details regarding this matter.

Make sure to check the current status of basic utilities like electrification, Sui gas, water connection, telephone installation, and sewerage.

You can also verify the details of amenities like masjid, park, school, and hospital given in the advertisement. More often, the developing society already reserves the land for these amenities. Other projects.

Always make payments through banking channels and must receive the receipt.

Also, save the contact numbers and address of the main and sub-offices of the housing society/scheme.

So, don’t wait and contact Property Naama Consultants for further details!

Reasons to Invest in Urban City Lahore

Exploring the Reasons to Invest in Urban City Lahore in this informative blog. Read till the last line, if you are a potential investor. Following are some appealing reasons to invest in Urban City Lahore

The strategic Location of the society

In deciding about any residential and commercial project, location has always been important. Therefore, the strategic location of Urban City Lahore will provide you with a definite reason to invest. Urban City Lahore is located on the Main GT Road from Kala Shah Kaku (5-10 Minutes’ drive), on the right side, the urban City Lahore is located on the link road.

It is accessible from multiple parts of Lahore and adjacent cities/towns. Consequently, Urban City Lahore is a 5-minute drive from Lahore Ring Road, M-2 (Lahore-Islamabad Motorway). Similarly, the entry point of the M-11 (Lahore-Sialkot) Motorway is also distant at a 5-minute timeframe.

Moreover, the Allama Iqbal International Airport, Mall Road Lahore, and Azadi Chowk Lahore are 15 to 25 minutes away. Furthermore, DHA (Defense Housing Authority) is a few hundred meters away.

Affordable payment plan one of the Reasons to Invest in Urban City Lahore

Society has a very affordable payment plan which is also one of the reasons for its success among others. Due to this easy pricing plan, the City Housing Block of the society has sold out in a record time.

Now, you can invest in its newly launched City Venture District Block under the following payment plan. It offers 3,5, and 10 Marla residential plots in a 3.5-year payment plan.

Credible Developers of the Project

In everyday shopping for daily utilities, we humans always try to buy branded things for better quality. Therefore, the same manufacturer credibility principle will apply while investing in real estate products. As far as the developer of Urban City Lahore is concerned, here we get two credible brands. Their reputation is evident from the previous projects in Lahore City.

Both the Developers (Al Hafeez Developers and Al Rehman Developers) have delivered famous projects like;

Education along with Restoration one of the Reasons to Invest in Urban City Lahore

Buying a plot to construct a house proclaims our seriousness about the future of our coming generations. The most important element of securing the future of our children is giving them quality education. Therefore, investing in Urban City Lahore can help you to fulfill this obligation.

The society is easily accessible from the top-notch higher education Institution of Lahore. The University of Engineering and Technology (UET), The University of Health Sciences (UHS), and GC University are at the spot-on location. In addition, famous food brands like McDonald’s and KFC are along the way.

Master plan one of the Reasons to Invest in Urban City Lahore

A well-designed master plan is a guarantee for the long-term success of any real Estate project. It ensures financial feasibility and efficient use of resources. The Urban City of Lahore has a unique master plan designed by SURBANA JURONG. SURBANA JURONG is one of the largest Asian-based urban and infrastructure Consulting firms. It has completed master planning in over 60 countries. In Pakistan, they have completed several projects including different phases of Al-Rehman Garden.

The Development and Construction Work

It is a complete city, designed on a piece of land incorporating 4500 acres. Out of which, 1500 acres have been purchased by the developers. The development and construction work is underway. Ground Lining of land, construction of inter-society roads, sidebars, and establishment of signboards have been completed.

The society administration has completed and sold out its first block. Now, the infrastructural development work is in full swing in its latest block known as City Venture District Block.

TMA Approved Project one of the Reasons to Invest in Urban City Lahore

The master plan of Urban City Lahore is officially approved by TMA (Tehsil Municipal Administration) which consists of several commercial and residential blocks. Broad roads, green bands, sports locations, educational and health facilities, an eco-friendly environment along modern infrastructure are the prominent features among others of the master plan.

Whooping price difference with surrounding societies

The Urban City of Lahore is surrounded by very well-known housing societies of the city. Among them, the Al-Kabir Orchard Lahore, Lahore Smart City, SA Garden, Basit Town, Green Valley Lahore, and Adam Housing Society are included.

Surprisingly, the Urban City of Lahore is way more affordable as compared to these housing societies. For instance, a 5 Marla plot in Lahore Smart City and SA Garden costs around 35,00,000/- and 40,00,000/- Rupees respectively.

While a 5 Marla plot in Urban City Lahore is worth 17,75,000 /- Rupees only. Therefore, the low upfront prices of plots in the Urban City of Lahore provide you with a startling reason to invest.

Easy Public Transport one of the Reasons to Invest in Urban City Lahore

The availability of easily accessible and affordable public transportation has always been a decisive factor in opting for a residential society. The same goes with the Urban City of Lahore, where The Metrobus System (MBS) Lahore has been approved from Shahdra to Kala Shah Kaku and has been recently approved by the interim Chief Minister of Punjab Mr. Mohsin Naqvi.

Therefore, being located on Kala Shah Kaku, the Urban City of Lahore will be the main beneficiary of this initiative. Ultimately, it is providing you with another reason to invest in Urban City Lahore.

Trouble-Free Road Connectivity

There are several important roads that exist in the close vicinity of the Urban City of Lahore. GT Road Lahore, Lahore By-pass, M-2 ( Islamabad- Lahore ) Motorway, M-11 ( Lahore- Sialkot ) Motorway, and Ring Road Lahore are examples of these roads. Due to this road connectivity, Urban City Lahore has become a preferred Migration destination for the people of adjacent areas. For instance, residents of Sheikhupura, Gujranwala, Nankana Sahib, and other close areas can easily relocate in this society.

What is a Registry?

A process involving sale deed creation, claiming property legal rights, and registering a sale under your name is called Property registry.

The complete process of property registry involves following steps:

(This whole process can be completed in a day time-frame)

Renovation ideas to sell your home instantly

In this blog, we are going to explore renovation ideas to sell your home instantly. The past couple of years has witnessed, a real estate recession in the land of pure. These testing times sifted the paradigm from scarcity of homes towards abundance with fewer buyers.

Here are some renovation ideas to bring your home on the panicle of the list of available homes for sell.

Reconstruct the kitchen

In fact, the kitchen being the heart of the home is very crucial in a renovation program. Prefer an open kitchen design over a closed one. Ameliorate the kitchen structure as a whole to give a new look to the cookhouse.

Bathroom rationalization one of the renovation ideas to sell your home instantly

Rationalize the bathroom area of your house by overhauling and adding new facilities. For illustration: you can install a walk-in shower and deep soggy tub as an added advantage.

Upgradation to save energy

Surging inflation has compelled almost every class of society to go for energy-efficient modes of lifestyle. Installation of solar panels, modern insulation lines, energy energy-saving windows and doors would be an added advantage. Moreover, upgrading to an advanced thermostat system will increase the house value to attract better clients.

Modernizing outdoor sitting spaces one of the renovation ideas to sell your home instantly

Similarly, the outdoor sitting area is the scene that constructs a second impression after the front view of any house. By placing a well-designed decorate cover, courtyard, or grounds you can make your house a way more attractive.

Space for work-from-home

After the Covid-19 era, working from home is a new normal for the world. To work from home, a fully-developed home office is an must infrastructural need to fulfill. Therefore, consider building a modern home office to add a new plus to your selling pitch to sell your home.

Consider Basement furnishing

Complete your basement for a complete residential and commercial station. This aspect of the home renovation project is considerably important due to surging population growth in urban centers of the world.This extra feature will increase the selling strength of your home to many folds.

Street Appeal

Increase the street appeal of your home as it will go to the old saying,” First impression is the last impression”. Several changes you can make under this slogan. Among them, trending paint colors, modern exterior lighting, a look at the main gate and the list is counting.

Home Automation one of the renovation ideas to sell your home instantly

Likewise, the latest security system, automated lighting, climate control, installation of innovative cleaning devices, and other such features will increase your home appeal by many folds.

RING ROAD RAWALPINDI | STARTING DATE, JANUARY 2021

RING ROAD RAWALPINDI

A kitchen gardening function was arranged, after the approval of the Minister of Planning & Development Mr. Asad Umer. The event was at CBR Cooperative Housing Society Phase-II in association with RDA. Addressing this event, Chairman Rawalpindi Development Authority (RDA), Mr. Tariq Mehmood said that the Punjab Government approved the Ring Road Rawalpindi project. And Prime Minister Imran Khan and Chief Minister Punjab Mr. Sardar Usman Buzdar will inaugurate the launch in December 2020. RRR Route.

He also added that the Punjab Government allotted Rs. 6.5 billion to RDA for this project. He also said that this project will be around 50-60 km long. This project and Motorway are based on the same design. More Info about Ring Road Rawalpindi.

RRR Location

Over Sangjani, Shah Allah Ditta, Margalla Road, and F sectors, the Ring Road will help riders reach Pakistan’s Secretariat. Moreover, the road length from GT road to Margalla will be only 10km. The Rind Road will be the linkage between Bhara Kahu and Kallar Syedan. This interchange will bring several job opportunities as various residential and industrial projects.

These projects will be on Adyala Road, Chak Beli Khan Road, Chakri Road, and Motorway. Furthermore, being connected to Motorway, it will provide an easy and safe entry to travelers from Gilgit Baltistan & Hunza.

According to Tariq Mehmood, it’s the time to bring change. It will help reduce the pressure of traffic in twin cities by being a direct link between Motorway and GT Road. And it will be helping thousands of riders to travel peacefully in no time.

This project is a Public-Private partnership and will lay the basis in the first quarter of 2021. According to estimations, it will be completed within 18 months.

According to the investment point of view, this project has a great value because of all the nearby housing societies. Such as Rudan Enclave, Capital Smart City, Rose Valley, Bahria Town, and other projects’ prices will be appreciated. Hence it will be a good investment to make in these projects.

Ring Road Rawalpindi Route – Latest Details | Complete Overview

Ring Road Rawalpindi Route

RDA has recently finalized a revised alignment plan of Ring Road Rawalpindi. Few changes are made in the RRR map, and the revised plan has changed in the alignment, as well as new alignment, are added. This new alignment is toward Sangjani, and it will be connected to Margalla Avenue. As different housing and commercial projects are located in the RRR Route, so the final plan to use the land is also designed RRR.

Generally, the RRR Route will start from Murat to Sangjani near AWT Housing Scheme and lead up to Zero Point Islamabad. Rawalpindi Ring Road will pass from Radio Pakistan to Losar. Also, it will be connected to Adyala Road, Chakri Road, and Mouza Murat at the back of New Islamabad Airport. Moreover, the plans for Sangjani and back up to Zero Point are also finalized.

Rawalpindi Ring Road is a route spanning over 66 KM. Around 50 KM, which is more than half of this project is from Rawat to the Thalian Interchange and falls in Rawalpindi. The remaining 16 KM will pass through Islamabad. More Details.

RRR Route will cover the areas of Shah Allah Ditta, Siri Saral, Margalla Road, Kohsar, F-series sectors, Bhara Kahu, and Kallar Sayedan before looping back to the starting point at Rawat in Rawalpindi.

RRR will have commercial areas on both sides.

So, once the development work completes, the area in its proximity will earn even more than 200% profit.

The development of RRR will definitely increase the charm and appeal of the Islamabad Property Sector. It will significantly benefit the projects located near M-2 Motorway. Moreover, the project located in the proximity of New Islamabad International Airport will also get the maximum benefit from it. Once the project complete, it will open a number of investment opportunities with the best returns both in Islamabad and Rawalpindi.

blogs.content:
Ring Road Rawalpindi | to be Launched Soon 2021, Complete Details

Ring Road Rawalpindi 2021

Ring Road Rawalpindi in 2021 is an economic game-changer project launching soon in 2021. The official launch of this project is expected in the mid of March and April 2021. As disclosed by CM Punjab Sardar Buzdar, PM Imran Khan will launch this Ring Road Rawalpindi project.

Undoubtedly, the launch of Ring Road Rawalpindi is one of the hottest topics in Pakistan’s real estate sector.

Indeed, this project has gained much popularity in the twin cities of Islamabad. Here are more important details about RRR.

Ring Road Rawalpindi – An Overview

This RRR project has a proposed length of 64 kilometers. It will start from the N-5 near Radio Pakistan in Rawat. This ring road will then pass through the M-1 and M-2 and end at Sangjani by crossing the N-5 to connect with Islamabad.

RRR project is a six-lane road project with a total of eight interchanges. The starting point of this road is Rawat near the fruits and vegetable market.

However, the development of a dry port, bus and truck terminals, theme parks, and a healthy city is also a part of the plan in this route of Ring Road Rawalpindi. More Info.

Ring Road Rawalpindi – Progress Update 2021

The teams working on Ring Road Rawalpindi’s development has recently completed the survey of land for 40 kilometers long Rawalpindi Ring Road track. Also, the identification work of the land for the RRR has been completed.

According to the news, the Government of Punjab has approved the funds and the finalized alignment of this project. All the work on planning the ring road route, alignment, interchanges, designs, and economic zones have already been finalized and approved.

Also, there is major progress in this project such as:

Ring Road Rawalpindi project will facilitate the China Pakistan Economic Corridor (CPEC) route. This project will link with Hakla-DI Khan (M14) Interchange. The linkage of the two major routes will be beneficial to move all the industrial materials and freights from the CPEC route through this ring road route.

The development of the Ring Road Rawalpindi project will divert the heavy flow of traffic. It will also boost the economic activities in the twin cities. So, overall, it’s an economic game-changer in Rawalpindi and Islamabad.

blogs.title: Ring Road Rawalpindi work | Complete Details | Updates
blogs.excerpt: Ring Road Rawalpindi work The most awaited public sector commuting project in one of the twin Cities of Pakistan starting shortly.
blogs.content:
Ring Road Rawalpindi work Set to Soar Once Again

The most awaited public sector commuting project in one of the twin Cities of Pakistan starting shortly.

Yes! We are talking about none other than, the most celebrated Ring Road Rawalpindi. It is the most in-need and discussed public sector developmental road project.

The Ring Road Rawalpindi was incepted back in the year 2022, when the former Prime Minister of Pakistan and Cricket Legend, Imran Khan performed the groundbreaking ceremony of the project on Saturday, March 19th, 2022.

This project did not put a single step forward, as a month later in April 2022; he was overthrown by the government.

Resumption of Ring Road Rawalpindi

Now the current government has started working on it again. Allegedly in a consultation meeting, Rawalpindi Development Authority (RDA) and BOTEK (Botek Bogazici MUSAvirlik Anonim Sirketi) signed a consultation agreement to provide a third-party recommendation for the selection of best suited route for the Ring Road Rawalpindi.

BOTEK Bosporus Technical Consulting Corporation is an independent Consulting Engineering Firm that provides multi-disciplinary engineering services.

This project has a total length of 65 km stretching –out from Channi Sher Alam bridge near Rawat to Thalian Interchange adjacent to the M-2 (Lahore-Islamabad) Motorway.

Allegedly, under the Land Acquisition Act, of 1894, the government authorities have acquired a piece of land in relevant locations to start construction of the project.

Expected Route Planning

As per the recommendations of BOTEK BOSPORUS, Phase-I of Ring Road Rawalpindi should be outlined from Channi Sher Alam Bridge near Rawat to Thalian Interchange covering a total distance of 38.3 km.

The Phase- II of the project should pass through a new road connecting Margalla Avenue to the M-1 Motorway passing through New Islamabad International Airport.

The other option presented was to connect the M-1 (Islamabad – Peshawar) motorway to the M-2 (Lahore- Islamabad) motorway directly.

The Ring Road Rawalpindi (RRR) would be 65 km in length with 110 meters in width comprising 6 lanes several service roads and Interchanges.

The Perspective Beneficiaries of Ring Road Rawalpindi

The greater Ring Road Rawalpindi involves five major locations in its planned route namely: Channi Sher Alam Bridge near Rawat, Chak Beli Khan Road, Adyala Road, Chakri Road, and M-2 Motorway Thalian.

Owning to the strategic importance of this project, every section of this route would be benefited.

Potential Benefits of Ring Road Rawalpindi

The Ring Road Rawalpindi will benefit the twin cities in different locations in different ways. Here are some potential benefits of the forthcoming public sector commuting project.

Ease to Traffic Management

One of the basic goals of the Ring Road Rawalpindi (RRR) is to streamline the city traffic away from the urban hub towards adjacent localities. It would provide traffic relief to the surrounding commercial and residential installations.

Enhanced approachability

The fringes of Islamabad-Rawalpindi would be connected and other adjacent cities easily. The increased accessibility would increase the economic activity in surrounding places.

Low Urban Pollution

The urban pollution level will surely fall with decreasing pollution sources of the city. This will ultimately result in a cleaner environment and a healthy lifestyle.

Enhanced Economic Growth

The increased transportation infrastructure provided by the Ring Road Rawalpindi (RRR). A ring road can fasten economic activity in the nearest regions. Businesses may be more tilted to these areas for better operational activity.

Real Estate Boost

The streamlined transportation means will enhance the demand whereabouts. This would ultimately boost the construction activity of residential, commercial, and industrial infrastructure increasing business growth through urban enlargement.

Increased Travel and Tourism

A ring road can facilitate easier travel for tourists and travelers moving around the city and its outskirts. This convenience can promote tourism and result in increased spending in adjacent regions, benefiting local businesses and services.

Logistic Based Distribution

The efficient movement of goods around the city and beyond is crucial for businesses. A ring road can provide a faster and more reliable route for logistics and distribution activities, benefiting industries in adjacent areas.

Better Urban Planning

The presence of a ring road can influence urban planning decisions in the adjacent regions. Planners may focus on creating more organized and efficient layouts, taking advantage of the improved connectivity provided by the ring road.

It’s a matter of consideration that the Ring Road Rawalpindi while ring road projects can bring these potential benefits, its success is associated with accurate planning, design, and execution.

Consideration of environmental impacts, community engagement, and collaboration between different stakeholders is crucial to ensure the positive impacts outweigh any potential negative effects.

blogs.title: Role of Real Estate in Economy of Pakistan
blogs.excerpt: Role of Real Estate in Economy of Pakistan is not hidden. It supports 40 allied industries. I have discussed this topic in detail.
blogs.content:
Role of Real Estate in Economy of Pakistan

Real estate is crucial for driving the country’s economy and financial growth. It provides employment, fulfills housing and commercial building needs, and supports infrastructural development. In this blog, I will share the role of Real Estate in the Economy of Pakistan, employment generation, and other sectors.

How does Real Estate impact the Economy of a Country?

The real estate sector impacts the economy of Pakistan in different ways. Here are some prominent ways to discuss:

A Stimulant for the Economy

Real estate is not just about buying and selling plots, homes, and commercial properties. Instead, it plays a pivotal role in the national economy through its ripple effects.

According to M.Ismail (Chairman, Property Naama Group), a single property investment can create employment in over 40 allied industries. This increased business activity improves the overall GDP of a country and increases buyers’ confidence.

Business Growth for Allied Industries

According to real estate experts, the growth in the real estate sector has a direct and indirect impact on allied industries. It affects these industries in the following ways:

Construction Industry

With growth in real estate, the demand for cement, steel, sand, and other construction materials increases.

Interior Design Work

The increased demand for housing results in a boosted supply of interior decor products. Similarly, it also improves the requirement for furniture and other accessories.

Financial Services

Boosted real estate growth also elevates demand for home financing services and insurance products.

Professional Services

The boasted economic growth also extended demand for professional services, such as architectural, engineering, legal, and other.

These are some examples of industries. In this way, numerous other industries also benefited from real estate growth and development.

Impact of the Real Estate Sector on Employment Generation

Real estate is a labor-intensive industry that provides millions of jobs. Commercial projects and developments create more employment in urban areas. According to the Economic Survey of Pakistan, the real estate sector employs around 8% of labor.

Additionally, the real estate sector indirectly employs several allied industries such as home decor, furniture, the electric industry, and others.

Role of Government Policies in Real Estate Growth

The Government of Pakistan has recognized the potential and contributions of real estate. Government policies such as Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs), Property Tax Reforms, Waiver of Federal Excise Duty (FDI) for first-time property buyers, and other policies have positively attracted growth and development. These policies have attracted foreign and local investments and improved GDP.

Conclusion

The real estate sector is instrumental in driving economic growth, and the role of Real Estate in the economy of Pakistan is very crucial. Therefore, it creates several jobs directly and indirectly. For investors and stakeholders, this sector has unlimited opportunities to create wealth. Pakistan can improve GDP and secure economic prosperity through real estate-friendly policies.

Rudn Enclave Vs Blue World City Islamabad

Rudn Enclave Vs Blue World City Islamabad. Blue World City is a mega housing project; however, Rudn Enclave is an upcoming, new residential society in Islamabad. Both of these societies are smartly planned to meet the residential and investment needs of modern investors. Offering the best residential and commercial properties, Blue World City and Rudn Enclave are among Islamabad’s top real estate projects. So, choosing one option between the two is quite difficult. But don’t be worried! Today, we are here to make a quick comparison between these two societies just for your ease.

Let’s discuss the major features of Blue World City and Rudn Enclave below in this latest write-up!

Blue World City Islamabad Vs Rudn Enclave Islamabad

Developers Rudn Enclave & Blue World City

Rudn Enclave is a project of RMRSCO (Pvt.) Ltd. These are the developers who have completed many projects but on small levels. On the other hand, Blue World City is an appealing housing project of the Blue Group of Companies. The company is owned by Saad Nazir, Son of ex-Deputy Commissioner Lahore Ch.Nazeer.

Blue World City & Rudn Enclave Location

Rudn Enclave Islamabad is located near to the Adyala road. The head office of RMRSCO (Pvt. Ltd is located in Phase-7, Bahria Town. However, Blue World City is located on the Main Chakri Road near Chakri Interchange on Lahore-Islamabad Motorway M2. Also, it lies close to New Islamabad Airport.

Rudn Enclave is a beautiful housing society sprawling over the land of 3000+ Kanals. The area is further divided into 3 Blocks. However, Blue World City is covering an area of almost 5000 Kanal. The whole area of the society is divided into four phases and then into further blocks.

Development Updates of The Projects

Blue World City Islamabad is a rapidly developing society. It is developing at a satisfactory pace. Most of the work of roads and underground wiring is completed. On the other hand, Rudn Enclave is a new project and currently under-developing phase.

Conclusion

Blue World City Islamabad is a master-planned community with so many attractions. It is a modern housing society with several investment opportunities. It is located in the hub of modern societies on Chakri Road. However, Rudn Enclave enjoys an ideal location on Adyala Road. It is a well-planned housing society. blogs.title: Is Saffron City a Safe Investment?
blogs.excerpt: Thinking of investing in Saffron City? Our 2026 market analysis covers safety, returns, development status, and whether it's worth your money.
blogs.content:
Is Saffron City a Safe Investment? A Market Analysis for 2026

Pakistan’s real estate market has a history of scams and fraudulent investments. In this uncertain environment, the saffron City has begun attracting genuine attention. So, is Saffron City actually a safe investment? Let’s break down this mystery in this blog.

Location Advantage of Saffron City

In property, location is not just one factor among many, but it is the main factor. Societies connected to active road infrastructure consistently outperform isolated projects in terms of resale activity, rental demand, commercial growth, and long-term stability.

Saffron City benefits from direct access near GT Road and T-Chowk.This location advantage places it on a corridor linking Rawalpindi, Islamabad, and surrounding residential zones. Crucially, this connectivity already exists on the ground.

The project is in proximity to several established residential and commercial zones, including DHA Phase 3, DHA Valley access corridors, Bahria Town extensions, and routes connected to the Islamabad Expressway. For residents, this translates into daily convenience. For investors, it creates liquidity because well-connected projects attract stronger resale demand.

The Rawalpindi Ring Road Factor

One of the most significant long-term growth drivers for Saffron City is its proximity to the Rawalpindi Ring Road corridor. Historically, major road infrastructure projects in a city have driven significant appreciation in surrounding areas.

The Ring Road is expected to improve connectivity between Islamabad and Rawalpindi, reduce commute times for daily travellers, stimulate commercial activity, and increase residential demand along linked housing schemes.

Therefore, residential and commercial projects near GT Road and Ring Road are entering a window of pre-maturity appreciation to reward long-term returns for early investors. Saffron City’s location within this developing corridor gives it strategic importance over other projects in the city.

Provision of an RDA-Approved NOC

Illegal properties have been one of the most damaging factors in Pakistan’s real estate sector. Countless investors have suffered losses through unapproved housing societies, disputed land titles, and delayed NOCs.

Saffron City holds RDA (Rawalpindi Development Authority) approval of a No Objection Certificate (NOC). Therefore, it provides investors with legal assurance about this project and makes it a safe real estate investment.

Difference of Actual Plots vs. File Speculation

One of Saffron City’s strongest practical advantages is that it offers actual identifiable plot numbers rather than a file number.

This controlled approach by Saffron City creates better market transparency, more realistic pricing, stronger buyer confidence, and reduced oversupply pressure. All these factors make it a safe project to invest in.

On-Ground Development Work

In today’s market, serious investors do not move on brochures alone. They want visible proof that a project is actually being built.

Saffron City has initiated development activity, including road work, infrastructure laying, landscaping, and machinery movement across multiple areas.

This physical progress is a meaningful signal. Development-backed projects consistently maintain stronger long-term demand compared to societies that remain in the marketing phase for years without tangible ground-level progress.

The project’s planning direction, wider roads, infrastructure, green spaces, and development work make it a secure project.

The Early Investor Advantage

History in Pakistan’s property market consistently shows that investors entering during earlier development phases secure the strongest long-term margins. Saffron City is still considered an early-to-mid-stage project relative to mature neighbouring societies, which means:

This advantage makes Saffron City Rawalpindi a safe and perfect investment option.

Final Remark: Is Saffron City a Safe Investment?

No investment in Pakistan’s real estate market comes with a guarantee. What a good investment can offer is a strong combination of legal standing, strategic location, visible site development, and realistic growth potential. On all of these parameters, Saffron City presents a comparatively credible case.

Its GT Road location, Ring Road corridor accessibility, RDA-approved status, actual plot possession, and on-ground development activity make it the best project in the market.

Saffron City offers a practical opportunity with promising long-term benefits. You only need to have your market research and invest through a credible real estate organization like Property Naama Group.
