Success Journey of Muhammad Ismail

Muhammad Ismail

CEO and Group Chairman of Property Naama LLC UAE and Pakistan. Muhammad Ismail, a young entrepreneur, trailblazing pilot, and influential social media personality, has carved an exceptional path in the real estate industry.

As the CEO and Group Chairman of Property Naama LLC, which operates in both the UAE and Pakistan, his story exemplifies determination, innovation, and leadership.

The Beginning

Muhammad Ismail’s journey into real estate began in 2017 when he leveraged the power of social media to market real estate products.

Furthermore, his innovative approach quickly garnered attention and laid the foundation for his future ventures. Recognizing the growth potential, he officially launched Property Naama Group in January 2019.

Building the Umar Brand

As an international real estate developer, Muhammad Ismail has made an indelible mark with over 20 Mega residential and commercial projects in Pakistan and the UAE under the UMAR brand. His projects, known for their architectural brilliance and swift execution, have redefined the region’s modern living and commercial spaces.

Recognition and Achievements

Moreover, In recognition of his rapid execution of commercial high-rise projects in Pakistan, Muhammad Ismail was recently honored with the Excellency Shield by Dr. Arif Alvi, President of Pakistan. This prestigious accolade highlights his contributions to the country’s urban development landscape.

Motivating the Next Generation

Beyond his business success, Muhammad Ismail has emerged as a trending social media influencer, inspiring thousands of young individuals to embrace entrepreneurship. Similarly, His motivational content encourages the youth to think beyond conventional employment and take bold steps toward building their businesses.

Legacy of Leadership

Muhammad Ismail’s leadership, entrepreneurial spirit, and commitment to innovation have established him as a real estate tycoon. His story is inspiring, showcasing how vision and perseverance can turn dreams into reality.

blogs.title: The best time to resume real estate market in Pakistan
blogs.excerpt: In this blog the best time to resume real estate market in Pakistan has been delineated with different shades of opinion.
blogs.content:
The best time to resume real estate market in Pakistan

In this blog the best time to resume real estate market in Pakistan has been delineated with different shades of opinion. Read this blog to the last line before planning your next property investment in Pakistan.

Periodic recession in the real estate market of the country is a norm across the globe. This practice has also been witnessed in Pakistan in the last couple of years.

Political Confusion and the best time to resume real estate market in Pakistan

In the globalized world of the 21st century, it is almost impossible for any country to violate basic human rights for a longer period of time. Similarly, Pakistan is also all set to attain its normalized political affairs after a short dip of uncertainty. After the expected elections in January 2024, the political turmoil in the country will settle to a concluding end. Afterward, the real estate market of the country will definitely witness a boost in the coming years.

Crackdown against Dollar Stockpiles

Surprisingly, In the last two to three months strong commitment to political leadership in the country has given the desired results about Dollar hoarding. Law Enforcement Agencies (LEAs) with effective strategies have limited the Dollar trading in the black market. This results in a frequent drop in the dollar rate in the Pakistani market. This kind of momentary initiative will build the trust of investors to restart investments in different sectors.

Gold Market Overseeing and the best time to resume real estate market in Pakistan

According to the same set of strategies dollar market is also being regulated by the top brass of the country. The government is trying to record and register gold investments to stop black marketing and generate a handful of revenue. These initiatives can be witnessed by recent drops in gold prices in the country.

Solidity of Stock Market in the Country

Indeed, the stock market is subject to continuous unsteadiness due to political instability in the country. Moreover, the alleged announcement of the election date in the country will end the stock market volatility with stable investments. It will also pave the way for the stability of the real estate market in the country.

Expert opinion about the best time to resume real estate market in Pakistan

A team of real estate consultants at Property Naama Group has analyzed the real estate market of the country in detail. Keeping in consideration, the recent recession in the market and ongoing law and order and political situation they have drawn some conclusions. In their opinion, the property market will recover in a timeframe of a year and a half.

A new lot of Buyers

A historic dip in real estate prices in the country has created a new lot of buyers and investors. Established realtors and real estate companies have reduced the prices of their inventory subsequently to support the industry. This act of common good by the developers will definitely support the industry and will help to recover from the recession.

blogs.title: The Fastest Way to Sell Your Home in 2023
blogs.excerpt: In this informative blog, we will explore the Fastest Way to Sell Your Home in 2023 by exploring different selling tips.
blogs.content:
The Fastest Way to Sell Your Home in 2023

It is the biggest challenge to sell your home in such a competitive real estate market in the year 2023. In this informative blog, we will explore the Fastest Way to Sell Your Home in 2023 by exploring different selling tips.

Read this blog to the end to get different ideas to consider while planning a strategy to sell your home.

Here is the list of above mentioned tips and tricks to sell your home instantly in a competitive market.

Quote the optimum price

Tagging your home with the optimum selling price is very important. Go and visit the recent sale deals in your area either offline or online.

Evaluate immediate market conditions and hire a reputable property consultant in your area. Stay away from overpricing to avoid the spoilage of your deal.

Boosting street appearance is the fastest way to sell your home in 2023

“First impression is the last impression”, this old saying has proven true in the real estate market of any country. Therefore, enhance your home’s street appearance by maintaining its exterior in good shape and fashion.

Improving landscaping, coloring, and horticulture scenery can help a lot in this regard.

Simplification and generalization

Simplify and generalize your house to make it highly appealing to a wide range of people. Try to keep your house empty at the time of client visit for better bidding chances.

Professional Presentation is the fastest way to sell your home in 2023

Prefer to present your home professionally to your potential clients. This will enhance the chances of positive deals with high capital gains in a short span of time.

Prime Quality Listing Images

Do hire a professional photographer to demonstrate your home in the best postures online. Thereby you can attract the section of clients easily who go through online searches before deciding to buy anything.

Good marketing strategy is the fastest way to sell your home in 2023

Work with a real estate company or agent who holds a strong portfolio in the market. Use both online and offline marketing tools to capture the wider audience in your specific area.

Focus on Recent Renovations

Stage the recent renovations of your house with glaring pictures on different marketing platforms.

Leverage Emerging Technologies

Prefer emerging presentation technologies over obsolete technologies to stay ahead of the world. Use virtual tours and 3D mockups along with drone footage to convince your remote clients. This initiative will increase rates of your marketing success by many folds.

Responding right away is the fastest way to sell your home in 2023

After listing your home on multiple marketplaces online and offline, stay vigilant to customer responses. Respond quickly to any customer query to secure the best deal on time.

Preferably install auto-chat boots on your social media pages to be available for catering to customers round the clock.

Learn Negotiation Skill

Prefer to hire a property sales agent who can do sale deals on your behalf instead of doing it by yourself. In case, you cannot afford to hire a sales agent, learn how to negotiate with a sales mentor.

This skill will boost your confidence on the one hand and will secure the deal on the other hand.

Thinking about timing is the fastest way to sell your home in 2023

Timing is very important in sales pitch for almost all industries and the same is true for the real estate market.

Learn the best timing events from your real estate consultant to market your home at the right time. This will help you secure your deal timely in and appropriate ways.

Top 10 housing societies in Islamabad

Cities can be vibrant and cosmopolitan. If you don’t want to deal with the hustle and bustle of living in one of these bustling urban centers, consider looking at Islamabad. This capital city has great weather, open spaces, and modern architecture that makes it ideal for home buyers who want to live an easygoing lifestyle. The city’s many housing societies are popular with families, young professionals, retired people, and those looking to build their dream home from scratch or by customizing an existing property.

7 Wonders City Islamabad

7 Wonders City Islamabad is a world-class housing society that offers top-notch facilities and amenities to its residents. The developers ensured that all the basic needs of the residents are met and that they access to all the modern facilities.

Avalon City Islamabad

Avalon City is a residential project of Avalon Group of Companies. It is located on Main ISB-Peshawar Highway, near New Islamabad International Airport. The society offers 5 Marla, 10 Marla, 1 Kanal, and 2 Kanal residential plots. All the necessary amenities and facilities are available within the society. The community has an excellent design of roads which are maintained by ATCM (Avalon Town Company Management).

Bahria Town Islamabad

Bahria Town is a world-renowned housing society that offers top-notch amenities and facilities to its residents. The society is located in the heart of Islamabad and offers a wide range of residential and commercial properties. Bahria Town is known for its world-class infrastructure and facilities, which include a world-class shopping mall, 5-star hotel, state-of-the-art hospital, and much more.

Blue World City Islamabad

Blue World City is a world-class real estate development project near the Chakri interchange on the Islamabad-Lahore Motorway M-2. The project covers an area of over 20,000 acres and is being developed by Blue Group of Companies. The project will have all the amenities and facilities of a modern city including a five-star hotel, an international standard golf course, a state-of-the-art hospital, and a shopping mall.

Capital Smart City Islamabad

Capital Smart City Islamabad is a world-class real estate development project, which is a joint venture of Habib Rafiq (Pvt.) Ltd. and China Railway Engineering Corporation. The project is spread over an area of about 5,000 acres. It is located on the M-2 Motorway, near Thalian Interchange.

The development work on Capital Smart City Islamabad has started and the construction work on various infrastructure projects is in full swing.

Kingdom Valley Islamabad

Kingdom Valley is a luxurious and spacious residential project located in Islamabad. It offers a peaceful and serene environment away from the hustle and bustle of the city. Some of these include a world-class gymnasium, swimming pool, spa, and sauna.

Nova City Islamabad

Nova City Islamabad is a world-class housing society that offers its residents a luxurious lifestyle. Society equipped with all the modern amenities and facilities that one could desire. Nova City Islamabad is located in a prime location, making it easily accessible from all parts of the city. The society offers a variety of plot sizes to choose from, making it an ideal option for everyone. If you’re looking for a luxurious and comfortable place to call home, Nova City Islamabad is the perfect choice for you!

Park Town Islamabad

Park Town is a world-class housing society that offers residents a luxurious lifestyle. The society is located in the heart of Islamabad and offers a variety of amenities, including a swimming pool, gym, and tennis court. Park Town is the perfect place to call home for those who want to live in style.

Discovery Garden Islamabad

Discovery Garden Islamabad is a world-class housing society that offers luxurious and comfortable living at an affordable price. The society beautifully designed and well-planned, with all the amenities and facilities you could need. If you’re looking for a top-notch housing society in Islamabad, Discovery Garden should be at the top of your list!

Rudn Enclave Islamabad

Rudn Enclave is a world-class and one of the most luxurious gated communities in Pakistan. It settled GT Road near New Islamabad International Airport. Rudn Enclave offers a secure and peaceful environment with state-of-the-art infrastructure. The society offers a variety of amenities to its residents including a gym, swimming pool, sauna, and steam room.

blogs.title: Top 5 Reasons to Invest in Islamabad Real Estate
blogs.excerpt: Before investing in the property market , read these Top 5 Reasons to Invest in Islamabad Real Estate. It will save your time and energy.
blogs.content:
Top 5 Reasons to Invest in Islamabad Real Estate

Real estate has long been one of the most reliable ways to create wealth. When it comes to making a smart investment, Islamabad stands out as a top place. As the capital of Pakistan, this city is not only admired for its scenic beauty and clean environment but also praised for its well-planned infrastructure and growing economic potential. Whether you are a seasoned investor or just starting, Islamabad offers compelling reasons to take a closer look. In this post, we will dive into the Top 5 Reasons to Invest in Islamabad Real Estate. Read the blog for details.

1. Quick Returns on Your Investment

Islamabad’s property market has proven time and again to be a goldmine for investors seeking fast ROI. Thanks to the city’s growing economy, prime location, and increasing demand for both residential and commercial spaces, property values often rise quickly.

Whether you’re buying for rental income or planning to sell for profit, Islamabad offers excellent potential for short-term and long-term gains.

2. Reliable Monthly Income

With a thriving rental market fueled by professionals, expatriates, and students, investing in Islamabad real estate can generate a dependable monthly income. High occupancy rates mean your property is likely to stay rented, giving you consistent cash flow, ideal for investors seeking financial stability.

3. Real Value in a Physical Asset

When you invest in real estate, you’re putting your money into something solid, literally. Property in Islamabad isn’t just a number on a screen; it’s a real, tangible asset that holds and often increases in value over time. Unlike stocks and other volatile investments, real estate provides peace of mind and long-term security.

4. Long-Term Appreciation

One of the most rewarding aspects of investing in Islamabad is the steady rise in property values. The city’s expanding infrastructure, limited land availability, and growing population ensure continuous demand. Over time, your property is likely to appreciate significantly, increasing both its market value and your net wealth.

5. Greater Control Over Your Investment

Unlike other investment options where external factors dictate your returns, real estate gives you control. You choose the property, its location, and how it’s managed. This hands-on approach allows you to reduce risk and shape your investment according to your goals and comfort level.

Conclusion

Whether you are new to property investment or have years of experience, Islamabad’s real estate market offers a wealth of opportunity. From fast-growing returns and steady rental income to the security of owning a tangible asset, the city delivers on every front.

With consistent property appreciation and greater control over your investment decisions after reading these Top 5 Reasons to Invest in Islamabad Real Estate, Islamabad stands out as a stable and rewarding market. Now is the perfect time to tap into this dynamic real estate scene and build a future of financial strength and stability.

blogs.title: Top City 1 vs Faisal Town Phase 2 | Comparison & Location

blogs.content:
Top City 1 vs Faisal Town Phase 2: Which is Better For Investment?

If you talk about real estate investments in Islamabad, two prominent options come to mind. But it becomes difficult to decide Top City 1 vs Faisal Town Phase 2. I will make this decision easy by explaining their important points such as location, payment plans, development status, and other details. Read the blog to know a complete analysis.

Comparison Between Top City 1 and Faisal Town Phase 2

Both societies are among the top options for investment in Islamabad. However, I have described a detailed comparison between the two:

Location Overview of Top City 1 and Faisal Town Phase 2

Top City 1

The Top City 1 (Annex) is on the Sinagar Highway and is 3 Km from New Islamabad International Airport. It has direct access from the M-1 (Islamabad-Peshawar) and M-2 (Lahore-Islamabad) Motorway routes and Fateh Jang Road.

Faisal Town Phase 2

The Faisal Town Phase 2 is on the Thalian interchange on the M-2 (Lahore-Islamabad) Motorway. You can access the M-1 Motorway and Srinagar Highway in 10 minutes. The society also has two more entry points: the CDA sector i16 and Chakri Road. Faisal Town Phase 2 is surrounded by the Capital Smart City, Multi-Garden B-17, Qurtba City, and Al-Haram City. The location of Faisal Town Phase 2 is 10 minutes away from Top City-1.

What is Best for Immediate Residence?

The Top City 1 is the best option for immediate residence because it already has a settled population. However, due to its lack of a settled population, you need to wait for 2-3 years to start living in the Faisal Town Phase 2.

Development Status

The Faisal Town Phase 2 is under development, and the street browning work has been completed. On the other hand, the development work in Top City 1 will start when you pay in installments. So, both projects will take time to complete the development work.

Population Density

The Top City 1 is 10 years old project. So, it has a considerable population with residential and commercial construction.

The Faisal Town Phase 2 is a new project. Therefore, it will take time to have a significant population density.

About the Developer

Top City -1

The Top City -1 is a project of Kunwar Moeez Khan Constructions (KMKC). Mr.Kunwar Moeez Khan is the owner and CEO of this company. They do not have any other projects in the real estate market of Pakistan except the Top City-1.

The Faisal Town Phase 2 is a project of Zedem International, and Chaudhary Abdul Majeed is its owner. They have developed and delivered several successful residential and commercial projects in the country. Some of their prominent projects are:

Price Comparison of 05 Marla Residential Plot

Both societies have different rates and payment plans for a 05 Marla residential plot. I have described here a detailed payment plan for both societies.

Top City -1 (Annex) Islamabad

You can book a 5-Marla residential plot in Top City-1 (Annex) in the 3-year affordable payment plan. You need to pay 36 Monthly Installments and a 25 % down payment.

You can book a 05 Marla residential plot in Faisal Town Phase 2 in a 4-year installment plan. You need to pay only 18 quarterly installments and one final installment.

ROI Potential in the Future

Both societies have considerable brand value in the market. In the long term, you can get better returns from a property purchased at low rates. Therefore, Faisal Town Phase 2 is the best option. Its 05 Marla residential plot is 300,000/—rupees less costly than the Top City1, so it can give a better return on investment (ROI).

Which One Should You Choose: Top City 1 vs Faisal Town Phase 2

Both societies have good locations and infrastructural development. However, if you want to buy a reasonable plot on a 2-3 years installment plan with a low budget, go for Faisal Town Phase 2. If you have a handsome budget and want an early possession, invest in Top City 1.

Conclusion

Please consult a credible real estate consultant before investing in these societies. For this purpose, you can share your investment budget and goals with Property Naama Group. We will design a real estate investment portfolio according to your requirements and circumstances.

blogs.title: Types of Taxes Imposed on Real Estate Property in Pakistan
blogs.excerpt: Types of Taxes Imposed on Real Estate Property in Pakistan.Most of the people are not aware of the different taxes imposed on Real estate.
blogs.content:
Types of Taxes Imposed on Real Estate Property in Pakistan

WHAT IS A PROPERTY TAX?

A property tax is a levy imposed by the government on real estate. The tax is based on the value of the property, and the amount varies from country to country. In Pakistan, the property tax imposed on both residential and commercial properties.

DIFFERENT TYPES OF PROPERTY TAXES IN PAKISTAN

There are four main types of taxes imposed on real estate property in Pakistan:

1. Capital Gains Tax (CGT)

The Capital Gains Tax (CGT) on property in Pakistan 2021-2022 a federal tax that must paid by the seller. Capital gains tax imposed when the seller makes profits on the sale of a capital asset, so the profit (capital gain) taxed. In accordance with the Finance Act 2017, the capital gains tax will only imposed if the property sold within three years of purchase. According to FBR’s valuation table, these gains will taxed at 10% during the first year, 7.5% during the second year, and 5% during the third year. Property held for more than three years will not be subject to CGT.

2. Capital Value Tax (CVT) & Stamp Duty

3. Withholding Tax (WHT) paid by both buyers and sellers

blogs.title: UAE Property Tax Guide 2025
blogs.excerpt: Discover the complete UAE Property Tax Guide 2025. Learn about the latest tax rates, laws, exemptions, and benefits for property owners.
blogs.content:
UAE Property Tax Guide 2025: Everything About Rates, Laws, and Benefits

Property taxes are considered one of the costs in property investments worldwide. In most countries, property taxes are a significant portion of property profits. But this is not the case in the UAE. In this UAE Property Tax Guide 2025, I will discuss how property taxes and fees work in the UAE, the tax benefits, and mandatory fees and regulations. Explore the details in the blog.

Mandatory Property Fees in the UAE

Although the UAE does not impose a property tax on property buyers, sellers, and investors, it will include some fees and service charges that are part of the tax system. This tax system has the following fees and regulatory charges:

1. Property Transfer Fee

You will have to pay a property transfer fee of 4% of the total property value.

2. Housing Fee

The property owners and tenants will pay a 5% fee on the total rental yield.

3. Security Deposit for Rental Properties

You will have to pay a security deposit of 5% of the annual rent for unfurnished properties and 10% for furnished properties.

4. Home Insurance Fee

The UAE real estate market also charges a home insurance fee that varies depending on the property size, area, and type.

5. Property Maintenance Fees

All property owners in the UAE will pay a monthly or annual property maintenance fee to clear the routine maintenance operations bills.

Some of these fees are familiar to everyone, and others are not known to every property owner. Therefore, a basic knowledge of these fees and taxes can help you make a good property investment decision.

UAE Tax System Benefits

The UAE real estate market is a tax haven for investors. You will get the following tax benefits as the investor:

Overall Low Property Cost

Since there are no property taxes in the UAE, it significantly reduces the property costs compared to other countries.

Lower Transaction Costs

The property transaction costs are considerably lower in the UAE, which notably reduces the initial cost of property investment.

No rental or Property Gain Taxes

The UAE government does not charge any tax on rental income or capital gain. It is another source of extra profit for the property investors.

After knowing these tax benefits of the UAE property market, you will be able to make profitable property deals and investment goals.

UAE Property Ownership Rates and Fees

As a Property owner, you will pay some mandatory fees and taxes. I have listed them here in the table:

Conclusion

UAE property taxes are comparatively low compared to the rest of the world. However, a complete understanding of the UAE Property Tax Guide 2025 is essential for good property investment decisions.

blogs.title: UK and UAE Real Estate
blogs.excerpt: In this blog, you will read a comparison between UK and UAE real estate investment to help you make a better wealth creation decision.
blogs.content:
Comparison Between UK and UAE Real Estate Investment

A big Pakistani community in the UK and UAE wants to invest in real estate. In this blog, you will read a comparison between UK and UAE real estate investment to give a better wealth creation decision. You will read about overall real estate market comparison, property tax, security, ease of business in two countries, and relevant information. Read the blog.

Points of Comparison Between UK and UAE Property Investment

Here are the comparison points between UK and UAE real estate investment:

Real Estate Market

The UK real estate market is renowned for its stability and transparency, making it one of the most secure places to invest. Famous cities like London, Manchester, and Birmingham offer strong demand for residential and commercial properties.

London, in particular, is a global financial hub, ensuring steady interest in property investment. While property prices are high in London, regional cities like Manchester and Birmingham offer more affordable entry points with rising rental demand.

On the other hand, the UAE, particularly Dubai and Abu Dhabi, presents a fast-growing and attractive property market. Rapid development, luxury offerings, and favorable foreign investment policies in Dubai have made it a hotspot for real estate investors.

The tax-free rental income, high rental yields, and government initiatives to attract foreign investment, such as the Golden Visa program, are the plus points of Dubai.

Rental Yields

Rental yields in the UK vary depending on location. London offers relatively lower yields, around 3-4%, due to its high property prices, while cities like Manchester and Birmingham provide higher yields in the 5-7% range.

In contrast, the UAE, especially Dubai, offers much higher rental yields, often between 6-10%, especially in popular areas like Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, and Palm Jumeirah. The tax-free rental income in the UAE further boosts returns for investors.

Taxation on Property

The UK imposes several taxes on real estate investors, which can eat into profits. Stamp Duty Land Tax (SDLT) is one of the significant upfront costs, with rates depending on the property value and whether the investor is a UK resident or a foreign buyer.

Additionally, investors face Capital Gains Tax (CGT) when selling properties at a profit, and ongoing property taxes like council tax can further impact profitability.

In contrast, the UAE offers a tax-free environment for real estate investors. There is no income tax on rental yields and no Capital Gains Tax on property sales, making it highly attractive for investors looking to maximize their returns.

Safety and Security

UAE has the world’s most secure and efficient security system. Therefore, it has a 14.6 Crime Index number, according to research findings.

On the other hand, the UK has a 46.9 Crime Index Number. It shows the country has a less secure environment and a high crime rate.

Infrastructural Development

UAE has a modern and quality infrastructure such as tall buildings such as Burj Khalifa, 23 Marina Tower, Marina 101, a world-class road network, downtown commercial, and other facilities.

If we talk about the UK, it lacks such kind of infrastructural development, means of communication, and facilities.

Conclusion

Both countries offer attractive real estate investment opportunities. The investment choice depends on your future goals, budget, and risk tolerance ability. You can contact Property Naama Group for consultancy and information about the real estate market of both countries.

blogs.content:
Umar Heights Construction Update – Preparation for 7th Slab shuttering in Bahria Town Rawalpindi

In the ongoing pursuit of bringing Bahria Town to its residents and investors, we’re excited to announce that Umar Heights has moved on to its next phase – slab shuttering – which will allow us to begin construction on the seventh floor of your apartment or townhouse. We’ve put together this handy construction update to bring you up to speed on the latest developments at Umar Heights and answer any questions you may have about your upcoming home in Bahria Town. Read on to learn more!

What Happened?

Umar heights construction is currently underway in Bahria Town Rawalpindi. The construction team has been working hard to prepare for the seventh slab shuttering, which is scheduled to take place soon. So far, everything is going according to plan and the construction team is confident that they will be able to meet the deadline.

What is the status now?

Work on Umar Heights is progressing as planned and the construction team is now preparing for the seventh slab shuttering. The excavation work for the foundation has completed and the reinforcement work is currently underway. The construction of the columns and beams is also progressing well.

Umar Heights Construction Update

The next step is to start preparations for the 7th slab shuttering. This process will involve getting the necessary materials and equipment ready. As well as making sure that the area is clear and safe for work to begin. Once everything is in place, the actual shuttering process will begin. This is an exciting time for the project, and we can’t wait to see it progress!

Construction Updates

Work on Umar Heights is progressing well and according to schedule. The first six slab of shuttering has completed and work now underway on the seventh slab. In order to ensure that construction remains at this steady pace. We are doing all we can to make sure all materials are delivered on time and projects don’t stall for lack of supplies.

Conclusion

The construction of Umar Heights is progressing well and according to the latest update, the preparation for 7th slab shuttering has begun in Bahria Town Rawalpindi. This is a major milestone in the construction process and it is good to see that things are moving along smoothly. Once the 7th slab is in place, work on the exterior of the building will begin. We can expect to see some progress on that front in the coming weeks.

blogs.title: Urban Multi-Story Building Pros and Cons
blogs.excerpt: This blog post embarks on a journey to dissect the Urban Multi-Story Building Pros and Cons in detail. Read till the last line.
blogs.content:
Urban Multi-Story Building Pros and Cons

This blog post embarks on a journey to dissect the Urban Multi-Story Building Pros and Cons in detail. Read this blog, till the last line if you are an aspiring investor of urban development.

In the dynamic landscape of urbanization, cities are expanding at an unprecedented rate. The challenges and opportunities presented by multi-story buildings in urban settings come to the forefront of city planning discussions.

Amid the inexorable growth of urban areas, understanding the intricate balance between the advantages and disadvantages of multi-story structures becomes pivotal. This exploratory piece of writing seeks to unravel the complexities surrounding vertical urban architecture.

Understanding Urban Multi-Story Building Pros and Cons

As populations swell, the demand for efficient use of limited space becomes more pronounced. Multi-story buildings, with their vertical orientation, present a compelling solution to the challenges associated with burgeoning urban density. The symbiotic relationship between urban density and vertical construction seeks to illuminate the trans-formative potential of multi-story buildings.

In the landscape of city planning the vertical dimension becomes a key player in the quest for vibrant urban living.

Pros of Urban Multi-Story Building

Economically, multi-story buildings stand as beacons of efficiency, capitalizing on limited urban space and bolstering local economies. The economic advantages extend to their cost-effectiveness in land utilization and the subsequent increase in property tax revenue. Embracing environmental sustainability, these structures reduce carbon footprints through innovative energy-efficient practices.

Socially, multi-story buildings foster vibrant communities by enhancing walk-ability and encouraging social interaction.

Cons of Urban Multi-Story Building

Yet, amidst the promising landscape, multi-story buildings in urban settings pose their share of challenges. Environmental concerns arise, questioning their impact on local ecosystems and the resource-intensive nature of their construction. Socially, strains on infrastructure and services may emerge, accompanied by potential issues of gentrification and displacement.

The intricacies of urban planning come to the forefront, demanding a delicate balance between the advantages and drawbacks of vertical construction.

You can read more on this topic

The Future of Urban Development

Exploring emerging trends in design, construction, and technology integration, it anticipates the evolution of city spaces. With a growing emphasis on resilience and adaptability, this section speculates on how cities might harness innovation to overcome challenges. The incorporation of cutting-edge technologies and sustainable practices is likely to shape the urban environment.

Smart Cities

Cities are increasingly utilizing data to improve efficiency and enhance urban living. Smart technologies, including the Internet of Things (IoT), are being deployed for traffic management, waste reduction, and energy conservation.

Singapore is a contemporary example of a smart city employing sensors and data analytic for various urban functions.

Sustainable Development

Urban areas are focusing on integrating green spaces, renewable energy sources, and sustainable transportation to combat environmental challenges.

Copenhagen is known for its commitment to sustainability, with an emphasis on recycling infrastructure, renewable energy, and green urban planning.

Mixed-Use Development

Future urban areas are likely to blend residential, commercial, and recreational spaces to create vibrant, mixed-use environments. It will reduce the need for extensive commuting.

The High Line in New York City transformed an old railway into a linear park. It is contributing to the revitalization of the surrounding areas.

Urban Density

As Urban populations grow, there is a trend toward building upwards to optimize land use. Vertical cities, with mixed-use skyscrapers, are becoming more common.

The Burj Khalifa in Dubai is an iconic example of a vertical city, housing residential, commercial ,and recreational spaces in a single structure.

Concluding Remarks for Urban Multi-Story Building Pros and Cons

It’s important to note that the future of urban development is dynamic and influenced by technological advancements. Moreover, the policy decisions, and societal changes are also important. Local contexts and priorities will play a significant role in shaping the trajectory of urban development in different regions.

blogs.title: What is the Best Time to Buy or Sell a Property?
blogs.excerpt: When dealing in the real estate market, what is the best time to buy or sell a property? It is a most crucial question.
blogs.content:
What is the Best Time to Buy or Sell a Property?

When dealing in the real estate market, what is the best time to buy or sell a property? It is a most crucial question. Whether you are looking to purchase a home or sell a piece of real estate, understanding market trends, economic factors, and seasonal influences is key. Therefore, I will explain the factors to consider while buying or selling a property. Let’s read the blog.

Understanding the Real Estate Market

Understanding the real estate market is crucial before buying or selling a property, as it directly influences decision-making and the potential for profit or loss. Many factors will impact the market, such as supply and demand, interest rates, economic conditions, and regional trends.

For buyers: Understanding the market can help to negotiate better deals or avoid overpriced properties.

For Sellers: The benefit from knowing the optimal time to list their property to maximize returns.

What is the Best Time to Buy a Property?

Buying property is one of the most significant financial decisions an individual can make. Timing can play a crucial role in maximizing your investment. Here’s a detailed analysis of the best times to enter the real estate market.

Understanding Market Cycles

Real estate markets follow cyclical patterns, often characterized by four phases: recovery, expansion, contraction, and recession.

Recovery Phase

This phase usually follows a recession marked by increasing home sales and rising prices. Buying during this phase can lead to substantial long-term gains.

Expansion Phase

Prices and demand peak in this phase. While buying here can lead to immediate equity, it’s often riskier due to higher prices.

Contraction Phase

Here, prices stabilize or drop, creating a buyer’s market. It is often the best time to buy, as sellers may be more willing to negotiate.

Recession Phase

A downturn can lead to lower prices, but it’s essential to consider economic stability and job security before purchasing.

Interest Rates

Interest rates have a direct impact on your mortgage payments and overall affordability. Lower rates mean lower monthly payments, making it an ideal investment time. Keep an eye on:

Economic Indicators

Central banks often adjust rates based on inflation and economic growth.

Timing the Market

Wait to get the best interest rate and overall property prices.

Personal Financial Readiness

Timing also hinges on your financial situation. Consider the following:

Down Payment

Save for a substantial down payment to reduce your mortgage burden and avoid private mortgage insurance (PMI).

Stability

Ensure you have a stable job and financial buffer. Buying property is a long-term commitment, and you should prepare for unexpected expenses.

Long-Term Goals

Before making a purchase, reflect on your long-term goals.

Duration of Stay

If you plan to hold the home for several years, short-term market fluctuations will have less impact on your investment.

Investment vs. Personal Use

Are you buying for personal use or as an investment? This distinction can affect your timing and choice of property.

What is the Best Time to Sell a Property?

Selling a property is a significant decision that can greatly impact your financial future.

While various factors play into when to sell, understanding market dynamics, seasonal trends, and personal circumstances can guide you toward the most favorable timing.

Real estate markets experience cyclical patterns influenced by economic conditions, interest rates, and local demand.

Generally, the market has two main phases: a market for sellers, where demand exceeds supply, and a market for buyers, characterized by an oversupply of homes.

The Market for Sellers: In a seller market, properties often sell quickly and for higher prices. The indicators are rising home prices, low inventory, and increased buyer activity.

The Market for Buyer: Conversely, a buyer market presents more competition, leading to lower prices and longer selling times.

Economic Indicators: Paying attention to economic indicators can also inform your decision. Key factors include:

Interest Rates: Lower interest rates can increase buyer demand, as more people can afford mortgages. Conversely, rising rates may dampen enthusiasm.

Job Growth: Areas with strong job growth often see increased demand for housing, making it a good time to sell.

Personal Considerations

Ultimately, your circumstances also play a role in your decision to sell. Considerations might include:

Financial Goals: Assess your financial situation and plans. If you need to relocate for work or want to downsize, it might be the right time.

Property Condition: If your home is in excellent condition and has curb appeal, you will sell quickly and at a desirable price.

Conclusion

In conclusion, timing is a crucial factor in buying or selling property, but it’s not the only one. While understanding market cycles, interest rates, and seasonal trends can help you make smarter decisions, it’s equally important to consider your financial situation, long-term goals, and the local real estate landscape.

blogs.title: What is the concept of Top in Real Estate Market ?
blogs.excerpt: In this blog, we are going to unleash such question “ What is the concept of Top in the Real Estate Market ? “ in detail.
blogs.content:
What is the concept of Top in Real Estate Market ?

The dynamic realm of real estate, innovative approaches constantly emerge, reshaping traditional paradigms and opening doors to new possibilities. In this blog, we are going to unleash such question “ What is the concept of Top in the Real Estate Market ? “ in detail.

Read this blog till the last line to get a complete idea of this approach of real estate marketing.

Detail of What is the concept of Top in Real Estate Market ?

“ The core concept of top in the real estate market revolves around acting as an intermediary between property buyers and sellers without actually owning the properties yourself .”

This business model manifests , a retailer sells products to customers without keeping those products in stock. Instead, when a purchase is made, the retailer purchases the item from a third party and has it shipped directly to the customer.

In this business model, you act as a middleman between property sellers and buyers. You list properties for sale without owning them yourself. Your primary focus is on marketing and selling properties. You use various channels to attract potential buyers and facilitate transactions. Operational aspects such as property management and legal documentation are typically handled by property sellers or other third parties. You don’t have to be involved in these day-to-day activities.

Advantages for what is the concept of top in real estate market ?

Following are some potential advantages of the concept of top in real estate.

Low Capital Investment

The concept of top in real estate typically requires minimal upfront investment since you don’t need to purchase property beforehand. This could mean you don’t need to tie up capital in purchasing properties outright.

Lesser risk for what is the concept of top in real estate market ?

Since you’re not buying properties before selling them, therefore, the risk of market fluctuations or holding is not hampering you. This can be particularly advantageous in volatile real estate markets.

Potential chances of growth

These kinds of property marketing models are often highly scale-able because you don’t have the limitations of physical inventory. In real estate, this could mean you can scale your business without the constraints of buying or managing multiple properties.

Stretch-ability

Real estate drop shipping may offer flexibility in terms of the types of properties you can offer. You can potentially work with various sellers and offer a diverse range of properties without limitations of geographic area or property type.

Disadvantages for what is the concept of top in real estate market ?

Following are some potential disadvantages of the concept of top in real estate.

Restricted authority over property

The concept of top in real estate often involves selling properties without directly owning or inspecting them. It results in potential issues with property quality.

Lack of control over property conditions results in customer dissatisfaction and potential damage to the reputation of agents or investors.

Increased dependence on the third-party

The concept of top in real estate carries dependency on sellers, investors, and middle-man to streamline transactions. Dependence on outside parties enhances the possibility of procrastination, misunderstanding, and conflicts of interest.

Longer transaction deadlines

Transactions in real estate usually involve lengthy securing times compared to ordinary transactions. Difficulties involving the coordination of varied parties and executing the due diligence distantly can extend the process.

Low-profit margins for what is the concept of top in real estate market ?

The Concept of top in real estate can result in lower profit margins for agents or investors due to commissions, fees, and increased competition. Higher transaction costs and lower control over pricing may limit profitability.

blogs.title: Cost of a Fiber Cottage in Pakistan
blogs.excerpt: Are you curious what is the cost of a fiber cottage in Pakistan? Let's read the complete price breakdown in this blog.
blogs.content:
What is the Cost of a Fiber Cottage in Pakistan?

Are you curious what is the cost of a fiber cottage in Pakistan? Fiber cottages are becoming an increasingly popular housing option in Pakistan due to their affordability, durability, and eco-friendly construction. I will explain a detailed price breakdown of the cottage in the blog. Let’s go through the blog.

What is a Fiber Cottage?

A Fiber cottage is a small house or dwelling made primarily of Fiber. These structures are typically associated with rural and countryside settings to blend with the natural environment.

Cottages are known for their rustic charm and simplicity, making them ideal for vacation homes, retreats, or residences in nature-rich areas like forests, mountains, or lakes. They can range from modest, one-room cabins to larger homes with multiple rooms and modern amenities.

These cottages are famous for their aesthetic appeal and the warmth and natural beauty of wood as a building material.

A Detailed Cost Breakdown Estimation for Fiber Cottages in Pakistan

Fiber cottages, also known as prefabricated or modular cottages, are becoming popular in Pakistan due to their affordability, quick construction times, and eco-friendly nature.

These structures are typically made from fiber-reinforced panels, steel frames, and other lightweight materials, offering a durable and modern alternative to traditional brick-and-mortar homes.

Here’s a detailed breakdown of the cost estimates for fiber cottages in Pakistan, considering various factors like size, design, and materials used:

1. Basic Shell Structure

Cost per square foot: PKR 2,000 – 3,000

Features: Includes the basic walls, roof, and structural support. This price covers the use of fiber-reinforced panels for walls and steel framing.

Example: A 500 sq. ft. cottage would cost around PKR 1,000,000 to PKR 1,500,000.

2. Interior Finishing

Cost per square foot: PKR 1,000 – 2,500

Flooring (tiles, wooden, or vinyl)

Ceiling (POP or gypsum boards)

Interior wall finishing (paint, wood paneling, or wallpaper)

Example: For a 500 sq. ft. cottage, interior finishing would range from PKR 500,000 to PKR 1,250,000.

3. Electrical and Plumbing Systems

Estimated cost: PKR 150,000 – 300,000 (for a small to medium-sized cottage)

Electrical wiring, switches, outlets, and basic lighting

Plumbing for bathrooms and kitchen (pipes, fittings, and basic fixtures)

4. Doors and Windows

Windows: PKR 10,000 – 20,000 (depending on size and material)

Doors: PKR 15,000 – 30,000 (for high-quality wood or fiber doors)

A small cottage with 04 windows and 02 doors could cost PKR 100,000 – 160,000 for doors and windows.

5. Roofing

Cost per square foot: PKR 1,200 – 2,500 (for fiber roofing materials)

Water-resistant fiber or metal roofing materials, insulation, and installation.

A 500 sq. ft. cottage would require a roofing budget of PKR 600,000 – 1,250,000.

6. Bathroom and Kitchen Fixtures

Estimated cost: PKR 100,000 – 250,000

Basic sanitary ware for the bathroom (toilet, sink, shower)

Basic kitchen setup (sink, basic cabinets, countertop)

7. Furniture and Appliances (Optional)

Estimated cost: PKR 200,000 – 400,000 (for basic furnishing and appliances)

Basic furniture (beds, chairs, tables), kitchen appliances, and other essential items.

8. Foundation and Site Preparation

Cost: PKR 300,000 – 600,000 (depending on the site’s condition and the foundation type required)

It includes leveling the land and laying a concrete slab or pile foundation.

9. Transportation and Installation Costs

Cost: PKR 100,000 – 300,000 (depending on location)

Transportation of prefabricated materials to the site and assembly costs.

10. Miscellaneous Costs

Estimated cost: PKR 100,000 – 200,000

Permits, taxes, and unforeseen expenses.

Total Estimated Costs for a Fiber Cottage in Pakistan:

Factors Affecting Costs:

Note: This cost breakdown is an estimation that can vary depending on the increasing material cost and overall inflation in the country. Therefore, Property Naama Group does not commit to the actual price for the cottage fiber.

Conclusion

In conclusion, the cost of a fiber cottage in Pakistan varies depending on location, size, design, and additional features.

While these eco-friendly and durable structures offer a more affordable and sustainable alternative to traditional housing, it’s mandatory to carefully assess your needs, budget, and long-term goals before investing. You can contact Property Naama Group for the construction of your fiber cottage.

Benefits of Investing in Ajman Real Estate

Let’s discuss what benefits and opportunities you will get after investing in the Ajman property market:

1. High-Value Location

Ajman is in a strategic location in the UAE’s economic ecosystem. It is in proximity to the business-friendly cities such as Dubai, Sharjah, and the Arabian Gulf coast.

Ajman has very smooth and comfortable commuting access to these destinations through various transportation networks.

2. Business-Friendly Policies and Regulations

The city government of Ajman has implemented business and investment-friendly policies and regulations. Some of these policies are creating a favourable environment for business growth and development. These famous policies are:

Freehold ownership for expatriates in a designated area

3. Variety of Property Investment Options

The real estate landscape of Ajman offers multiple options for property investment. You can invest in luxury apartments (Umar Tower, Ajman, UAE), individual villas, and commercial spaces. These investment options cater to the property needs of local and global investors.

4. World-Class Transport and Infrastructure

The quality of roads and infrastructure defines the standard of living of a city. The city of Ajman qualifies for a top ranking in this criterion. Its major routes, like Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road and Emirates Road, pass through the emirate. These roads ensure smooth and easy connectivity to Dubai, Sharjah, and other cities in the UAE.

5. Affordability

One of the biggest attractions of Ajman’s property market is its affordability. When compared with neighbouring emirates such as Dubai and Abu Dhabi, Ajman stands out for offering significantly lower real estate prices.

It is an ideal destination for first-time buyers, middle-income families, and investors to enter the UAE property market without stretching their budgets.

Why to invest in Pakistani real estate before the election 2024?

In this awareness blog, we are going to answer this question in detail Why invest in Pakistani real estate before the election of 2024?

For the last couple of years, our beloved homeland has been facing political, economic, and security instability. Amid this unusual situation, the caretaker government has announced the date of general elections 2024 across the country.

There is a million-dollar question popping up in the minds of the masses since the day of the election 2024 announcement. So, the question is; whether we should invest in real estate before the election of 2024 or not. Read this blog till the last line to get all your answers at once.

Here are following reasons to invest in real estate market of Pakistan before election 2024.

Probability of high returns

Unfortunately, the political, economic, and security instability results in prevailing recession-like conditions for almost every industry in a country. During these times, the real estate sector is no exception. Unfortunately, Pakistan is also facing a similar state of affairs nowadays.

But the silver lining is that the current low prices of real estate can give a high return on investment (ROI) in the near future. Most likely, after the election the situation will be stable and these rates of properties will be boosted with high benefits.

Diversified Portfolio; An answer to the question why invest in Pakistani real estate before the election 2024?

Since we have discussed the instability of the situation earlier; this instability demands wide-ranging investment options. This wise investment move will divide the potential risk across different spheres which will ultimately reduce the chances of expected losses.

Favorable Government Policies after Elections

The last elected government introduced an amenity scheme at the rate of 5% tax to bring investment into the country. Surprisingly, the forthcoming impact of this investment resulted in the overall stability of the real estate market of the country.

There is high chance that after the elections in 2024, the upcoming government may introduce such an amnesty scheme. Ultimately, the real estate market of the land of pure will boost again. Therefore this is the right time to invest in the real estate market of the country to get high profits after elections.

High Benefits of low rated properties

Excitingly, the current unstable situation in the country has resulted in a significant reduction in property rates. Wise investors will benefit from the downturn of the market to get better returns later on. For instance, a 5 Marla Plot in Bahria Town Rawalpindi currently costs around PKR 80,000 /- on average which was PKR 100000000/- before the recession.

So, when the market will get stable the owner will get a profit of PKR 20, 00,000 /- right away. This is how undervalued properties pay off in the long run.

Property Rates linked with Infrastructure development

In developing countries like Pakistan, the political parties run their election campaigns with high promises of infrastructure development. Ultimately, the drive for infrastructure development results in an overall boost in the real estate market of the country. Henceforth, resultant high rates of real estate products prove beneficial for wise investors.

The potential of foreign investment

Under the thumb rule; High risks reward high profits. To keep this rule in mind foreign investors will invest in the market. This foreign investment will boost the overall real estate market of the country.

Opportunity for a stable rental income

Even in the current unstable market situation rental properties are rewarding high cash flows on a monthly and yearly basis. Therefore investing in the real estate market before election 2024 in Pakistan can provide you another stable source of income.

Market flexibility; An answer to the question why invest in Pakistani real estate before the election 2024?

As every industry has its unique strengths and weaknesses and the real estate market is no exception. Likewise, the real estate market has a proven flexibility in its nature. This flexible nature will help the industry to survive this downturn in a good way. Therefore, investing in the real estate market in this unstable situation is not a bad option at all.

A hedge against inflation

The unstable economic situation of the country comes up with a flood of inflation. Hence, the resilient real estate market can prove to be a stone wall against ever-increasing inflation. Therefore, investing in the real estate market of Pakistan before the general elections of 2024 will be a wise choice.

To cut a long story short, investing in a country with political, economic, and security instabilities is not free of risks. But as per the old saying; greater risks reward greater profits, investing now can benefit whooping profits later on.

Investment in the real estate sector of the country before election 2024 can simultaneously be a risky and rewarding choice. Do invest but after consulting an established real estate consultant.

blogs.title: Why is it easy to buy property but hard to sell it?
blogs.excerpt: Why is it easy to buy property but hard to sell it? This perception is often driven by various factors in the real estate market.
blogs.content:
Why is it easy to buy property but hard to sell it?

Why is it easy to buy property but hard to sell it? This perception is often driven by various factors in the real estate market. While this opinion may not apply universally to all markets, there are some usual reasons why people might feel this way:

High transaction costs

Buying property typically involves significant upfront costs, such as down payments, developmental charges, closing costs, and fees for inspections and assessments. Selling a property can also demand expenses, including real estate agent commissions, resources for site visits, marketing persons for cold calling, and other closing costs. These costs can discourage some potential sellers or make it challenging to break even when selling in a short period.

Market conditions

The real estate market can fluctuate between being a seller’s market and a buyer’s market. In a seller’s market, demand for properties is high, and there is a shortage of available homes, making it easier to sell at a higher price. , in a buyer’s market, there is an oversupply of properties, and demand is low, making it more difficult to find buyers and potentially entail price reductions to attract them.

Timing of the deal

Buyers may have the flexibility to take their time and find the right property, whereas sellers often have deadlines or urgent reasons for selling, such as relocation, financial emergency, or changes in personal state of affairs. This urgency can put sellers at lower ebb during negotiations.

Inventory management

From time to time, buyers may have an oversupply of available properties than sellers have approach to potential buyers. This can create a situation where buyers have more options, making it easier for them to find an acceptable property and sellers have very less options to do so.

Financing challenges

While there are various mortgage options available to buyers, they may still face difficulties qualifying for loans due to credit issues, income verification, or other financial constraints. Sellers, on the other hand, are often more financially stable since they already own the property.

Property condition

Sellers may face challenges selling if their property requires significant repairs, development, and updates, reducing its demand to potential buyers. Buyers can generally choose properties based on their current conditions, and location preferences, and renovate them after purchase.

Regulatory and legal complexities

Selling property may require several legal and regulatory measures, which can be time-consuming and complex, depending on the location and other considerations. Buyers on the other hand may experience fewer difficulties and requirements in comparison.

It’s essential to note that real estate dynamics can vary significantly depending on the location, property type, economic conditions, and other factors. The perception of the ease of buying versus selling property may not apply uniformly across all real estate markets.

Seller’s expectations

Sellers may have higher expectations for the worth of their property, particularly if they have gained significant appreciation over the years or have invested in touch. An unreasonable pricing structure of property can discourage potential buyers and lengthen the selling process.

Closing costs and fees

Sellers often face significant closing costs, which can include real estate agent commissions, legal fees, and property taxes. These costs can impact the net profit they receive from the sale, making the deal less attractive for the seller.

Buying property from a non-professional realtor

When you buy property from a non-professional buyer it would be easy at the time of buying, but would be difficult to resale the property through the same realtor. It has many reasons; the non-professional realtor doesn’t have a designated sales team to resale property, they don’t have a social media portfolio, they don’t have the required resources, and they don’t have a required customer pool.

Difference in financial structures

When you buy a plot or house from a housing society, you can pay the due amount in 2 to 4 years of easy installment plans, while as a seller you can’t offer this yearly installment plan due to your financial emergency. This also makes it difficult to sell property as individual sellers.

Why is Pakistan’s Real Estate Market Improving in 2025?

The real estate market in Pakistan has been facing downward traction for the last couple of years due to political instability, an underperforming economy, and other such reasons. The year 2025 seems different for this industry. I have given a detailed answer to the question, Why is Pakistan’s real estate market improving in 2025? Read the blog completely and know the reasons.

Factors Driving Pakistan’s Real Estate Market Growth in 2025

I have shared some prominent factors that will play a key role in the Pakistani real estate market in 2025. Let’s have a read:

Reduction in Interest Rates

The State Bank of Pakistan has significantly reduced the interest rates from 22 % in 2023 to 13 % in December 2024. Hopefully, it will decrease more in 2025. This huge reduction in interest rates makes bank deposits unattractive, leading to investment in businesses and real estate. Therefore, the real estate market will improve with fresh investments.

Political Stability

Recent political developments in Pakistan show that the country seems to be heading towards political stability. So, this better political environment will help the real estate market recover in 2025.

Stability of Currency and Gold Market

The currency and gold market will remain stable for 2024 and will likely be the same in 2025. People will invest in the real estate market because it is not stable. It will fluctuate this year with positive impacts.

Changes in the International Political Scenario

After the win of Donald J. Trump (US President-Elect) in Election 2024, the international political atmosphere has changed a lot. It has impacted different industries globally. For instance, the crypto market surged after the election results. Similarly, its positive impacts will be seen in the real estate industry globally and in Pakistan. So,2025 will be the year of real estate betterment.

Increasing Demand Over Time

The demand for residential and commercial properties is increasing with time. There are two main reasons for this enhanced demand. The country’s population is increasing and people are migrating from rural to urban areas. A similar trend will occur in 2025, making it a positive year for the real estate market.

How Can You Benefit From Real Estate in 2025?

blogs.title: Most Effective Wood Coatings Ideas in Pakistan | Creativity
blogs.excerpt: A wood coating will play a vital role in the design of your home when you want to create an atmosphere that’s warm and welcoming.
blogs.content:
Most Effective Wood Coatings Ideas in Pakistan

A wood coating will play a vital role in the design of your home when you want to create an atmosphere that’s warm and welcoming. It will also add elegance to your home, as well as increase its value on the real estate market. The best part about wood coatings is that they’re available in so many different styles, it’s easy to find one that matches your personal taste and preferences.

Why Is It Important To Invest In Wood Coatings?

Wood coatings protect your investment by providing a barrier against the elements and everyday wear and tear. Not only do they prolong the life of your furniture, but they also enhance its beauty.

Benefits Of The Best Wood Finishes

Durability of the best wood coatings

Types of Wood Coating

1. The Hard and Glossy Varnish

2. Color and High Gloss with a Shellac

One of the most popular wood coating ideas is to use color and high gloss with a shellac. This type of coating is very durable and can last for many years. It is also resistant to scratches and can be easily cleaned with a damp cloth. This type of coating is perfect for busy families who want a beautiful, but low maintenance finish.

3. Lacquers for Furniture

When it comes to choosing a lacquer for furniture, there are two main types: water-based and oil-based. Water-based lacquers are easier to apply and clean up, but they take longer to dry. Oil-based lacquers are more durable and provide a richer finish, but they’re also more difficult to work with. Ultimately, the best type of lacquer for furniture depends on your personal preferences and the project at hand.

Wood Stain for the Looks

Applying Wood Coatings Coat by Coat

blogs.title: ZKB Eclipse Peshawar
blogs.excerpt: Are you looking to invest in commercial units, shops, and luxury apartments? Do not look further. The ZKB Eclipse Peshawar is here.
blogs.content:
ZKB Eclipse Peshawar:A Complete Guide for Location, Payment Plan, and Amenities

Peshawar is rising with its world-class infrastructure and modern living standards through projects like ZKB Eclipse on Main Peshawar Ring Road. The Zahir Khan & Brothers (Pvt.) Ltd, in partnership with a Qatar-based engineering firm HBK Engineering Services W.L.L, is its developer. This 33-storey mixed-use landmark spans an area of 1.9 million square feet, making it the largest project in the city.

It is a 7-storey shopping mall, 367 luxury apartments, and world-class amenities all under a single roof to redefine the standards of urban living in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KPK). You can read the location, payment plan, and other essential details of this project in this blog.

ZKB Eclipse Location Overview

The ZKB Eclipse location is on Main Peshawar Ring Road, Peshawar, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KPK), Pakistan. This project is at the intersection of Peshawar Ring Road and Bara Road, in the northwestern zone of Peshawar. It is a swiftly developing area offering high connectivity to the other parts of the city.

Accessibility of the Project

The ZKB Eclipse comes with strategic road connectivity through major routes of the city. Below is a description of its accessibility:

Peshawar Ring Road: The primary road where the project lies. It offers easy access all over the city.

Khyber Road and Bara Road: They provide direct access to the project site from the main city areas.

GT Road (Grand Trunk Road): A historic and heavily trafficked national highway adjacent to the project site.

Motorway: Easily link the project with the motorway network, making travel smooth.

University Road: It is another urban road with swift access.

Warsak Road: You can easily access it from the northwestern side of the project.

Peshawar-Naran Road: Another road to link the project with nearby landmarks of the city.

Nearby Landmarks

Healthcare Institutes

Famous Mosques:

Five Star Hotels :

Educational Institutions:

Close-by Famous Areas / Colonies:

Transport / Travel:

These location specifications make the ZKB Eclipse a highly accessible and strategically connected project in one of the rapidly developing areas of Peshawar.

About the Developer of ZKB Eclipse

The ZKB Eclipse is a project of Zahir Khan & Brothers (Pvt.) Ltd since 1973. It is a Pakistan-based developer crafting major public sector infrastructure projects: Islamabad Metro, Orange Line Lahore, Green Line Karachi, Hazara Motorway, Koral Bridge, and more.

Additionally, they have an engineering partner, HBK Engineering Services W.L.L., a Qatar-based organization with 44 years of experience.

They have several international projects to their credit, such asQatar International Islamic Bank Tower, Al Khaleej Tower, HBK Headquarters, and others. Moreover, this project developer has won the Asia Pacific Property Awards 2021–2022.It is recognized in Architecture, Development, Interior Design, Real Estate, and overall excellence.

Master Plan of ZKB Eclipse

The ZKB Eclipse is an engineering and architectural miracle spanning across 1.9 Million Square Feet. Its design will redefine Peshawar’s urban landscape through world-class shopping destinations and luxury residential units. Its master plan includes various commercial and residential units with the following specifications:

Commercial Area

Residential Area

The residential area of ZKB Eclipse includes 367 luxury apartment units with the following specifications:

The ZKB Eclipse master plan offers a visionary approach to urban development through its 1.9 million square feet area spanning a 7-story vertical city. There are 367 luxury residential units to offer a world-class lifestyle to residents of Peshawar.

Apartments For Sale in ZKB Eclipse

1 Bed-Apartment

The 1-Bed Apartment in ZKB Eclipse is a complete home, featuring a modern bedroom, an elegant living room, a well-equipped kitchen, and a private open-air balcony with alluring views. It is the best option for young professionals, newlywed couples, and investors.

2 Bed-Apartment

The 2-Bed Apartment in ZKB Eclipse offers two highly equipped bedrooms, a living room with high-class furnishing, a modern kitchen, and a personal balcony for breathtaking views. It is best for families and senior professionals. This apartment provides extra space and high comfort.

3 Bed-Apartment

The ZKB Eclipse’s 3-Bed Apartment is a large size with three big bedrooms, a high-end living room, a modern kitchen, and an open-air balcony. It is for families who need both value and space in stylish furnishings.

4-Bed Apartment at ZKB Eclipse

The 4-Bed Apartment is a complete family home that offers four elegant bedrooms, a grand living room, a dining area, a top-notch kitchen, and an exclusive open-air balcony offering stunning views.It is the perfect choice for big families in Peshawar who need space and luxury in one place.

ZKB Eclipse Residential Units Payment Plan

You can book 01,02, and 03-bed luxury apartment units at ZKB Eclipse on an affordable and easy installment plan with pre-launch rates. Below is the 3.5-year payment plan for residential units of this project:

ZKB Eclipse Commercial Units Payment Plan

You can book commercial units in ZKB Eclipse in different sizes with pre-launch rates. Here is the commercial unit payment plan. In this payment plan, you need to make commercial unit installments in 2.5 Years:

World-Class Facilities and Amenities in ZKB Eclipse

The modern vision and unparalleled facilities make the ZKB Eclipse a byword for just building. It is a dream of progress, luxury, and a modern lifestyle that is becoming reality.

Infrastructure and Parking Facility

Basement Parking: It is an underground parking for residents and visitors.

Façade Lighting: It is a beautiful external lighting feature that increases the visual appeal of a building.

Skylight: It is a natural lighting feature within the building premises.

Atrium: It is a big central space that provides a sense of clarity and comfort in the building.

Helipad: It is a rooftop helipad for easy aerial reach.

Shopping and Food

Cash & Carry Store: It is a high-end grocery and essential commodity store.

Food Court: It is offering various cuisines for outdoor dining.

Shopping Mall: A high-scale retail mall inside the project.

Entertainment and Leisure Experience

4D Cinema: A high-end cinema facility.

Fun City: An exclusive recreational area for families and kids.

Cigar Lounge: It is an area for enjoying relaxing moments with your friends.

Senior Citizens’ Lounge: A highly comfortable place for aged individuals.

Reception & Lift Lobby: A beautiful, welcoming entry place with a modern elevator.

Sports & Fitness

Male Gym: A high-end fitness center for men

Female Gym: A separate exercise place for females.

Squash Court: It is an in-house squash facility for sports lovers.

Tennis Court: A high-grade tennis court within the building.

Indoor Pool: A temperature-friendly indoor swimming facility.

Rooftop Swimming: This rooftop swimming pool offers international enjoyment vibes.

Residential Options

Apartments: Regular-sized residential apartment units.

Duplex Apartments: A Double-story comfortable apartment unit for a commodious life.

Penthouses: The premium top-floor residency offering unique views.

The 24-plus world-class facilities offer wellness, recreation, food, shopping, and comfortable residence.

Conclusion

The ZKB Eclipse is not just another building, but it is a new, modern face of Peshawar’s urban living. Its prime location, award-winning design, modern facilities, and legacy of ZKB and HBK make it a standard project that the city has never witnessed before.
